example.en: The path ends off abruptly.
example.zh: 这条路突然到头了。

phrases.zh: 集中精力做某事；全神贯注于

example.en: Plants absorb nutrients from the soil.
example.zh: 植物从土壤中吸收养分。

example.en: Williams abused his position as Mayor to give jobs to his friends.
example.zh: 威廉斯滥用市长权力，给不少朋友安排了工作。

example.en: He possessed no academic qualifications.
example.zh: 他没有学历。

example.en: Users can access their voice mail remotely.
example.zh: 用户可以远程获取语音邮件。

phrases.zh: 易接近的；易达到的；可存取的

example.en: The island is only accessible by boat.
example.zh: 这个岛只有坐船才能到。

example.en: The island was used to accommodate child refugees.
example.zh: 该岛用于收容儿童难民。

example.en: We have accomplished all we set out to do.
example.zh: 所有计划要做的事情，我们都已完成。

example.en: It is unjust that a privileged few should continue to accumulate wealth.
example.zh: 少数特权阶级继续积聚财富，这是不公平的。

example.en: The brochure tries to give a fair and accurate description of each hotel.
example.zh: 该手册尽量公正、准确地介绍每一家酒店。

example.en: Frances achieved very good exam results.
example.zh: 弗朗西丝考试取得了优异成绩。

example.en: The family acknowledge the need for change.
example.zh: 全家人都承认需要改变一下。

example.en: Manning hoped to acquire valuable works of art as cheaply as possible.
example.zh: 曼宁希望以尽可能低的价格买到有价值的艺术品。

example.en: Young children have a particularly acute sense of smell.
example.zh: 幼儿的嗅觉特别灵敏。

example.en: The ability to adapt is a definite asset in this job.
example.zh: 适应能力是做这份工作的绝对有利条件。

example.en: She helped him fight his drug addiction.
example.zh: 她帮助了他对抗自己的毒瘾。

example.en: Additional information can be obtained from the centre.
example.zh: 可以从中心获取更多信息。

phrases.zh: 胜任……的；对……是足够的；适合……的

example.en: Farmers have been slow to make adequate provision for their retirement.
example.zh: 农民们迟迟没有为退休做好适当安排。

phrases.zh: ◎(法律、惩罚等的)施行，执行，实行，实施；(药的)服用；用法；给与；(庄严的誓言或诺言的)提出，宣誓
公共行政；公共管理；行政管理

example.en: We’re looking for someone with experience in administration.
example.zh: 我们正在寻找一个有管理经验的人。

example.en: The job is mainly administrative.
example.zh: 这份工作主要是行政方面的。

example.en: I really admire the way she brings up those kids all on her own.
example.zh: 我十分佩服她独力把那些孩子抚养大。

example.en: Daniel gazed at her in admiration .
example.zh: 丹尼尔用爱慕的眼神注视着她。

translations.text: 准许进(加)入；入场费；承认

example.en: Reese, by his own admission , lacks the necessary experience.
example.zh: 里斯自己也承认缺乏必要的经验。

example.en: ‘Okay, so maybe I was a little bit scared,’ Jenny admitted.
example.zh: “行了，也许我是有点害怕。”珍妮承认道。

example.en: I should warn you in advance that I’m not a very good dancer.
example.zh: 我要先提醒你，我跳舞不是很好。

phrases.zh: n. （英国）一般学历证书考试优等（等于A level）

example.en: advanced learners of English
example.zh: 高级程度的英语学习者

example.en: career advancement
example.zh: 职业发展

example.en: You should have followed my advice.
example.zh: 你真该听我的建议。

example.en: The State Department issues travel advisories about conditions overseas.
example.zh: 国务院就海外局势发布旅游警报。

phrases.zh: 故意持相反意见的人；故意唱反调的人

example.en: Mr. Williams is a conservative who advocates fewer government controls on business.
example.zh: 威廉斯先生是一位提倡减少政府对商业的控制的保守人士。

example.en: an affectionate hug
example.zh: 亲切的拥抱

example.en: On the other hand, when he/she is being positive, reply in affirmation and enthusiasm.
example.zh: 另一方面，当他处于积极状态时，要用肯定和热情的话语来答复。

example.en: The general affirmed rumors of an attack.
example.zh: 将军证实了袭击的传闻。

example.en: I couldn’t afford the rent on my own.
example.zh: 我单靠自己付不起房租。

example.en: a UN agency responsible for helping refugees
example.zh: 负责为难民提供帮助的联合国机构

translations.text: 挑衅的，好斗的；有上进心的

example.en: Jim’s voice became aggressive.
example.zh: 吉姆的声音凶了起来。

example.en: a photograph album
example.zh: 相册

example.en: I don’t drink alcohol anymore.
example.zh: 我不再喝酒了。

phrases.zh: 提防；警戒著；随时准备著
紧急警报，红色警报；应急状况

example.en: The animal raised its head, suddenly alert.
example.zh: 那只动物突然警觉地抬起头来。

phrases.zh: n. 密友；个性的另一面；至交

example.en: Her face hadn’t altered much over the years.
example.zh: 过了这么多年，她的容貌并没有多大改变。

example.en: The aircraft had reached its cruising altitude of about 39,000 feet.
example.zh: 那架飞机已经达到了大约三万九千英尺的巡航高度。

example.en: Alfred was intensely ambitious, obsessed with the idea of becoming rich.
example.zh: 艾尔弗雷德雄心勃勃，一心想着发财。

example.en: How do you analyze this change?
example.zh: 你该如何分析这种变化？

example.en: the ancient civilizations of Asia
example.zh: 亚洲的古代文明

example.en: They announced their engagement in ‘The Times’.
example.zh: 他们在《泰晤士报》上宣布了订婚的消息。

phrases.zh: 年报，年度报告；年度决算；年度财务报告

example.en: The school trip has become an annual event.
example.zh: 学校组织的旅行成了一年一度的活动。

example.en: This is a perennating rhizome from which flowering shoots arise annually.
example.zh: 这是一种每年发芽开花的多年生根茎。

example.en: Sales are better than anticipated.
example.zh: 销量比预期要好。

phrases.zh: 古董家具；古典家具；古式家具

example.en: The palace is full of priceless antiques.
example.zh: 宫殿里到处都是价值连城的古董。

example.en: She lives in a small apartment.
example.zh: 她住在一套小公寓里。

example.en: The girl’s family have made a public appeal for help to try and catch her killer.
example.zh: 那名遇害女孩的家人吁请公众协助捉拿凶手。

example.en: He was always criticising his wife’s appearance.
example.zh: 他老是批评妻子的外表。

example.en: Her husband always had a huge appetite.
example.zh: 她丈夫向来胃口极大。

example.en: We have had lots of applicants for these positions.
example.zh: 对这些职位我们已有了很多申请人。

example.en: We receive hundreds of job applications each year.
example.zh: 我们每年收到数百封求职信。

phrases.zh: 减少对…之消耗量；努力，致力于…

example.en: We need to apply for planning permission to build a garage.
example.zh: 我们建车库需要申请规划许可。

translations.text: 任命，委派；约定，确定，指定

example.en: officials appointed by the government
example.zh: 政府任命的官员

example.en: All consultations are by appointment only .
example.zh: 就诊必须预约。

example.en: Thanks ever so much for your help, I really appreciate it.
example.zh: 多谢你的帮助，我真的很感激。

example.en: He was presented with a watch in appreciation of his long service.
example.zh: 他获赠一块手表，作为对其长期服务的感谢。

phrases.zh: 学习...的入门；学习...的途径

example.en: As I approached the house, I noticed a light on upstairs.
example.zh: 我走近那幢房子的时候注意到楼上有灯光。

example.en: You've never approved of Henry, have you?
example.zh: 你从未赞赏过亨利，是吧？

example.en: The president has already given his approval to the plan.
example.zh: 总统已经批准了这个计划。

phrases.zh: n. 造园技师；环境美化设计家
系统架构师；系统结构设计员

example.en: But I am an architect.
example.zh: 但是我是一名建筑师。

example.en: an archive of the writer’s unpublished work
example.zh: 那位作家未发表作品的档案

example.en: He was arrested and charged with murder.
example.zh: 他遭到逮捕并被指控谋杀。

phrases.zh: 难为情，害臊；对…感到羞耻；对…感到惭愧

example.en: Everyone cries sometimes – it’s nothing to be ashamed of.
example.zh: 每个人都会有哭的时候——没什么好难为情的。

example.en: A large crowd had assembled outside the American embassy.
example.zh: 一大群人聚集在美国大使馆外。

example.en: instructions for assembly
example.zh: 装配说明（书）

example.en: the value of a company’s assets
example.zh: 公司的资产价值

example.en: When I taught, I would assign a topic to children that they would write about.
example.zh: 教书时，我会给孩子们布置个写作题。

phrases.zh: 指派问题；分配问题；分派问题；配置问题
转让方法；指定分配方法

example.en: a history assignment
example.zh: 历史作业

phrases.zh: v. 联合；与…联系在一起；和…来往
n. 美国大学修满二年课程的肄业证书

example.en: Through science we've got the idea of associating progress with the future.
example.zh: 通过科学我们已有了将进步与未来联系起来的观念。

example.en: I think we can safely assume (=  it is almost certain  ) that interest rates will go up again soon.
example.zh: 我想我们几乎可以肯定，利率很快会再次上调。

example.en: You would be making an assumption that's not based on any fact that you could report.
example.zh: 你会做出不以你能报道的任何事实为依据的一种假设。

example.en: Her reply astonished me.
example.zh: 她的回答让我大吃一惊。

phrases.zh: n. 学业风气，学习氛围

example.en: The hotel had a lovely relaxed atmosphere .
example.zh: 那家宾馆的气氛轻松愉快。

example.en: Weather conditions prevented them from attempting the jump.
example.zh: 天气状况使他们无法尝试跳伞。

example.en: an automatic weapon
example.zh: 自动武器

translations.text: 可利用的，现有的；可获得的

phrases.zh: 可用于…的；对…有效的；能参加…的

example.en: Tickets are available from the box office.
example.zh: 售票处有票出售。

example.en: The age of the candidates ranged from 29 to 49 with an average age of 37.
example.zh: 候选人的年龄29岁至49岁不等，平均37岁。

example.en: ...the aviation industry.
example.zh: …航空工业。

example.en: There is long-distance medical system in the boat, aviate board has near one thousand square meters , can help many model copters rise and drop.
example.zh: 飞行甲板面积近千平方米，可供多种型号的直升机起降；

example.en: Road safety is taught to young children to avoid road accidents.
example.zh: 小孩子受到道路安全知识的教育，以避免交通事故。

phrases.zh: 奥斯卡金像奖；学院奖（美国电影艺术科学院颁发的年度奖项）

example.en: Moodie has been awarded a golf scholarship at the University of Hawaii.
example.zh: 穆迪获授夏威夷大学高尔夫奖学金。

phrases.zh: 品牌意识，商标意识；品牌知名度

example.en: Health officials have tried to raise awareness (=  improve people’s knowledge  ) about AIDS.
example.zh: 卫生部官员努力提高人们对艾滋病的认识。

phrases.zh: 学历；教育背景；教育程度

example.en: Students with a background in chemistry will probably find the course easier.
example.zh: 学过化学的学生可能会觉得这门课程容易些。

example.en: The diver flipped over backward into the water.
example.zh: 跳水运动员向后翻转跳入水中。

phrases.zh: 潘基文（男子名，韩国前外长，联合国秘书长）

example.en: Smoking is banned in the building.
example.zh: 大楼内禁止吸烟。

example.en: The firm went bankrupt before the building work was completed.
example.zh: 建筑工程尚未竣工，公司就破产了。

example.en: Is she a bawd that she should bargain?
example.zh: 她会是一个要讨价还价的鸨母吗?

phrases.zh: 有助于成功的条件；成功一半

example.en: the Battle of Trafalgar
example.zh: 特拉法尔加战役

phrases.zh: 表现好；举止得体；行为检点；表现良好
请检点一点，行为规矩些

example.en: She behaved in a very responsible way .
example.zh: 她表现得很有责任心。

example.en: a drug that has a beneficial effect on the immune system
example.zh: 有益于免疫系统的一种药物

phrases.zh: 得益于；得利于；因…而得到好处

example.en: They are working together to benefit the whole community.
example.zh: 他们在为整个社区的利益共同努力。

example.en: the person who places the highest bid
example.zh: 出价最高的人

example.en: Don’t blame me – it’s not my fault.
example.zh: 别来怪我——又不是我的错。

example.en: May God bless you.
example.zh: 愿上帝保佑你。

example.en: The Senate blocked publication of the report.
example.zh: 参议院阻止这个报告发表。

example.en: bogus insurance claims
example.zh: 虚报的保险索赔

example.en: It would get the economy going and give us the boost that we need.
example.zh: 这会推动经济发展并带给我们所需要的推动力。

phrases.zh: 为…而费心，为…操心；用…打扰

example.en: Why bother to go abroad, when there are so many nice places here?
example.zh: 这里有这么多好地方，干吗还要费事去国外？

phrases.zh: 广阔的市场；大量交易额；交易活跃的市场

example.en: We went along a broad passage.
example.zh: 我们走在一条宽阔的走廊上。

example.en: We had a really tight budget .
example.zh: 我们的预算很紧。

phrases.zh: 举证责任；提供证据之责任

example.en: His family responsibilities had started to become a burden.
example.zh: 家庭责任已开始成为他的负担。

example.en: the Federal Bureau of Investigation
example.zh: 联邦调查局

phrases.zh: 适合于……；为适合…而设计的

example.en: These instruments calculate distances precisely.
example.zh: 这些仪器计算距离非常精确。

example.en: Jones ran a good campaign.
example.zh: 琼斯的活动搞得很成功。

example.en: Our flight was cancelled.
example.zh: 我们的航班取消了。

translations.text: 申请求职者；投考者；候选人

phrases.zh: 合格的候选人；合资格人员

example.en: a presidential candidate
example.zh: 总统候选人

example.en: Rennie had eaten his supper in the canteen.
example.zh: 伦尼已在食堂吃过晚饭。

example.en: I don’t think he’s capable of murder.
example.zh: 我认为他没有能力杀人。

example.en: In addition to fulfilling the traditional roles of caregiver and homemaker, many Orthodox women also assume the role of primary breadwinner so their husbands can pursue religious studies full time.
example.zh: 除了要践行传统的照料者和主妇角色，许多东正教女性也要承担起养家的责任以便她们的丈夫可以全身心进行宗教研究。

phrases.zh: 不顾；不关心；不在乎；不感兴趣；无忧无虑

example.en: It was careless of him to leave the door unlocked.
example.zh: 他忘了锁门，真是粗心大意。

example.en: a casual manner
example.zh: 漫不经心的态度

example.en: The manuscripts have never been systematically catalogued.
example.zh: 一直没有系统地为这些手稿编过目录。

example.en: The physician must exercise caution when prescribing antidepressants.
example.zh: 医师在开抗抑郁药处方时必须谨慎。

example.en: a cautious driver
example.zh: 一位谨慎的司机

phrases.zh: 开学典礼；开幕式；开幕仪式；开幕典礼

example.en: a wedding ceremony
example.zh: 婚礼

phrases.zh: 接受挑战，奋起应付挑战

example.en: They threw down the challenge that he couldn’t wash 40 cars in one hour (= invited him to try to do it ) .
example.zh: 他们激将他，说他不可能在1小时内擦洗40辆汽车。

phrases.zh: [主英国口语][用作招呼语]老兄，老伙计，老弟[亦称作 old boy， old fellow]

example.en: a decent sort of chap
example.zh: 一个正派的小伙子

example.en: A soulless shopping centre stands across from one of the few buildings with character, the town hall.
example.zh: 一座毫无生气的购物中心对面就是少有的几个别具特色的建筑物之一：市政厅。

example.en: Bright colours characterize his paintings.
example.zh: 明亮的色彩是他绘画作品的特点。

example.en: Several charities sent aid to the flood victims.
example.zh: 有几家慈善机构已向洪灾灾民送去了救援物资。

example.en: Lucy stretched up to kiss his cheek.
example.zh: 露西伸长了脖子去亲吻他的脸颊。

example.en: a master chef
example.zh: 手艺高超的厨师长

translations.text: 化学的 n. 化学制品

example.en: the chemical composition of bleach
example.zh: 漂白剂的化学成分

example.en: Six people choked to death on the fumes.
example.zh: 六人被烟呛死。

phrases.zh: 在这种情况下；既然这样

example.en: He was a victim of circumstance .
example.zh: 他是客观环境的牺牲品。

example.en: The judge cited a 1956 Supreme Court ruling in her decision.
example.zh: 法官在她的判决中引用了1956年最高法院的一项裁决。

example.en: We need our schools to teach students to be good citizens.
example.zh: 我们需要学校把学生培养为好公民。

phrases.zh: 平民伤亡；平民死伤；民众伤亡

example.en: Many innocent civilians were killed during the war.
example.zh: 许多无辜的平民在战争中丧生。

example.en: Such things should not happen in a civilized society.
example.zh: 文明社会不应该有这种事情发生。

example.en: We’d classify Drabble’s novels under ‘Romance’.
example.zh: 我们把德拉布尔的小说归类为“言情小说”。

example.en: the classification of wines according to quality
example.zh: 葡萄酒按品质的分类

phrases.zh: 客户服务；向委托部门提供服务

example.en: a meeting with an important client
example.zh: 与一位重要客户的会面

phrases.zh: 牙科诊所，牙科诊室；牙科门诊部
梅约诊所（美国一家医院）
卫生所；健康中心；保健室

example.en: an appointment at an outpatient clinic
example.zh: 门诊预约

example.en: A clumsy waiter spilled wine all over her new skirt.
example.zh: 一名笨手笨脚的服务员把葡萄酒洒得她新裙子上到处都是。

example.en: a tennis coach
example.zh: 网球教练

example.en: a colleague of mine from the bank
example.zh: 我在银行的一位同事

example.en: They were on their way to the airport when their van was involved in a collision with a car.
example.zh: 他们正往机场赶路的时候，其货车和一辆小汽车相撞了。

example.en: Diets are most effective when combined with exercise.
example.zh: 节食和锻炼相结合是最有效的。

phrases.zh: 无可奉告；不予置评；无意见

example.en: He was fined for making abusive comments to the referee.
example.zh: 他因谩骂裁判而被罚款。

example.en: Women commit fewer crimes than men.
example.zh: 女性犯罪比男性少。

example.en: Are you ready to make a long-term commitment ?
example.zh: 你是否准备好作出长久的承诺？

example.en: a committee meeting
example.zh: 委员会会议

example.en: The report compares the different types of home computer available.
example.zh: 这份报告比较了市场上不同类型的家用计算机。

example.en: ...the introduction of legislation to compel cyclists to wear a helmet.
example.zh: …强制骑车人戴头盔的法律的引入。

example.en: Because my left eye is so weak, my right eye has to work harder to compensate.
example.zh: 因为我左眼视力差，右眼就要辛苦点来弥补一下。

example.en: People who are wrongly arrested may be paid compensation .
example.zh: 被误抓的人有可能得到补偿费。

example.en: Me: What do you mean "compete"?
example.zh: 我：你的“竞争”是什么意思？

example.en: New machinery has enhanced the company’s productivity and competitiveness.
example.zh: 新机器帮助公司提高了生产力，增强了竞争力。

example.en: Last year they sold twice as many computers as their competitors.
example.zh: 去年他们的计算机销量是竞争对手的两倍。

example.en: Doctors have warned against complacency in fighting common diseases.
example.zh: 医生警告说，治疗常见病不能一见好就掉以轻心。

example.en: Residents are complaining because traffic in the area has increased.
example.zh: 由于这个地区的交通流量有所增加，居民都在抱怨。

example.en: If you wish to make a complaint, you should see the manager.
example.zh: 如果你要投诉，应该去找经理。

phrases.zh: 整套；[计]成套机组；完全集

example.en: Students must complete the course.
example.zh: 学生必须学完这门课程。

example.en: a complicated voting system
example.zh: 复杂的选举制度

example.en: The newspaper was asked by federal agents for assistance and agreed to comply.
example.zh: 联邦探员要求这家报社给予协助，报社同意配合。

phrases.zh: 分量分析；[化]组分分析；组成成分分析

example.en: companies that make electronic components for computer products
example.zh: 为计算机产品生产电子零件的公司

example.en: The area has one of the world's greatest concentrations of wildlife.
example.zh: 该地区有世界上野生生物最集中的区域之一。

phrases.zh: 设计理念；设计构思；设计原理

example.en: a new concept in business travel
example.zh: 商务旅行的新理念

phrases.zh: ◎从事,忙于(常与with, about, in, over连用)
对…表示担心/忧虑；使（自己）关心…

example.en: His main concern is to be able to provide for his family.
example.zh: 他最为关心的事就是能够养家。

example.en: These are the report’s main conclusions.
example.zh: 这些就是这篇报告的主要结论。

example.en: I felt I was doing well and my confidence began to grow.
example.zh: 我觉得自己干得不错，自信心就开始增加了。

example.en: New evidence has confirmed the first witness’s story.
example.zh: 新的证据证实了第一个证人的说法。

example.en: Personal ethics and professional ethics sometimes conflict.
example.zh: 个人道德与职业道德之间有时会相冲突。

example.en: It is a solid, proven solution for adopting multiple standards -- whether your goal is to conform to the law or to improve your business practices.
example.zh: 它是一个坚固的、已经证实采用多个标准的解决方案，不管你的目标是遵守法律还是改善你的商业实践。

example.en: The problems confronting the new government were enormous.
example.zh: 新政府面临的难题是巨大的。

example.en: a growing demand for high-speed connectivity
example.zh: 对高速连接功能日益增长的需求

example.en: Well, at least I can face them all with a clear conscience (= the knowledge that you have done nothing wrong ) .
example.zh: 好吧，至少我可以问心无愧地面对他们所有人。

example.en: The EU Council of Finance Ministers failed to reach a consensus on the pace of integration.
example.zh: 欧盟财政部长会议未能就一体化的进度达成共识。

phrases.zh: 知情同意，知会同意；知后同意

example.en: He finally consented to go.
example.zh: 他最终同意去。

example.en: Her lawyer said she understood the consequences of her actions and was prepared to go to jail.
example.zh: 她的律师说她明白自己行为的后果并准备去坐牢。

example.en: a very conservative attitude to education
example.zh: 对待教育非常守旧的态度

example.en: Michael has already spent considerable time in Barcelona.
example.zh: 迈克尔在巴塞罗那已经待了相当长的时间了。

example.en: It’s considerably colder today.
example.zh: 今天冷多了。

example.en: He was always kind and considerate.
example.zh: 他总是很善良，为别人着想。

example.en: My diet consisted almost exclusively of chocolate-covered cookies and glasses of milk.
example.zh: 我的饮食几乎只包含裹上巧克力的曲奇饼和一杯杯牛奶。

example.en: She’s the team’s most consistent player.
example.zh: 她是该队中表现最为稳定的选手。

example.en: The notice must be displayed in a conspicuous place.
example.zh: 通告一定要贴在显眼的地方。

example.en: There was a constant stream of visitors to the house.
example.zh: 参观这幢房子的游客川流不息。

example.en: He talked constantly about his work.
example.zh: 他不断地谈到他的工作。

phrases.zh: 建筑计划，建设项目；基建计划

example.en: a road construction project
example.zh: 道路修建计划

example.en: The meeting was very constructive.
example.zh: 这次会议很有建设性。

example.en: If symptoms persist, consult a doctor without delay.
example.zh: 如果症状持续的话，马上咨询医生。

phrases.zh: 营销顾问；市场顾问；销售顾问

example.en: a management consultant
example.zh: 管理顾问

example.en: Vigorous exercise increases oxygen consumption.
example.zh: 剧烈运动增加氧的消耗。

phrases.zh: 联系我们；联络我们；联系方式

example.en: The town is cut off from contact with the outside world.
example.zh: 小镇与外界的联系被切断了。

example.en: She writes a lot of contemporary music for people like Whitney Houston.
example.zh: 她为惠特尼·休斯敦等人创作大量当代音乐作品。

example.en: The content of the media course includes scripting, editing and camera work.
example.zh: 大众传媒课程的内容包括稿件写作、剪辑和摄像操作。

phrases.zh: 关于这点；由此而论；由于这个原因；在这个背景下

example.en: The meaning of ‘mad’ depends on its context. mad
example.zh: 一词的意义要视上下文而定。

example.en: Employees who refuse to relocate are in breach of contract (= have done something not allowed by their contracts ) .
example.zh: 员工拒绝调动岗位是违反合约的。

example.en: The sauce is quite sweet, so add dried thyme as a contrast.
example.zh: 这调味汁很甜，所以要加点干百里香作为陪衬。

example.en: The three sons also contribute to the family business.
example.zh: 3个儿子也为家族企业做贡献。

phrases.zh: 捐赠，贡献给；为…做出贡献

example.en: a campaign contribution
example.zh: 竞选捐款

example.en: Mail-order catalogs are a convenient way to shop.
example.zh: 使用邮购目录是一种方便的购物方式。

example.en: Internet connections through conventional phone lines are fairly slow.
example.zh: 通过传统的电话线来连接因特网速度很慢。

example.en: All this information can be conveyed in a simple diagram.
example.zh: 所有这些信息可以通过一张简单的图表来表示。

example.en: He was doing his best to be cooperative.
example.zh: 他在尽全力配合。

phrases.zh: 公司治理；企业管治，企业治理；公司管治

example.en: corporate responsibility
example.zh: 共同的责任

phrases.zh: 总顾问；法律总顾问；律师事务所；法律咨询公司

example.en: My advisers counselled me to do nothing.
example.zh: 我的顾问建议我不要做任何事情。

example.en: a newly married couple
example.zh: 一对新婚夫妇

example.en: He was wrong, and courageous enough to admit it.
example.zh: 他是错了，而且有勇气承认自己错了。

phrases.zh: 股市崩盘；股市行情暴跌

example.en: The jet crashed after take-off.
example.zh: 这架喷气式飞机起飞后就坠毁了。

example.en: artistic creativity
example.zh: 艺术创造力

phrases.zh: 危机管理，处理危急的办法

example.en: The country now faces an economic crisis .
example.zh: 该国目前正面临一场经济危机。

example.en: Mather was a film critic for many years.
example.zh: 马瑟做过多年的电影评论家。

phrases.zh: 批判性思维，批判性的思考；批判思考能力，判断思维

example.en: He made some highly critical remarks.
example.zh: 他发表了一些严厉的批判性言论。

example.en: Ron does nothing but criticize and complain all the time.
example.zh: 罗恩什么也不干，只是一味指责和抱怨。

example.en: Despite strong criticism , the new system is still in place.
example.zh: 尽管遭到了猛烈的批评，新制度依然原封不动。

example.en: We cultivated maize and watermelons.
example.zh: 我们种植玉米和西瓜。

phrases.zh: n. 场外交易市场；股票证券场外交易市场

example.en: measures to curb the spread of the virus
example.zh: 控制病毒扩散的措施

example.en: I opened the packet just to satisfy my curiosity .
example.zh: 我打开包裹只是为了满足我的好奇心。

example.en: Puppies are naturally curious.
example.zh: 小狗天生好奇。

phrases.zh: 现行状态；初速电流状态

example.en: the current President
example.zh: 现任总统

example.en: the products that are currently available
example.zh: 目前供应的产品

example.en: He had enough money to pay off his outstanding debts.
example.zh: 他有足够的钱偿还亏欠的债务。

example.en: a decent burial
example.zh: 得体的葬礼

example.en: Spending on information technology has declined.
example.zh: 用于信息技术的支出减少了。

example.en: The bathroom is decorated in green and yellow.
example.zh: 浴室里是用绿色和黄色装潢的。

phrases.zh: 按照定义；当然地；明显地

example.en: a dictionary definition
example.zh: 词典里的释义

phrases.zh: 学士学位；大学本科学位证书

example.en: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees.
example.zh: 把烘箱预热至425度。

example.en: Don’t delay – send off for the information now.
example.zh: 别犹豫——即刻去函索取信息。

example.en: a deliberate attempt to humiliate her
example.zh: 对她的故意羞辱

example.en: The king delivered a televised speech to the nation on November 5.
example.zh: 国王在11月5日向全国发表了电视讲话。

example.en: Production is still increasing faster than demand.
example.zh: 生产仍比需求增长快。

example.en: a democratic government
example.zh: 民主政府

example.en: The study demonstrates the link between poverty and malnutrition.
example.zh: 这项研究证明了贫困与营养不良之间的联系。

phrases.zh: 电流密度；扩散（弥漫）流密度

example.en: areas of high population density
example.zh: 人口密度高的地区

example.en: the personnel department
example.zh: 人事部

example.en: Britain’s depressed housing market
example.zh: 英国不景气的房产市场

example.en: It’s a depressing thought.
example.zh: 这是个令人沮丧的想法。

example.en: They've been deprived of the fuel necessary to heat their homes.
example.zh: 他们无法得到住房取暖必需的燃料。

example.en: Mr. Ying is one of those happy people who derive pleasure from helping others.
example.zh: 英先生是那种助人为乐的快活人。

example.en: What have I done to deserve this?
example.zh: 我做了什么事，要得到这样的报应？

example.en: female sexual desire
example.zh: 女性的性欲

example.en: Despite all our efforts to save the school, the authorities decided to close it.
example.zh: 尽管我们竭力想保住这所学校，当局还是决定把它关闭。

example.en: She had homemade ice cream for dessert.
example.zh: 她吃了些自制冰淇淋当餐后甜点。

example.en: This issue will be discussed in more detail in Chapter 5.
example.zh: 这个问题将在第五章里作更为详细的论述。

example.en: a beautifully detailed carving
example.zh: 漂亮精致的雕刻

example.en: Many forms of cancer can be cured if detected early.
example.zh: 如果发现得早，许多种癌症都可以治愈。

example.en: ...the early detection of breast cancer.
example.zh: …乳腺癌的早期发现。

example.en: She hired a detective to find out if her husband was having an affair.
example.zh: 她雇了一个私人侦探调查她丈夫是否有外遇。

example.en: The amount of available water determines the number of houses that can be built.
example.zh: 可用的水量决定可以建造多少房子。

phrases.zh: 医疗设备；医疗器材；人体医疗配件

example.en: The recording device has activated.
example.zh: 录音装置已开动起来。

example.en: He decided to devote the rest of his life to scientific investigation.
example.zh: 他决定把余生奉献给科学研究。

example.en: the downfall of the hated dictator
example.zh: 遭人痛恨的独裁者的垮台

example.en: a diligent student
example.zh: 勤勉的学生

phrases.zh: 大学文凭；（高等学校）文凭、毕业证书
研究生文凭；研究生文凭课程

example.en: ...a new two-year course leading to a diploma in social work.
example.zh: ...一门可以获得社会工作文凭的2年制的新课程。

example.en: Criminal behaviour can be linked to economic disadvantage.
example.zh: 犯罪行为可能会与经济困难有关。

example.en: At this point the path seemed to disappear altogether (= disappear completely ) .
example.zh: 小路到这里好像完全消失了。

phrases.zh: 局部放电；部分放电；部份履行

example.en: Hospitals now tend to discharge patients earlier than in the past.
example.zh: 与过去相比，现在医院更趋向于让病人早些出院。

phrases.zh: 打折扣；不受欢迎，没销路

example.en: They are often available at a discount.
example.zh: 它们经常可以以折扣价买到。

example.en: The body was discovered in a field.
example.zh: 尸体是在一块田地里找到的。

phrases.zh: 扰乱社会治安的行为，妨碍治安行为

example.en: clothes left in a disorderly heap
example.zh: 乱七八糟堆在一起的衣服

phrases.zh: n. 液晶显示器；液晶屏幕

example.en: a dazzling display (= very good display ) of flowers
example.zh: 令人目眩神迷的花卉展

example.en: It is beyond dispute that advances in medicine have enabled people to live longer.
example.zh: 医学的发展使人们更加长寿，这是无可置疑的。

example.en: More or other, they still dissatisfy.
example.zh: 更多或另外一些，它们仍然不满足。

example.en: Measure the distance between the two points.
example.zh: 量出两点之间的距离。

example.en: the sound of distant gunfire
example.zh: 远处的炮火声

example.en: Could he distinguish right from wrong?
example.zh: 他能辨别是非吗？

example.en: a long and distinguished career
example.zh: 漫长而卓越的职业生涯

example.en: Try not to distract the other students.
example.zh: 尽量不要让其他学生分心。

example.en: She had seemed curiously distracted.
example.zh: 她不知为什么显得心不在焉。

example.en: I study in the library as there are too many distractions at home.
example.zh: 我在图书馆学习，家里分心的事太多。

example.en: a man distributing leaflets to passers-by
example.zh: 一个向路人派发传单的男子

example.en: a postal district
example.zh: 邮政区

example.en: subjects as diverse as pop music and archaeology
example.zh: 像流行音乐和考古学这样各不相同的学科

phrases.zh: 多样性指数；歧异度指数

example.en: ...the cultural diversity of Latin America.
example.zh: …拉丁美洲文化的多样性。

example.en: The Wall used to divide East and West Berlin.
example.zh: 过去这堵墙把东、西柏林隔开。

example.en: the Computer Services Division
example.zh: 电脑维修部

example.en: She produces legal documents for a downtown Seattle law firm.
example.zh: 她为西雅图市区的一家法律事务所撰写法律文件。

example.en: The dominant male gorilla is the largest in the group.
example.zh: 领头的公猩猩是这群大猩猩中体形最大的一个。

example.en: The imperialists use this ideology and culture as a lever for easily realizing their domination and subjugation, aggression and plunder of other countries.
example.zh: 帝国主义者使用这种思想和文化作为一种杠杆，轻易地实现其统治、征服、侵略以及掠夺他国的目的。

example.en: There have been generous donations from EU funds.
example.zh: 欧盟基金给予了慷慨的捐款。

example.en: people who volunteer to donate blood
example.zh: 自愿献血者

example.en: She lived in a college dormitory.
example.zh: 她住在一幢大学宿舍楼里。

example.en: games that can be downloaded free from the Internet
example.zh: 可以从因特网上免费下载的游戏

example.en: a high school dropout
example.zh: 中学退学者

phrases.zh: 待发；待退；应离店但还未离店

example.en: The next income tax payment is due on 31 January.
example.zh: 下一次的所得税支付期限是1月31日。

example.en: We dumped our bags at the nearby Grand Hotel and hurried toward the market.
example.zh: 我们把包扔在附近的格兰德旅馆，急匆匆地向市场赶去。

example.en: Wood is a durable material.
example.zh: 木头是耐用材料。

phrases.zh: ◎自我安慰，泄愤，出气；抛弃心头的烦闷

example.en: She lived a life of ease.
example.zh: 她过着悠闲自在的生活。

example.en: They thought she would be popular, warm and easygoing, but not demanding and difficult.
example.zh: 他们认为她会是受人欢迎的，温情的，随和的，而非挑三拣四难以追求的。

example.en: the long-term effects of the drug
example.zh: 这种毒品的长期影响

example.en: This oil lubricates efficiently.
example.zh: 这油能有效地起润滑作用。

example.en: a ruthless dictator who eliminated all his rivals
example.zh: 铲除所有异己的残酷独裁者

example.en: He didn’t want to embarrass her by asking questions.
example.zh: 他不想提问让她尴尬。

example.en: Lori gets embarrassed if we ask her to sing.
example.zh: 我们要是请洛丽唱歌，她就会难为情。

example.en: Jack warmly embraced his son.
example.zh: 杰克热情拥抱他的儿子。

example.en: The day after that, the emergence of a new competitor.
example.zh: 今后的每一天都可能出现新的竞争对手。

example.en: Lifeguards are trained to deal with emergencies.
example.zh: 救生员接受过应对紧急情况的训练。

phrases.zh: 声发射，声频发射；声发射检验
瓦斯泄出；气体放出；瓦斯喷出
场致发射；自动发射；静电发射；电场发射

example.en: Britain agreed to cut emissions of nitrogen oxide from power stations.
example.zh: 英国同意减少发电站氮氧化物的排放量。

example.en: The kettle emitted a shrill whistle.
example.zh: 水壶发出了刺耳的鸣笛声。

translations.text: 情绪的；容易激动的；感动人的

phrases.zh: 情绪智力；情商；情绪智商

example.en: She provided emotional support at a very distressing time for me.
example.zh: 在我非常痛苦的时候，她是我的情感支柱。

example.en: The report emphasizes the importance of improving safety standards.
example.zh: 报告强调了改进安全标准的重要性。

example.en: I want to thank everyone who has encouraged and supported me.
example.zh: 我要感谢每一位鼓励和支持过我的人。

phrases.zh: 耐久试验，耐力测验；疲劳试验

example.en: She was pushed beyond her powers of endurance.
example.zh: 她被逼得忍无可忍。

example.en: It seemed impossible that anyone could endure such pain.
example.zh: 似乎谁都不可能忍受这样的疼痛。

example.en: I have never engaged in drug trafficking.
example.zh: 我从来没有从事过贩毒。

example.en: Their engagement was announced in the paper.
example.zh: 他们订婚的消息在报上公布了。

example.en: Good lighting will enhance any room.
example.zh: 良好的照明能给房间增色不少。

example.en: an enormous bunch of flowers
example.zh: 巨大的花束

example.en: Add fertilizer to enrich the soil.
example.zh: 施上肥料使土壤肥沃。

example.en: Class enrollment, where each student has all of the course schedule selections, each student having his own bucket in the CGTT.
example.zh: 班级入学，每个学生都有所有的课程安排选择，每个学生都将自己的选择放在 CGTT 中。

example.en: facilities to ensure the safety of cyclists
example.zh: 确保骑车人安全的设施

example.en: Children’s TV nowadays is much more entertaining.
example.zh: 如今的儿童电视节目要比过去有趣多了。

phrases.zh: 在其他条件都相同的情况下

example.en: Our constitution states that all men are equal.
example.zh: 我们的宪法规定人人平等。

example.en: ...equality of the sexes.
example.zh: …性别平等。

phrases.zh: 等效应力；折算应力；相当应力

example.en: I had no dollars, but offered him an equivalent amount of sterling.
example.zh: 我没有美金，但给了他等值的英镑。

phrases.zh: 等效性原理；等效原则；等价原理

example.en: ...the equivalence of science and rationality.
example.zh: ...科学和理性的相等。

example.en: His death marked the end of an era.
example.zh: 他的去世标志着一个时代的终结。

example.en: We asked Jason to write an essay about his hometown.
example.zh: 我们让杰森写一篇关于他家乡的短文。

example.en: Ballet is essentially a middle-class interest.
example.zh: 芭蕾舞基本上是中产阶级感兴趣的东西。

example.en: The city of Boerne was established by German settlers in the 1840s.
example.zh: 博恩市是德国移民于19世纪40年代建立的。

example.en: After that, we could go for esteem and respect.
example.zh: 而再往上，我们可能需要自尊和尊重。

example.en: Try to estimate how many steps it will take to get to a close object.
example.zh: 估计一下需要多少步才能到达一个近距目标。

example.en: Murrow’s evidence was enough to convict Hayes of murder.
example.zh: 默罗的证词足以证明海斯犯了谋杀罪。

phrases.zh: 不言而喻的；不证自明的

example.en: Bob ate his lunch with evident enjoyment.
example.zh: 显然鲍勃吃午饭吃得津津有味。

phrases.zh: 作恶；为非作歹；干坏事；造孽

example.en: She wanted to protect her children from the evils of the outside world.
example.zh: 她想保护她的孩子不受外界的不良影响。

example.en: The school has evolved its own style of teaching.
example.zh: 学校逐步形成了自己的教学风格。

example.en: I couldn’t sleep for three days – I’m not exaggerating.
example.zh: 我三天没睡觉了——一点不夸张。

example.en: an excellent suggestion
example.zh: 极好的建议

example.en: It’s been cold, but today’s an exception.
example.zh: 天气一直寒冷，但今天是个例外。

example.en: his excessive drinking
example.zh: 他的酗酒

phrases.zh: 外汇；国际汇兑；外国汇票

example.en: Four of my cassettes for your Madonna CD is a fair exchange.
example.zh: 我用四盒磁带换你的麦当娜激光唱片很公平。

example.en: a special diet that excludes dairy products
example.zh: 不包含奶制品的特别食谱

example.en: Water expands as it freezes.
example.zh: 水结冰时会膨胀。

example.en: the urgent need to exploit the resources of the Irish Sea
example.zh: 开发爱尔兰海资源的迫切需要

example.en: Management need to explore ways of improving office security.
example.zh: 管理层需要探讨如何加强办事处的安全措施。

example.en: We heard a loud explosion.
example.zh: 我们听到一声巨大的爆炸声。

example.en: He lifted his T-shirt to expose a jagged scar across his chest.
example.zh: 他撩起T恤衫，露出横贯胸部的锯齿状伤疤。

example.en: Exposure to lead is known to damage the brains of young children.
example.zh: 已知接触铅会损害幼童的大脑。

example.en: Moreover, it offers the expressiveness which helps to “simplify complex tasks”.
example.zh: 此外，它更具表现力，这有助于“简化复杂任务”。

example.en: a loft extension
example.zh: 增建的阁楼

example.en: Each child had participated in extracurricular activities at school.
example.zh: 每个孩子都参加了学校的课外活动。

phrases.zh: 制造设施，生产设施；生产设备

example.en: What recreational facilities are now available?
example.zh: 什么娱乐设施现在是可用的？

phrases.zh: 真诚地；善意地；诚心诚意地
对…的信任；对…有信仰；对…有信心

example.en: People have lost faith in the government.
example.zh: 人们已失去了对政府的信心。

phrases.zh: 简体，非正式文体；家常体

example.en: a familiar tune
example.zh: 熟悉的曲调

example.en: I fantasized about writing music.
example.zh: 我曾幻想作曲。

example.en: The idea of travelling through time fascinates me.
example.zh: 穿越时光的想法深深吸引着我。

example.en: The fascination lay in the mystery of what was inside the box.
example.zh: 吸引力就在于这神秘感——不知道盒子里是什么东西。

phrases.zh: 致命错误，不可恢复的错误

example.en: potentially fatal diseases
example.zh: 潜在致命的疾病

example.en: I wouldn’t wish such a fate on my worst enemy.
example.zh: 就算是我不共戴天的仇敌，我也不希望他遭遇这样的命运。

example.en: {"COLLOINEXA":["metal fatigue"]}
example.zh: 金属疲劳

phrases.zh: [化]可行域；[计]可行区域；[经]可行性区域
经济上可行的，经济上合算

example.en: a feasible solution
example.zh: 可行的解决方法

phrases.zh: 主要特征；主要特点；主景；功能特点

example.en: Air bags are a standard feature in most new cars.
example.zh: 气囊是大多数新车的标准配置。

example.en: How can I provide feedback without making someone angry?
example.zh: 我怎样才能提出反馈意见又不会得罪人呢？

example.en: romantic fiction
example.zh: 爱情小说

phrases.zh: 解决；算出；想出；理解；断定

example.en: Government figures underestimate the problem.
example.zh: 政府的数据对这一问题反映不足。

example.en: financial transactions
example.zh: 财务往来

example.en: leasing and other forms of business finance
example.zh: 租赁及其他商业金融形式

phrases.zh: 身体健康；体力；身体适宜性

example.en: an exercise programme to improve your fitness
example.zh: 增进健康的锻炼计划

example.en: We can be flexible about your starting date.
example.zh: 你具体从哪天开始，我们可以灵活一点。

translations.text: 立足处（攀登时脚踩的地方）

example.en: Businesses are investing millions of dollars to gain a foothold in this new market.
example.zh: 商家们正投资数百万美元以求在新市场中赢得立足点。

example.en: By visualizing where you want to be, you start helping your mind formulate ways to achieve that next goal in your life.
example.zh: 通过把你想达到的程度形象化，你就开始帮助自己的头脑制定目标——为了达到你生活中的下一个目标。

example.en: Fortunately, everything worked out all right in the end.
example.zh: 幸运的是，最后一切顺利。

phrases.zh: [英国英语]领取基金会提供奖学金(或津贴)的；属于由基金维持的机构的

example.en: It took the builders three weeks to lay the foundations .
example.zh: 建筑工人花了三星期的时间打地基。

example.en: Don’t stand so near the edge! You’re frightening me.
example.zh: 别站得那么靠边！你要把我吓坏了。

example.en: a novel about a family’s struggle on the American frontier
example.zh: 描写一家人在美国边远地区奋斗的小说

example.en: The nervous system regulates our bodily functions (= eating, breathing, going to the toilet etc ) .
example.zh: 神经系统控制着我们身体的功能。

phrases.zh: 公积金；福利基金；准备基金

example.en: The fund was set up to try to save the cathedral.
example.zh: 设立基金以挽救大教堂。

phrases.zh: 大惊小怪，小题大做；吵吵闹闹
焦虑；过分关心，过分体贴

example.en: James said he’d better be getting back or there’d be a fuss .
example.zh: 詹姆斯说他最好回来，否则就会有人小题大做了。

example.en: The lottery is probably the most popular form of gambling.
example.zh: 彩票可能是最普遍的一种赌博形式。

example.en: a gap in the traffic
example.zh: 车流中的一个空档

example.en: I’ll just go and put the car in the garage.
example.zh: 我把车停到车库去。

phrases.zh: 锥齿轮，锥形齿轮；伞齿轮

example.en: When she put the car in gear it began to buck wildly.
example.zh: 当她把汽车搭上齿轮时，汽车便开始颠簸地行进。

example.en: people of the same gender
example.zh: 同性别的人

phrases.zh: 发电，发电量；发电机设备

example.en: Like most of my generation, I had never known a war.
example.zh: 和我们这一代的大多数人一样，我并没有经历过战争。

example.en: an act of great generosity
example.zh: 十分慷慨的行为

example.en: Dietler is generous with his time and money.
example.zh: 迪特勒在他的时间和金钱方面慷慨大方。

example.en: ‘Did he really?’ Her surprise seemed genuine.
example.zh: “他真的这样？”她好像是真的惊讶。

example.en: The earrings were a gift from my aunt.
example.zh: 这副耳环是我姑姑送给我的礼物。

example.en: The report paints a gloomy picture of the economy.
example.zh: 这篇报告描绘了一幅惨淡的经济现状。

example.en: a truly glorious future
example.zh: 无比美好的将来

phrases.zh: 吃点东西（非正式语）；随便吃几口；先吃点东西垫垫肚子

example.en: Try to get there early and grab good seats.
example.zh: 尽量早点去，抢个好位子。

example.en: They run a small grocery store.
example.zh: 他们经营一家小食品杂货店。

example.en: The bank will only lend me money if my parents guarantee the loan.
example.zh: 只有我父母作担保，银行才会给我贷款。

example.en: This chapter gives you some guidelines to help you in your work.
example.zh: 本章将介绍一些指导性原则，为你的工作提供帮助。

example.en: He did not deny his guilt.
example.zh: 他没有否认自己有罪。

example.en: I go to the gym as often as I can.
example.zh: 我一有空就去健身房健身。

example.en: I handled most of the paperwork.
example.zh: 大部分文书工作是我做的。

phrases.zh: 加害某人;让某人不满意[亦作do someone harm]

example.en: The scandal did his career a lot of harm.
example.zh: 丑闻对他的职业生涯造成很大损害。

example.en: the harmful effects of smoking
example.zh: 吸烟的害处

example.en: the gorgeous vocal harmonies on ‘Mexicali Rose’
example.zh: 《墨西哥玫瑰》的精彩和声演唱

phrases.zh: 严酷的现实；残酷的现实

example.en: The hostages are being held in harsh conditions.
example.zh: 人质被拘押在恶劣环境中。

phrases.zh: 道德危机；由于投保人可能不可靠所冒的风险

example.en: That pile of rubbish is a fire hazard (= something that is likely to cause a fire ).
example.zh: 那堆垃圾是火灾隐患。

example.en: Your résumé should highlight your skills and achievements.
example.zh: 你的简历应该突出自己的技能和成绩。

example.en: Employers hire skilled people on fixed-term contracts.
example.zh: 雇主以签订固定期限的合同来雇用有技能的人。

example.en: Whether you are a carpenter or a therapist, a homemaker or a professor, it makes no difference.
example.zh: 不论你是一个木匠或是一个治疗师，一个家庭主妇还是教授，这都没有区别。

example.en: a politician of rare honesty and courage
example.zh: 具备少见的诚实及勇气的政治家

phrases.zh: 向…致敬，向…表示敬意；为庆祝…

example.en: When patients with SARS hospitalize massively, the department of nursing administration should take some measures to deploy timely, add and adjust nursing resource flexibly.
example.zh: 大规模收治SARS病人时医院护理部采取及时计划部署，灵活调整补充人力；

example.en: A growing number of households have at least one computer.
example.zh: 越来越多的家庭拥有至少一台电脑。

phrases.zh: 违反人道罪；危害人类罪

example.en: We want a clean healthy environment for all humanity .
example.zh: 我们希望全人类拥有一个干净健康的生存环境。

phrases.zh: n. 同卵双生，全等双生

example.en: four identical houses
example.zh: 四幢一模一样的房子

example.en: He was too far away to be able to identify faces.
example.zh: 他离得太远，没法看面孔认出谁是谁。

translations.text: 鉴定，识别；认同；身份证明

example.en: Do you have any identification?
example.zh: 你有什么身份证明文件吗？

example.en: The identity of the killer is still unknown.
example.zh: 凶手的身份仍未查明。

example.en: Excuse my ignorance, but how does it actually work?
example.zh: 请原谅我的无知，它究竟是如何运作的？

example.en: The phone rang, but she ignored it.
example.zh: 电话铃响了，但她只当没听见。

example.en: illegal drugs
example.zh: 违禁药品

example.en: Let me give an example to illustrate the point.
example.zh: 让我举个例子来说明这一点。

example.en: He had the clearest image in his mind of his mother and father.
example.zh: 他脑海中对父母的印象极其清晰。

example.en: As she listened, she played an imaginary piano on her knees.
example.zh: 她边听边在膝盖上作弹钢琴状。

example.en: She could see a figure sitting immobile, facing the sea.
example.zh: 她看到一个人影面朝大海坐着，一动不动。

example.en: They say they expect the meeting to have a marked impact on the future of the country.
example.zh: 他们说期望这次会议对国家的未来产生显著的影响。

translations.text: 非永久（性）的；不持久的，暂时的

example.en: single-storey structures, built from cheap and impermanent materials
example.zh: 用廉价而不耐久的材料建成的单层建筑

example.en: The government promised to implement a new system to control financial loan institutions.
example.zh: 政府许诺要实施新的制度来控制金融贷款机构。

example.en: an implied threat
example.zh: 隐含的威胁

phrases.zh: 进出口；导入和导出；输入和输出

example.en: The court can impose a fine.
example.zh: 法庭可以强制执行罚款。

phrases.zh: 处理不当；搬运不当；操作不当

example.en: 25 officers were investigated following allegations of improper conduct.
example.zh: 25名警官被指控行为不当而受到调查。

example.en: inadequate resources
example.zh: 资源缺乏

example.en: There is no suggestion that clients have been sold inappropriate policies.
example.zh: 没有迹象表明向客户出售过不适当的保险单。

example.en: Does the price include postage?
example.zh: 这个价格包含邮费吗？

example.en: It’s incredible that he survived the fall.
example.zh: 他跌下去竟然能够生还，真不可思议。

example.en: The study indicates a connection between poverty and crime.
example.zh: 研究显示贫穷和犯罪有关联。

example.en: Mobile phones have become an indispensable part of our lives.
example.zh: 移动电话已经成为我们生活中的必需品。

example.en: the rights of the individual
example.zh: 个人权利

example.en: She had to be induced because the baby was four weeks late.
example.zh: 她的孩子晚了四星期仍未出生，因此要给她引产。

example.en: A further escalation of the crisis now seems inevitable.
example.zh: 危机的进一步升级现在看来已不可避免。

example.en: The universe is infinite.
example.zh: 宇宙是无限的。

phrases.zh: 膨胀压力；充气压力；轮胎压力

example.en: Inflation is now at over 16%.
example.zh: 通货膨胀率现已超过16%。

example.en: It took us half an hour to inflate the dinghy.
example.zh: 我们用了半小时给橡皮筏充好气。

example.en: As a scientist, his influence was immense.
example.zh: 身为一名科学家，他的影响力极大。

example.en: He had influential friends.
example.zh: 他有一些有影响力的朋友。

example.en: Combine all the ingredients in a large bowl.
example.zh: 把所有食材都放在一个大碗里。

example.en: inherited wealth
example.zh: 继承的财富

example.en: They have decided to initiate legal proceedings against the newspaper.
example.zh: 他们决定向该报提起法律诉讼。

example.en: I wish my son would show more initiative.
example.zh: 我希望我的儿子能表现得再主动一些。

example.en: Angus injured his leg playing rugby.
example.zh: 安格斯在打橄榄球时弄伤了腿。

phrases.zh: 无辜人的血；无辜之血；不死的传说（美国恐怖戏剧爱情片）
无过失之一方；无辜的一方

example.en: Nobody would believe that I was innocent.
example.zh: 没人肯相信我是清白的。

example.en: We must encourage innovation if the company is to remain competitive.
example.zh: 公司要想保持竞争力，就必须鼓励革新。

example.en: Many of them work in low-paid insecure jobs.
example.zh: 他们当中的许多人都做着薪水低、不稳定的工作。

example.en: a woman of great insight
example.zh: 一位极有眼光的妇女

example.en: The Malvern Hills have provided inspiration for many artists and musicians over the decades.
example.zh: 几十年来，莫尔文丘陵为很多艺术家和音乐家提供了灵感。

example.en: We need someone who can inspire the team.
example.zh: 我们需要一个能鼓舞团队士气的人。

example.en: They’ve installed the new computer network at last.
example.zh: 他们终于安装了新电脑网络。

phrases.zh: 安装与调试；安装调试人员

example.en: the installation and maintenance of alarm systems
example.zh: 警报系统的安装和维护

phrases.zh: n. 分期付款方式；分期付款购物法
分期付款；分期付款帐户

translations.text: 立即的；紧急的；速溶的，方便的

example.en: an instant success
example.zh: 马到成功

example.en: We will institute a number of measures to better safeguard the public.
example.zh: 我们将制定许多措施更好地保护公众。

translations.text: 社会公共机构；制度，习俗；设立，制定

example.en: powerful institutions such as world banks
example.zh: 诸如世界银行之类的强大机构

example.en: Press ‘Enter’ and follow the on-screen instructions.
example.zh: 按回车键，然后按照电脑屏幕上的指示来操作。

example.en: Eva went straight to the hotel, as instructed (= as she had been told ).
example.zh: 伊娃按照指示径直去了宾馆。

example.en: surgical instruments
example.zh: 外科(手术)器械

phrases.zh: 进水口，取水口；水摄入（量）

example.en: Your intake of alcohol should not exceed two units per day.
example.zh: 你每天酒精摄入量不能超过两个单位。

example.en: the territorial integrity of the country
example.zh: 国家的领土完整

example.en: To be good at the game, you need a reasonable level of intelligence.
example.zh: 要想把这种游戏玩好，需要一定的智力水平。

example.en: a group of highly intelligent (= very intelligent )students
example.zh: 一组聪明异常的学生

phrases.zh: 希望有或接到；打算成为……

example.en: Oddly enough, that is precisely what I intend.
example.zh: 说也奇怪， 那正是我的打算。

example.en: In Freud’s theory, the two areas of sexuality and violence are interconnected.
example.zh: 按照弗洛伊德的理论，性和暴力这两个方面是相互关联的。

example.en: ...the interdependence of nations.
example.zh: …国家间的相互依赖。

example.en: Freud’s attempts to interpret the meaning of dreams
example.zh: 弗洛伊德对梦的含义的解析

example.en: interracial marriage
example.zh: 种族间的通婚

phrases.zh: [心]危机干预；危机处理；危机介入

example.en: government intervention to regulate prices
example.zh: 政府介入控制物价

phrases.zh: 个人面谈；面谈调查；私人的会谈

example.en: a portfolio of work presented at interview
example.zh: 在面试时呈递的工作成果样本

example.en: The Romans invaded Britain 2,000 years ago.
example.zh: 2,000年前古罗马人入侵了英国。

example.en: Without the right date stamped on it, your ticket will be invalid.
example.zh: 票上若没有加盖正确日期就是废票。

phrases.zh: v. 投资于；[口]买进；寄希望于

example.en: I’ve got a few thousand dollars I’m looking to invest.
example.zh: 我有几千美元想作投资。

example.en: What will the job involve?
example.zh: 这份工作包括什么？

example.en: It really irritates me when he doesn’t help around the house.
example.zh: 家里的事情他一点都不帮忙，真让我恼火。

example.en: Silva issued a statement denying all knowledge of the affair.
example.zh: 西尔瓦发表声明，宣称对此事一无所知。

example.en: He opened the cardboard box and took out each item.
example.zh: 他打开纸板箱把里面的物品一一拿出来。

example.en: The two ministers have issued a joint statement.
example.zh: 两位部长发布了一项联合声明。

example.en: He observes keenly but says very little.
example.zh: 他观察敏锐， 但说得很少。

example.en: The organization has launched a campaign to raise $150,000.
example.zh: 为了筹集15万美元，该组织发起了一场募捐活动。

phrases.zh: 洗衣服务；爱情洗礼（专辑名称）

example.en: She did the laundry (= washed the clothes etc ) and hung it out to dry.
example.zh: 她洗了衣服，然后挂出去晾干。

example.en: What the company has done is perfectly legal.
example.zh: 公司所做的这一切完全合法。

example.en: Most people now enjoy shorter working hours and more leisure time.
example.zh: 现在大多数人都喜欢工作时间短些，闲暇时间多些。

example.en: A lengthy period of training is required.
example.zh: 需要很长一段时间的培训。

phrases.zh: 有限责任；有限债务责任

example.en: But without the formal business entity, you have no hope of limiting your personal liability.
example.zh: 因为没有正规的商务体制，你就没有希望限制你的个人责任。

phrases.zh: 文献回顾；文献综述；文献评论

example.en: He has read many of the major works of literature.
example.zh: 他读过许多重要的文学作品。

example.en: We obtained a loan from the government.
example.zh: 我们得了一笔政府贷款。

phrases.zh: 在某一点设置；在…定居；坐落于

example.en: The business is located right in the center of town.
example.zh: 这家商店就在市中心。

example.en: a building used to lodge prisoners of war
example.zh: 一座关押战俘的建筑物

example.en: There isa certain logicin their choice of architect.
example.zh: 他们对建筑师的选择是有一定道理的。

example.en: the agony of divided loyalties (= loyalty to two different or opposing people ) for the children in a divorce
example.zh: 父母离婚过程中孩子两面都要依顺的痛苦

example.en: Genet started as a rebel, but soon became part of the literary mainstream.
example.zh: 热内起初很叛逆，但不久就回归了文学主流。

example.en: Careers Officers maintain contact with young people when they have left school.
example.zh: 年轻人离开学校以后，职业指导员和他们保持联系。

example.en: There are two major political parties in the US.
example.zh: 美国有两大政党。

example.en: The Labour Party won a huge majority at the last general election.
example.zh: 工党在上次大选中以巨大的票数优势获胜。

example.en: Normally she wore little makeup, but this evening was clearly an exception.
example.zh: 通常她很少化妆，可今晚显然是个例外。

example.en: a malfunction in one of the engines
example.zh: 其中一个引擎的失灵

example.en: the company that manufactured the drug
example.zh: 生产这种药的公司

example.en: the western margin of southern Africa
example.zh: 非洲南部的西隅

example.en: They’re nice curtains, but I’d prefer something a little more masculine.
example.zh: 这些窗帘很好，但我更喜欢男性化一点的。

example.en: The bell is massive, weighing over 40 tons.
example.zh: 那口钟非常大，有40多吨重。

example.en: If I have to stay late at work tonight, it won’t matter because we can go out another night.
example.zh: 如果今晚我必须工作到很晚的话，那也没关系，我们可以改天晚上再出去。

example.en: We might have a third child, but that’s the absolute maximum .
example.zh: 我们可能会要第三个孩子，但这绝对是极限了。

phrases.zh: 生产资料；生产手段；生产工具

example.en: The only means of communication was sign language.
example.zh: 唯一的交流方法是手语。

example.en: She soon got the measure of her opponent.
example.zh: 她很快就掂出了对手的分量。

example.en: a garage mechanic
example.zh: 汽车修理厂的技工

phrases.zh: 市场机制；市场调节作用

example.en: the brake mechanism
example.zh: 刹车装置

phrases.zh: 根据事物本身的优缺点；按照事情的是非曲直
【法律】在诉讼中证明自己有理

example.en: The merit of the report is its realistic assessment of the changes required.
example.zh: 这份报告的优点就是它对所要求的变动进行了实事求是的评估。

example.en: What does this migration not do?
example.zh: 这种迁移不能做什么？

example.en: a military helicopter
example.zh: 军用直升机

example.en: Or they could be trained to use weeds as indicators of the soil's mineral properties to help them manage nutrients.
example.zh: 或者可以训练他们使用杂草作为土壤矿物属性的指示器，从而帮助他们管理营养物质。

example.en: KAPLAN: Well, there's always the risk of a miscalculation or an accident at sea.
example.zh: 卡普兰：呃，在海上总会有误算的风险，也有发生事故的风险。

example.en: I’ve been so miserable since Pat left me.
example.zh: 自从帕特离我而去后，我十分痛苦。

example.en: His parents still clung to the misguided belief that his common sense would keep him out of serious trouble.
example.zh: 他的父母依然错误地认为他的常识能让他远离大的麻烦。

example.en: Don’t be misled by appearances, he’s a good worker.
example.zh: 不要被表象迷惑，他工作干得挺不错的。

phrases.zh: 不可能的任务，棘手的任务

example.en: He was sent on over 200 missions before being killed in action.
example.zh: 在阵亡之前他奉命执行过200多次军事任务。

example.en: Rachel, you must have misunderstood her! Ellie would never say something like that.
example.zh: 雷切尔，你一定是误会她了！埃莉绝不会说那样的话。

phrases.zh: 遥控监视器；远距离监控装置

example.en: Patients who are given the new drug will be asked to monitor their progress.
example.zh: 使用这种新药的病人将被要求监测病情进展。

example.en: A good teacher has to be able to motivate her students.
example.zh: 好教师必须能够激发学生的积极性。

example.en: I didn’t like Dev, and the feeling seemed to be mutual.
example.zh: 我不喜欢德夫，他好像也不喜欢我。

phrases.zh: [计]窄带，窄频带；[经]狭小汇率幅度

example.en: a needy family
example.zh: 贫困家庭

phrases.zh: 负面影响；负效应；负磁力效应
不利影响；消极作用；负影响

example.en: students with a negative attitude to school
example.zh: 对上学抱消极态度的学生

example.en: His first aim is to get the warring parties back to the negotiating table (= discussing something ).
example.zh: 他的首要目标就是把交战各方拉回到谈判桌上。

example.en: Iterates may be categorized into stable and unstable sets depending on whether a neighborhood under iteration converges or diverges. Some move toward stability, others away.
example.zh: 根据一个受迭代影响的社区是聚合还是发散，迭代可以被归类到稳定和不稳定集。有些转向稳定，有些转离。

example.en: The tax puts obstacles in the way of companies trying to develop trade overseas.
example.zh: 这项税收为想在海外发展贸易的公司设置了障碍。

phrases.zh: 获得信息；索取资料或合同

example.en: Evans was trying to obtain a false passport and other documents.
example.zh: 埃文斯当时正试图获取假护照和其他文件。

example.en: Please state your name, address and occupation.
example.zh: 请写明你的姓名、地址和职业。

example.en: The UN rescue operation started shortly after dawn.
example.zh: 联合国的救援行动在破晓后不久就开始了。

example.en: I thought the medicine would make him sleep, but it had the opposite effect.
example.zh: 我以为这药会让他睡觉，但是它却起了反作用。

example.en: the liver, heart, and other internal organs
example.zh: 肝脏、心脏及其他内脏器官

example.en: The land was returned to its original owner.
example.zh: 这块土地归还给了原主。

example.en: How did the plan originate?
example.zh: 这个计划最早是怎么想到的？

example.en: a research proposal outline
example.zh: 研究计划梗概

example.en: He struggled to overcome his shyness.
example.zh: 他努力克服自己的羞怯。

example.en: He tends to overestimate his own abilities.
example.zh: 他往往高估自己的能力。

example.en: The drains flooded and water overflowed down the main street.
example.zh: 下水道被淹，水溢到了大街上。

phrases.zh: 信息过载；信息超载；信息超负荷

example.en: 57 percent complained of work overload.
example.zh: 57%的人抱怨工作负担过重。

example.en: He pulled out to overtake the van.
example.zh: 他把车驶出所在车道想超过那辆小货车。

example.en: I wonder if this letter is overweight.
example.zh: 我想知道这封信是否超重。

example.en: But the various pros and cons should not blindly overwhelm one another.
example.zh: 但是，众多的利弊得失不应盲目的一个压倒另一个。

translations.text: 痛苦的，疼痛的，令人不快的

example.en: stiff painful joints
example.zh: 僵硬疼痛的关节

example.en: Some members refused to participate.
example.zh: 有些会员拒绝参加。

phrases.zh: 过分讲究的；难以取悦的

example.en: In this particular case, no one else was involved.
example.zh: 这件事没有其他人牵涉其中。

example.en: He had a brief but passionate love affair with an older woman.
example.zh: 他和一个比他年长的女子有过一段短暂而炽热的情史。

example.en: The issue arouses strong passions .
example.zh: 那件事激起了人们强烈的情绪。

example.en: Kathy seems to take a very passive role in the relationship.
example.zh: 凯茜在这一关系中似乎扮演着十分被动的角色。

example.en: The teacher told him to weigh this matter patiently.
example.zh: 老师让他耐心考虑这事。

phrases.zh: 流型，流动型态；活动模；流线谱

example.en: Weather patterns have changed in recent years.
example.zh: 气候模式近年已经发生了变化。

example.en: We had a peaceful afternoon without the children.
example.zh: 孩子们不在，我们度过了一个宁静的下午。

example.en: American children did less well in math than their peers in Japan.
example.zh: 美国儿童的数学成绩不如日本的同龄儿童。

example.en: That morning, he perceived a change in Franca’s mood.
example.zh: 那天早上，他注意到弗兰卡情绪的变化。

example.en: This evening’s performance will begin at 8.00 pm.
example.zh: 今晚的演出8点开始。

example.en: He gave up a permanent job in order to freelance.
example.zh: 他放弃了固定工作，为的是当一名自由职业者。

phrases.zh: 视觉暂留；视觉残留；持续视觉

example.en: Her persistence paid off when she was offered the job of manager.
example.zh: 她得到了经理的职位，不懈坚持终于有了回报。

example.en: Despite their different personalities, they became the best of friends.
example.zh: 尽管个性不同，他们还是成了最好的朋友。

example.en: the artist’s use of perspective
example.zh: 那位画家对透视法的运用

example.en: He was fairly easily persuaded .
example.zh: 他很轻易就被说服了。

example.en: After a little gentle persuasion , Debbie agreed to let us in.
example.zh: 好言劝说了几句后，黛比就同意让我们进去了。

example.en: She was in constant physical pain.
example.zh: 她一直感到身上疼痛。

example.en: ...the laws of physics.
example.zh: …物理学定律。

example.en: He’s a very picky eater .
example.zh: 他很挑食。

example.en: The new cancer treatment was pioneered in the early eighties by Dr Sylvia Bannerjee.
example.zh: 这种新的癌症治疗方法是由西尔维娅·班纳基医生在80年代初期开创的。

example.en: The picture shows six of the nine planets in the solar system.
example.zh: 这张图片展示太阳系9个行星中的6个行星。

example.en: The meeting ended with a pledge to step up cooperation between the six states of the region.
example.zh: 会议以加快该地区6个州之间合作的承诺结束。

phrases.zh: 毒气；（尤指用于化学战争中的）毒瓦斯

example.en: The rumours that she had poisoned him could never be proved.
example.zh: 说她毒死了他的谣言永远不可能得到证实。

example.en: A recent poll found that 80% of Californians support the governor.
example.zh: 最近的一项民意调查发现80%的加利福尼亚人支持州长。

example.en: The lid popped open and juice spilled all over the floor.
example.zh: 盖子噗的一声弹开，果汁溅了一地。

example.en: Our taxi pulled up at Old Delhi station and a porter sprinted to the door.
example.zh: 我们的出租车停在老德里车站，一个搬运工疾步跑向车门。

phrases.zh: 构成威胁；形成一种威胁

example.en: Ann struck a pose (= stood or sat in a particular position ) and smiled for the camera.
example.zh: 安摆好姿势露出笑脸准备拍照。

phrases.zh: 就位；在适当的位置；在原位

example.en: Our hotel was in a superb central position near St Mark’s Square.
example.zh: 我们的酒店处于极佳的中心位置，在圣马克广场附近。

phrases.zh: 研究生文凭；研究生文凭课程

example.en: "Given the level of competition in law, I definitely think that my postgraduate degree helped to distinguish me from the crowd, " he says.
example.zh: 他说，“考虑到在法律行业的竞争水平，我确实认为我的研究生学位让我从众人中脱颖而出”。

phrases.zh: [经]市场潜力；市场潜在需求量

example.en: The boy has great potential.
example.zh: 这个男孩有很大的潜力。

example.en: Jane was praised by her teacher.
example.zh: 简受到了老师的表扬。

example.en: Sales were five percent lower than predicted.
example.zh: 销售额比预期低5%。

example.en: Do you have a colour preference ?
example.zh: 你有什么颜色上的偏好吗？

example.en: care for pregnant women
example.zh: 孕妇保健

example.en: Women still face prejudice in the workplace.
example.zh: 女性在职场中仍然面临歧视。

example.en: methods of food preservation
example.zh: 保存食物的各种方法

example.en: A similar situation prevails in Canada.
example.zh: 同样的情况在加拿大也普遍存在。

phrases.zh: 防治污染；预防和控制污染

example.en: The rules are intended to prevent accidents.
example.zh: 这些规定旨在预防事故。

example.en: Forty thousand children a day die from preventable diseases.
example.zh: 每天有四万儿童死于本可以防止的疾病。

example.en: She has a teenage daughter from a previous marriage.
example.zh: 她有个出自前一次婚姻的十几岁的女儿。

example.en: Guyana's railways were previously owned by private companies.
example.zh: 圭亚那的铁路先前为私营公司所拥有。

example.en: The advertisement is aimed primarily at children.
example.zh: 这则广告的对象主要是儿童。

example.en: a primitive society
example.zh: 原始社会

example.en: Schools try to teach children a set of principles.
example.zh: 学校设法教给孩子们一套道德准则。

example.en: The club’s priority is to win the League.
example.zh: 该俱乐部首先考虑的是要赢得联赛。

example.en: each individual’s right to privacy
example.zh: 每个人的隐私权

translations.text: 过程，进程；工序；(法律)程序

example.en: the Israeli-Egyptian peace process
example.zh: 以－埃和平进程

example.en: Most of us are more productive in the morning.
example.zh: 我们大多数人在早上更有效率。

example.en: The advertising campaign proved very profitable.
example.zh: 事实证明，这次广告宣传活动卓有成效。

example.en: a profound sense of guilt
example.zh: 强烈的内疚感

phrases.zh: 编程语言；程序设计语言
动态规划；动态程序设计

example.en: a course in computer programming
example.zh: 计算机编程的课程

example.en: Smoking is strictly prohibited inside the factory.
example.zh: 厂区严禁吸烟。

phrases.zh: 建筑计划，建设项目；基建计划

example.en: The project aims to provide an analysis of children’s emotions.
example.zh: 该计划旨在对儿童情绪作出分析。

example.en: a prominent Russian scientist
example.zh: 杰出的俄罗斯科学家

phrases.zh: n. 发展前景；光明的前途
发展潜力大的市场；有销路的市场

example.en: a promising career in law
example.zh: 很有前途的法律职业

example.en: You don't have to sacrifice environmental protection to promote economic growth.
example.zh: 你们没有必要牺牲环保来促进经济增长。

example.en: Prompt action must be taken.
example.zh: 必须立即采取行动。

example.en: A large proportion of the dolphins in that area will eventually die.
example.zh: 那个地区的很大一部分海豚最终都会死去。

phrases.zh: 光明的前景，辉煌的前程

example.en: I had no job, no education, and no prospects .
example.zh: 我没有工作，没受过什么教育，前途渺茫。

example.en: The novel has provoked fierce debate in the US.
example.zh: 那部小说在美国引发了激烈的争论。

example.en: Sleep disorders are a serious psychological problem .
example.zh: 睡眠障碍是严重的心理疾病。

example.en: television’s failure to publicize the unemployment issue
example.zh: 电视未能报道失业问题

example.en: She’s always very punctual for appointments.
example.zh: 她一向准时赴约。

example.en: She plans to pursue a career in politics.
example.zh: 她计划从政。

phrases.zh: 资格考试；合格试验；质量鉴定试验

example.en: He left school without any qualifications.
example.zh: 他离校时没有拿到任何文凭。

example.en: Free school lunches are given to children who qualify.
example.zh: 符合条件的儿童可获得免费的学生午餐。

example.en: Much of the land was of poor quality.
example.zh: 很多地的土质很差。

example.en: Your work has improved in quantity and quality this term.
example.zh: 这学期你的作业在完成数量和质量上都有提高。

example.en: There are no failures in life, only those who quit before success.
example.zh: 生活中没有失败者，只有那些在成功前就放弃的人。

example.en: Many shops have raised their prices.
example.zh: 很多商店都提价了。

phrases.zh: 大范围的；许多各种不同的

example.en: a temperature range of 72-85˚
example.zh: 72 度到85度之间的温度范围

example.en: We rank among the safest countries in the world.
example.zh: 我们是世界上最安全的国家之一。

example.en: This species of plant is becoming increasingly rare.
example.zh: 这种植物越来越罕见。

example.en: Did he come across as a sane, rational person?
example.zh: 他看上去是不是一个头脑清醒而理智的人？

example.en: Is this a realistic target?
example.zh: 这个目标能够实现吗？

example.en: She set about rearranging the furniture in the living room.
example.zh: 她开始重新摆放起居室的家具。

example.en: She was unsure of her reception after everything that had happened.
example.zh: 发生了这些事后，她对自己是否还受欢迎没把握。

example.en: the economic recession of the early 1980s
example.zh: 20世纪80年代初的经济衰退

example.en: The device can recharge a battery in about 25 minutes.
example.zh: 该充电器可在约25分钟内完成给电池充电。

example.en: Doctors strongly recommend that fathers should be present at their baby’s birth.
example.zh: 医生极力建议孩子出生时父亲应该在场。

example.en: After a few days of fever, she began to recover.
example.zh: 发烧几天之后，她开始恢复。

example.en: We’re having difficulty recruiting enough qualified staff.
example.zh: 我们难以招聘到足够的合格职员。

example.en: The governor announced a new plan to reduce crime.
example.zh: 州长宣布了一项降低犯罪率的新计划。

example.en: Herbs have been used for centuries to make refreshing drinks.
example.zh: 草药用于调制清凉饮料已有几百年的历史了。

example.en: The plane was refuelled in Dubai.
example.zh: 飞机在迪拜加过油。

phrases.zh: 优先取舍权；优先取决运务

example.en: Her country suffered through her refusal to accept change.
example.zh: 她的国家因为她拒绝接受变革而受了害。

example.en: The company holds regular meetings with employees.
example.zh: 公司定期召集雇员开会。

example.en: We meet regularly, once a month.
example.zh: 我们定期见面，每月一次。

example.en: strict rules regulating the use of chemicals in food
example.zh: 限制化学品在食物中使用的严格规定

phrases.zh: 政府法规，政府调控；政府监管

example.en: There seem to be so many rules and regulations these days.
example.zh: 如今好像条条框框很多。

example.en: The relative merits of both approaches have to be considered.
example.zh: 两种方法的相对优点都得考虑在内。

example.en: Police arrested several men, who were later released.
example.zh: 警察逮捕了几个人，后来都释放了。

example.en: Relevant documents were presented in court.
example.zh: 法庭上出示了相关的文件。

example.en: a birth control method that is cheap and reliable
example.zh: 既便宜又可靠的避孕方法

example.en: Drugs helped to relieve the pain.
example.zh: 药物有助于舒缓疼痛。

example.en: She gave a reluctant smile.
example.zh: 她勉强笑了笑。

example.en: a home remedy (= one that you make at home ) for sore throats
example.zh: 治疗喉咙疼痛的家庭疗法

phrases.zh:
[戏谑语]挪动挪动;走开,离开：

She removed herself reluctantly.
她勉强地走开了。

example.en: a cleaner that will remove wine stains
example.zh: 可去除葡萄酒酒渍的清洁剂

example.en: an obligation to render assistance to those in need
example.zh: 为有困难的人提供援助的义务

example.en: Local people have renewed their efforts to save the school.
example.zh: 当地居民再一次作出努力，挽救这所学校。

example.en: Therefore, lots of pavements need to repair in large. scale even repave wholly after using a long time, which will bring large numbers of waste asphalt mixture.
example.zh: 因此，沥青路面使用一定年限后必须进行大面积的维修，甚至全路段铣刨，重新铺筑。

example.en: I’m replacing Sue on the team.
example.zh: 我将接替队里的休。

example.en: Mr Kobayashi was chosen to represent the company at the conference.
example.zh: 小林先生被选中代表公司出席会议。

example.en: a union representative
example.zh: 工会代表

example.en: Alice Munro has a reputation for being a very depressing writer.
example.zh: 艾丽斯•门罗有文风抑郁的名声。

example.en: France had agreed to his request for political asylum.
example.zh: 法国已经同意了他政治避难的请求。

example.en: Campbell’s broken leg will probably require surgery.
example.zh: 坎贝尔的一条腿骨折，可能需要手术。

example.en: Survivors of the crash were rescued by helicopter.
example.zh: 空难的生还者被直升机救了出来。

example.en: a dinner reservation
example.zh: 预订晚餐

example.en: As one local resident put it in May, "By day there is government.
example.zh: 正如一位当地居民在五月份对它的描述”白天有政府。

example.en: A hospital administrator has resigned over claims he lied to get the job.
example.zh: 一位医院主管因为有人声称他的职位是骗来的而辞职了。

phrases.zh: 人见人爱；无法抗拒；惹人喜爱

example.en: He resisted pressure to resign.
example.zh: 他顶住压力，没辞职。

example.en: Barnet was desperate for money to resolve his financial problems.
example.zh: 巴尼特急需钱来解决他的经济问题。

example.en: They listened in respectful silence.
example.zh: 他们毕恭毕敬地静听。

example.en: Kelly’s promotion means more money and more responsibility.
example.zh: 凯利获得提升，这意味着钱多了，责任也更大了。

example.en: We are determined to bring the people responsible to justice.
example.zh: 我们决意要将肇事者绳之以法。

example.en: I have to restock the freezer.
example.zh: 我得补充冷冻柜里的东西了。

example.en: She was hoping that the Mediterranean climate would restore her to full health.
example.zh: 她希望地中海的气候能使她的身体完全复原。

example.en: The new law restricts the sale of hand guns.
example.zh: 新法规限制手枪的销售。

phrases.zh: 限制酶，限制性内切核酸酶

example.en: a 50 mph speed restriction
example.zh: 每小时50英里的限速

example.en: a retail price of £8.99
example.zh: 8.99英镑的零售价

phrases.zh: 显示全部（计算机操作命令）

example.en: He may be prosecuted for revealing secrets about the security agency.
example.zh: 他可能因泄露安全部门的机密而被起诉。

example.en: The attackers were said to be taking revenge on the 14-year-old, claiming he was a school bully.
example.zh: 攻击者被称是在报复一名14岁男孩，称他是学校一霸。

example.en: advertising revenue
example.zh: 广告收入

phrases.zh: adv. 相反，向相反方向，倒（退），逆（行、转等）

example.en: I owe you nothing. If anything, the reverse is true (= you owe me ) .
example.zh: 我不欠你什么。 如果说欠的话，是你欠我才对。

example.en: The college has revised its plans because of local objections.
example.zh: 由于地方上的反对，学院已经修改了计划。

example.en: the French Revolution of 1789
example.zh: 1789年法国大革命

phrases.zh: 作为…的报酬；作为…的回报

example.en: The school has a system of rewards and punishments to encourage good behaviour.
example.zh: 学校有奖惩制度以鼓励良好行为。

example.en: Their riotous behaviour led to their arrest.
example.zh: 他们因暴乱行为被捕。

phrases.zh: n. 火箭发动机；火箭引擎
火箭发射装置，火箭发射器；火箭筒，火箭发射车

example.en: The rocket was launched from a space research base.
example.zh: 火箭从一个太空研究基地发射升空。

example.en: This vaccine is already routinely used.
example.zh: 这种疫苗的使用已经常规化。

phrases.zh: 圣路易斯（美国的港口城市）；圣路易斯河

example.en: Saint Patrick
example.zh: 圣帕特里克

example.en: We’ll save a lot of time if we go by car.
example.zh: 我们要是开车去，可以节省很多时间。

phrases.zh: adv. 按时；按照预定时间

example.en: How can he fit everything into his busy schedule ?
example.zh: 他是怎么把所有的事情都排进自己忙碌的时间表的？

example.en: He got a scholarship to the Pratt Institute of Art.
example.zh: 他得到了一笔普拉特艺术学院的奖学金。

example.en: measures to limit the scope of criminals’ activities
example.zh: 限制罪犯活动范围的措施

phrases.zh: 从头开始；白手起家；从起跑线开始

example.en: There were deep scratches all over her face.
example.zh: 她脸上全是深深的伤痕。

example.en: All women over 50 will be regularly screened.
example.zh: 所有50岁以上女性都将定期接受检查。

example.en: Troops were sent to secure the border.
example.zh: 军队被派去保卫边境。

phrases.zh:
极难得,简直不,几乎不：

He seldom or never drinks.
他简直可以说滴酒不沾。

example.en: Karen had seldom seen him so angry.
example.zh: 卡伦很少见他这么生气过。

phrases.zh: 自然选择；[生]物竞天择说
厂址选择；基地选择；位置选择

example.en: The judges have made their final selection.
example.zh: 评委已经作出最后的评选。

example.en: selective schools
example.zh: 择优录取学生的学校

example.en: How can you be so selfish?
example.zh: 你怎能这样自私？

example.en: a very sensitive child
example.zh: 一个很敏感的小孩

example.en: Cook each vegetable separately until just tender.
example.zh: 把每样蔬菜单独烹煮，直到煮软就行了。

phrases.zh: 练习课；培训课程；训练项目

example.en: Board members met in closed session (= with nobody else present ) .
example.zh: 委员会成员举行了闭门会议。

phrases.zh: 严重急性呼吸系统综合症

example.en: His injuries were quite severe.
example.zh: 他的伤势很严重。

phrases.zh: 耐冲击性；耐震强度；耐冲辉；冲昏力

example.en: The hatred in her voice shocked him.
example.zh: 她语气中的仇恨让他震惊。

example.en: I tried to take a shortcut and got lost.
example.zh: 我试着走近路，结果迷路了。

example.en: Michael has influenced so many artists, some of whom are picking up on the grandeur and showmanship of his live performances.
example.zh: 迈克尔影响了众多艺术家，他们中的有些人在演出上的火爆与高超本领上正得自他的绝技。

phrases.zh: 观光巴士；游览巴士；旅游客车

example.en: She swam and sunbathed, went sightseeing and relaxed.
example.zh: 她游泳，晒日光浴，观光，放松。

example.en: At a prearranged signal the lights went out.
example.zh: 预定的信号一发出，灯就全灭了。

example.en: His most significant political achievement was the abolition of the death penalty.
example.zh: 他政治上最重大的成就是废除了死刑。

phrases.zh: 相似图形；相似形（similar figure的复数）

example.en: We have similar tastes in music.
example.zh: 我们对音乐的品位相近。

example.en: Mona wrote with a beautiful simplicity of style.
example.zh: 莫娜的文笔朴实优美。

example.en: an archaeological site
example.zh: 考古现场

example.en: I explained the situation to everyone.
example.zh: 我向大家介绍了一下情况。

example.en: The trade deficit has skyrocketed.
example.zh: 贸易逆差已经急剧增长。

example.en: a slave to fashion
example.zh: 时尚的奴隶

example.en: ...an open meeting, where members socialized and welcomed any new members.
example.zh: …让会员们相互交流、欢迎所有新成员的一次公开集会。

phrases.zh: 在不断变化中；动摇不定；在溶解状态中

example.en: The best solution would be for them to separate.
example.zh: 最好的解决方法是他们分开。

example.en: Have you got any spare boxes?
example.zh: 你有没有多余的盒子？

phrases.zh: 比表面；比表面积；表面系数

example.en: games suitable for specific age groups
example.zh: 适合特定年龄组的游戏

example.en: Payments will be made for a specified number of months.
example.zh: 款项将在规定的几个月内支付。

example.en: Dozens of companies, including Hewlett-Packard, are sponsoring the event.
example.zh: 包括惠普在内的许多公司都在赞助这项赛事。

example.en: The crowd gave a spontaneous cheer.
example.zh: 人群自发地欢呼起来。

example.en: The industrial revolution, which started a couple of hundred years ago in Europe, is now spreading across the world.
example.zh: 几百年前始于欧洲的工业革命现在正向全世界扩散。

example.en: Attempts to standardize English spelling have never been successful.
example.zh: 统一英语拼写的尝试从未成功过。

example.en: Sorry, I didn’t mean to startle you.
example.zh: 抱歉，我不是故意吓你一跳的。

example.en: Paul is making steady progress.
example.zh: 保罗逐渐在进步。

phrases.zh: （感情等）渐渐控制…；渐渐弥漫；悄悄地呈现；不知不觉地袭来

example.en: Boys broke into a shop and stole £45 in cash.
example.zh: 男孩们闯进一家商店，盗走了45英镑现金。

example.en: He was steering with only one hand.
example.zh: 他只用一只手在驾驶。

example.en: There's always been a stereotype about successful businessmen.
example.zh: 对成功的商人们总有一种成见。

example.en: Her interest in art was stimulated by her father.
example.zh: 她对艺术的兴趣是她父亲激发的。

phrases.zh: 股票市场；证券市场；股票交易

example.en: the trading of stocks and shares
example.zh: 股票交易

example.en: the government’s long-term economic strategy
example.zh: 政府的长期经济策略

translations.text: 充满著压力的，充满著紧张的

example.en: Moving to a new house is a very stressful experience.
example.zh: 搬新家是件很劳心的事。

example.en: Your headaches are due to stress.
example.zh: 你的头痛是压力造成的。

phrases.zh: 严格责任；严格赔偿责任

example.en: a strict teacher
example.zh: 严格的老师

example.en: challenges to the existing power structure
example.zh: 对现有权力结构的挑战

example.en: They had to struggle against all kinds of adversity.
example.zh: 他们不得不同各种困境斗争。

example.en: Around the world, governments have subsidized the housing of middle- and upper-income groups.
example.zh: 全世界各政府都补贴过中高收入人群的住房。

example.en: We have the support of a substantial number of parents.
example.zh: 我们有相当多家长的支持。

example.en: At least he died suddenly and didn’t suffer.
example.zh: 至少他死得突然，没有遭罪。

phrases.zh: 不靠他人，不受他人影响
充要条件；必要且充分的条件

example.en: We can only prosecute if there is sufficient evidence.
example.zh: 有了足够的证据，我们才能提出起诉。

example.en: She had that superior tone of voice.
example.zh: 她带着那种傲慢的语气。

example.en: The baby needs constant supervision.
example.zh: 宝宝时刻都要有人照看。

example.en: There were many more deaths than was first supposed.
example.zh: 死亡人数远远超过最初的预料。

phrases.zh: 上网；上网冲浪；网上冲浪；浏览因特网

example.en: I'm going to buy a surfboard and learn to surf.
example.zh: 我要去买个冲浪板来学冲浪。

phrases.zh: n. 实地调查；实地考察

example.en: Of the 100 companies surveyed, 10% had a turnover of £50 m to £99 m.
example.zh: 被调查的 100 家公司中，10% 的公司营业额在 5,000 万到 9,900 万英镑之间。

example.en: She strongly suspected he was lying to her.
example.zh: 她非常怀疑他在对她撒谎。

example.en: Wants, or desires, are things we would like to have but they do not sustain us.
example.zh: 想法或愿望，是我们想要拥有的东西但是他们不能维持我们的生活。

example.en: The government should do more to promote sustainable agriculture.
example.zh: 政府应该做更多工作来推动可持续农业的发展。

phrases.zh: 泰勒·斯威夫特（乡村女歌手）
n. 乔纳森·斯威夫特（英国政治家及小说家）

example.en: My letter received a swift reply.
example.zh: 我的信很快就得到了回复。

example.en: The terrorists will switch tactics .
example.zh: 恐怖分子会改变战术。

phrases.zh: 奥林匹克标志，奥林匹克五环旗

example.en: The symbol on the packet is a guarantee that the food has been produced organically.
example.zh: 包装盒上的这个标识保证这种食物是有机生产的。

example.en: Our sympathies are with the families of the victims.
example.zh: 我们向受害者家庭表示慰问。

example.en: There is more than one way to tackle the problem.
example.zh: 解决这个问题不止一个办法。

example.en: We can tailor the programme to the patient's needs.
example.zh: 我们可以根据病人的需要调整这个方案。

example.en: What time is takeoff?
example.zh: 起飞时间是什么时候？

example.en: The water tank is leaking.
example.zh: 水箱在漏水。

example.en: The fish was mushy and tasteless.
example.zh: 这鱼烧得烂而无味。

example.en: Our staff will be available to give you technical support .
example.zh: 有我们的员工向你提供技术支持。

example.en: He’s a great player, with brilliant technique.
example.zh: 他是个伟大的球员，球技十分精湛。

example.en: a laboratory technician
example.zh: 实验室技术人员

example.en: The audience coughed down the tedious speaker.
example.zh: 听众用咳嗽声阻挠演讲人的沉闷发言。

example.en: Resist the temptation to buy the item until you’re certain you need it.
example.zh: 要抵挡住购买的诱惑，除非你确有需要。

example.en: The tension was becoming unbearable, and I wanted to scream.
example.zh: 这种紧张变得难以忍受，我真想大声尖叫。

phrases.zh: 大帐篷政策（包容各种不同的政治和社会观点）
帐篷城（搭有很多帐篷的社群的别称）

example.en: We looked for a flat spot where we could pitch our tent (= put up our tent ) .
example.zh: 我们寻找一个平缓的地方搭帐篷。

example.en: I’m terribly sorry to have kept you waiting.
example.zh: 很抱歉，让你久等了。

example.en: new drug therapies
example.zh: 新的药物疗法

example.en: Postal workers are threatening a strike if they don’t receive a pay increase.
example.zh: 邮政工人威胁如果不加薪，他们就要罢工。

example.en: Strong tides make swimming dangerous.
example.zh: 遇上大潮时游泳很危险。

phrases.zh: 加强；使紧密；拉紧；使更牢固

example.en: a tiny community in the Midwest
example.zh: 中西部地区一个极小的社区

phrases.zh: 葡萄糖耐量；葡萄糖耐受性

example.en: ...his tolerance and understanding of diverse human nature.
example.zh: …他对各种人性的宽容和理解。

example.en: I’ve got toothache .
example.zh: 我牙痛。

example.en: We followed the tyre tracks across a muddy field.
example.zh: 我们顺着车辙穿过一块泥泞的田地。

example.en: The bank charges a fixed rate for each transaction.
example.zh: 银行对每一笔业务收取固定费用。

phrases.zh: 质量传递，传质；质量转移

example.en: Ideas that work well in one school often don’t transfer well to another.
example.zh: 在一所学校行得通的理念套用在另一所学校上往往行不通。

phrases.zh: 运输系统；交通物流系统
公共交通，公共运输；公共交通工具
城市交通运输；市区运输

example.en: The city needs to improve its public transportation (= buses, trains etc ) .
example.zh: 这座城市需要改善公共交通。

example.en: Just lately, Kyra has been giving me the silent treatment (= refusing to speak to me because she is angry with me ) .
example.zh: 就在最近，凯拉一直对我不理不睬。

example.en: His lip started to tremble and then he started to cry.
example.zh: 他的嘴唇开始颤抖，接着就哭了起来。

phrases.zh: 胜利地；洋洋得意地；耀武扬威地

example.en: Winning the championship is a great personal triumph .
example.zh: 赢得冠军是伟大的个人成就。

example.en: I had to have extra tuition in maths.
example.zh: 我不得不上数学补习课。

example.en: The tumor will soon be resolved.
example.zh: 这个肿瘤很快就会消掉的。

example.en: Ultimately, the decision rests with the child’s parents.
example.zh: 最终，决定权在这孩子的父母手中。

example.en: You have to become awfully large to be unaffordable -- there's lots of cash, lots of capital out there for acquisitions.
example.zh: 制药业者坐拥很多现金,进行收购的资本雄厚,你必须变成让人买不起的超大公司.

example.en: My whole future now seemed uncertain.
example.zh: 现在我的前途似乎是个未知数。

example.en: The continued fighting threatens to undermine efforts to negotiate an agreement.
example.zh: 持续的战斗有可能破坏通过谈判达成协议的努力。

phrases.zh: 唯一机会；极难得的机会

example.en: a unique opportunity to study these rare creatures
example.zh: 研究这些珍稀动物的难得机会

translations.text: 普遍的，宇宙的，全世界的

example.en: free universal healthcare
example.zh: 免费的全民保健制度

example.en: Mike had had a strict upbringing.
example.zh: 迈克从小家教很严。

example.en: The files need updating.
example.zh: 这些档案需要更新。

example.en: a valid credit card
example.zh: 有效信用卡

example.en: Shelley valued her privacy.
example.zh: 谢利很重视自己的隐私。

example.en: My keys were here a minute ago but now they’ve vanished.
example.zh: 我的钥匙刚刚还在这里，现在却不翼而飞了。

phrases.zh: 货品种类，产品种类；产品多样化；积簇

example.en: The girls come from a variety of different backgrounds.
example.zh: 这些女孩出身背景各不相同。

example.en: a description of the stolen vehicle
example.zh: 对被盗车辆的描述

example.en: the human version of mad cow disease
example.zh: 疯牛病的人类变体

phrases.zh: 在视野范围内；在考虑中的；作为目标

example.en: an opportunity to view the film before it goes on general release
example.zh: 在影片公映之前观影的机会

example.en: 34 protesters were arrested for violating criminal law.
example.zh: 34名抗议者因违反刑法而被逮捕。

example.en: Virtually all the children come to school by bus.
example.zh: 几乎所有的孩子都乘公交车上学。

phrases.zh: 乙型肝炎病毒；[病毒学]B型肝炎病毒

example.en: children infected with the Aids virus
example.zh: 感染艾滋病病毒的儿童

phrases.zh: 不良能见度；能见度不良；较差能见度

example.en: Visibility on the roads is down to 20 metres due to heavy fog.
example.zh: 道路能见度因浓雾降至20米。

example.en: The comet is visible to the naked eye (= can be seen without using special equipment ).
example.zh: 这颗彗星肉眼看得见。

example.en: The work she does is absolutely vital.
example.zh: 她所做的工作至关重要。

example.en: Teachers were impressed by his vocabulary.
example.zh: 他的词汇量给老师们留下了深刻的印象。

example.en: In 1918 British women got the right to vote.
example.zh: 1918年，英国妇女获得了选举权。

example.en: a wise precaution
example.zh: 明智的预防措施

example.en: Police have appealed for witnesses to come forward.
example.zh: 警方呼吁目击者站出来。

example.en: A lot of teachers expect the situation to worsen over the next few years.
example.zh: 许多老师认为接下来的几年情形会更糟。

example.en: He wanted to do a worthwhile job.
example.zh: 他想做有意义的工作。

phrases.zh: 屈服强度；屈变力；抗屈强度

example.en: Our research has only recently begun to yield important results.
example.zh: 直到最近我们的研究才开始取得重要成果。

example.en: We offer our customers a comprehensive range of financial products.
example.zh: 我们为客户提供全面的金融产品。

example.en: synthetic chemicals
example.zh: 合成化学品

example.en: The country has undergone massive changes recently.
example.zh: 这个国家最近经历了巨大的变化。

phrases.zh: 公平竞争；公平比赛；平等对待

example.en: a horse fair
example.zh: 马市

example.en: A smell of bread drifted from some distant bakery.
example.zh: 一股面包的味道从远处的某个面包店飘来。

phrases.zh: 赤鱲角（俗称赤腊角，香港西部海域的一个岛屿）

example.en: They brought the piano sideways through the front door.
example.zh: 他们把钢琴侧着从前门抬进来。

example.en: He swallowed the last of his coffee and asked for the bill.
example.zh: 他喝完最后一口咖啡，要求结账。

phrases.zh: 耐久性试验；施工测量；寿命试验；疲劳试验
化学稳定性；化学耐久性

example.en: A: Why do we have to do durability test?
example.zh: 我们为什么要做耐久性测试?

example.en: Crime often symbolizes a wider social problem.
example.zh: 犯罪问题往往反映出更广泛的社会问题。

phrases.zh: 开天辟地以来，自古以来

example.en: everlasting fame
example.zh: 永久的名声

phrases.zh: 举行婚礼的日子；结婚纪念日

example.en: She’s busy planning her daughter’s wedding.
example.zh: 她正忙着筹备女儿的婚礼。

phrases.zh: 超额生产能力；过剩设备

example.en: After you apply the oil, wait 20 minutes before wiping off any excess.
example.zh: 涂上油以后，等20分钟再擦掉多余部分。

phrases.zh: （类的）实例；（某类别的） 实体

example.en: We need to rethink the way we consume energy. Take, for instance, our approach to transport.
example.zh: 我们需要重新考虑我们使用能源的方式，例如我们的运输方式。

example.en: His family then moved to a slightly larger house.
example.zh: 他的家后来搬到了一间稍微大一点儿的房子。

example.en: He undertook to pay the money back in six months.
example.zh: 他保证在六个月之内还钱。

phrases.zh: 对…感到生气不满；对…皱眉

example.en: She frowned as she read the letter.
example.zh: 她看着信皱起了眉头。

example.en: Rural medics get an average stipend of $65 a year, leading some to overcharge their patients.
example.zh: 这些医生每年仅得到65美元，这导致他们向病人高收费。

phrases.zh: 坐标制；方格网制；电力网

example.en: the national grid
example.zh: 国家电网

phrases.zh: 在……方面变化；在……方面有差异

example.en: Test scores vary from school to school.
example.zh: 测验成绩各校不同。

phrases.zh: 进化心理学；演化心理學

example.en: the evolutionary development of birds
example.zh: 鸟类的进化过程

example.en: a clinical psychologist
example.zh: 临床心理学家

example.en: Germany brought on a substitute at half time.
example.zh: 德国队在比赛半场时换上一名替补队员。

example.en: Federal funds have to be used as dictated by Washington.
example.zh: 联邦款项得按照华盛顿规定的途径使用。

example.en: Months are a conventional subdivision of the year.
