example.zh: 月份是年的常规分支。

phrases.zh: 实用新型（约十个国家法律承认的一种保护发明名称，期限五年）
公用设施；公用事业公司

example.en: Does your rent include utilities?
example.zh: 你的房租包括公用事业费吗？

phrases.zh: 在…支配之下;在…影响下[亦作under someone's sway]

example.en: Don’t allow yourself to be swayed by his promises.
example.zh: 你可不要听了他的许诺就改变主意呀。

example.en: the human reproductive system
example.zh: 人类生殖系统

example.en: A full day’s teaching exhausts me.
example.zh: 讲一整天课令我精疲力竭。

phrases.zh: 国内需求；本地内部需求

example.en: ...over 100 domestic flights a day to 30 leading U.S. destinations.
example.zh: …每天飞往美国30个主要目的地的100多个国内航班。

example.en: Sylvia fetched a towel from the bathroom.
example.zh: 西尔维娅从浴室拿来一条毛巾。

example.en: One solution is to retrain the long-term unemployed.
example.zh: 一个解决办法是对长期失业的人进行再培训。

example.en: the biological functions of the body
example.zh: 人体的生物机能

phrases.zh: 美感，审美观念；审美知觉

example.en: And when they do, what do you think their perception will be?
example.zh: 当他们这样做时，你觉得他们的知觉是怎样的？

example.en: Only 27% of the paper we consume is recycled.
example.zh: 我们消耗的纸张只有 27% 得到回收利用。

example.en: Scholarships are given solely on the basis of financial need.
example.zh: 奖学金完全是根据经济需要发放的。

phrases.zh: 动态特性；负载特性曲线

example.en: Genes determine the characteristics of every living thing.
example.zh: 基因决定每个生物的特征。

phrases.zh: 复合结构；复结构；复数结构

example.en: a complex system of highways
example.zh: 复杂的公路网

example.en: His immediate response was one of disbelief.
example.zh: 他的第一反应是不相信。

example.en: Immediately his heart rate (= the number of beats per minute ) increased.
example.zh: 他的心率立即加快了。

phrases.zh: 固体废物，固态废物；固体废料，固体垃圾

example.en: The lake was frozen solid .
example.zh: 湖水冻得结结实实。

example.en: The prosecution wanted more time to prepare their case.
example.zh: 原告想要有更多的时间来准备诉讼。

example.en: an unwilling helper
example.zh: 勉强来帮忙的人

phrases.zh: 成熟期；产品生命成熟期

example.en: Laura is very mature for her age .
example.zh: 相对她的年龄来说劳拉是很成熟的。

phrases.zh: 赶上最后期限；按期完成

example.en: I’m always working under pressure to meet deadlines (= finish something on time ) .
example.zh: 我总是在赶工期的压力下工作。

example.en: She took early retirement (= retired at an earlier age than usual ) last year.
example.zh: 她去年提前退休了。

example.en: The city offers an appealing combination of sporting and cultural events.
example.zh: 这座城市集体育活动和文化活动于一身，颇具吸引力。

example.en: She was barely aware of his presence.
example.zh: 她几乎没有注意到他的存在。

example.en: The pain was almost unbearable.
example.zh: 那疼痛几乎难以忍受。

phrases.zh: 乱葬冈；集体埋葬的墓地

example.en: At the head of the grave there was a small wooden cross.
example.zh: 坟头上有一个小小的木十字架。

example.en: They are called ‘Supertrams’, the implication being that (= which is meant to suggest that ) they are more advanced than earlier models.
example.zh: 它们被称作“超级电车”，这是暗指它们比先前的型号更先进。

example.en: Could we have the menu, please?
example.zh: 请把菜单给我们，好吗？

phrases.zh: 从…角度来看；从…立场来看

example.en: a discussion of marriage from the standpoint of women
example.zh: 从女性角度对婚姻的探讨

example.en: Children have a strong sense of justice.
example.zh: 儿童有很强的正义感。

phrases.zh: 平均寿命；预期寿命（等于life expectancy）

example.en: Having raised expectations (= made people more hopeful ), he went on to help only a few people.
example.zh: 他唤起了大家的希望，但接着只是帮助了几个人。

example.en: This business plan looks very professional.
example.zh: 这个商业计划看上去很有专业水平。

example.en: Workers are being encouraged to take voluntary redundancy.
example.zh: 工人被鼓励主动离职。

example.en: In each of these cases, one of the models evolved independently of the other.
example.zh: 在这里的每种情况下，其中一个模型独立于另一个模型而发展。

phrases.zh: n. 七巧板；智力拼图玩具

example.en: a puzzling fact
example.zh: 令人费解的情况

example.en: Suddenly, there was a tremendous bang, and the whole station shook.
example.zh: 突然一声巨响，整个车站都晃动了。

phrases.zh: 应变速率；应变率；变形速度
◎使劲拉某物；使劲做某事；努力争取

example.en: I’ve strained a muscle in my leg.
example.zh: 我的腿有一处肌肉拉伤。

example.en: ...an exhibition of expressionist art.
example.zh: …一场印象主义艺术展览会。

example.en: an exhibition of African art at the Hayward Gallery
example.zh: 海沃德美术馆的非洲艺术展览

example.en: You should be able to evaluate your own work.
example.zh: 你应该能够评估自己的工作。

example.en: All the furniture was covered in dust .
example.zh: 所有的家具都蒙上了灰尘。

example.en: Children under 14 must be accompanied by an adult.
example.zh: 14岁以下儿童必须有成人陪同。

example.en: They submitted their reports to the chancellor yesterday.
example.zh: 他们昨天向财政大臣提交了他们的报告。

phrases.zh: 气候恶劣；非常糟糕的天气

example.en: The weather was awful.
example.zh: 天气很糟糕。

example.en: John and I sat up until the early hours chatting.
example.zh: 我和约翰聊到凌晨才睡。

example.en: This tragic incident underlines the need for immediate action.
example.zh: 这一悲剧事件突显了立即采取行动的必要性。

example.en: The doctors gave him a one in ten chance of survival .
example.zh: 医生说他有十分之一的生存希望。

example.en: dishonest traders
example.zh: 奸商

phrases.zh: 玩忽职守；[法]失职；过失责任

example.en: She smoked and drank, neglected the children, and left the clothes unmended.
example.zh: 她抽烟喝酒，既不照顾孩子，也不缝补衣服。

phrases.zh: n. 无主珍宝，无主埋藏物

example.en: Jim treasured the gold pocket watch that his grandfather had given him.
example.zh: 吉姆十分珍爱祖父送给他的金怀表。

example.en: a rigorous analysis of defence needs
example.zh: 对国防需求的缜密分析

example.en: If the answer is no, you really need to get some professional counseling to determine if this marriage should be saved.
example.zh: 如果回答是否定的，你就真的该去咨询一下专家，决定一下你是否改维持这段婚姻了。

example.en: A competent mechanic should be able to fix the problem.
example.zh: 一名合格的机修工应该能够解决这个问题。

phrases.zh: n. 神曲（意大利诗人但丁作的叙事诗）

example.en: divine power
example.zh: 神的力量

example.en: The test was to assess aptitude rather than academic achievement.
example.zh: 该测试将评估能力而不是学业成绩。

example.en: This has caused us to reassess the way we approach our planning.
example.zh: 这件事让我们重新审视了我们的规划方式。

example.en: a rude remark
example.zh: 粗鲁的话

phrases.zh: [美国口语]勇敢地承受；坚持到底

example.en: It was a tough race.
example.zh: 比赛打得很艰难。

example.en: Ministers must appear before Parliament and justify their actions.
example.zh: 大臣们必须就自己的行为向议会作出解释。

example.en: persistent rumours
example.zh: 持续流传的谣言

example.en: He had surpassed all our expectations .
example.zh: 他超越了我们所有的预期。

phrases.zh: 囚徒困境，囚徒困境悖论
道德上的左右为难；道德两难处境；伦理两难

example.en: a moral dilemma
example.zh: 道德上进退两难的窘境

example.en: a useful technique for generating new ideas
example.zh: 能产生新创意的有用技术

example.en: Our primary concern is to provide the refugees with food and health care.
example.zh: 我们的头等大事是向难民提供食品和医疗。

example.en: A sensible diet is vitally important if you want to remain in good health.
example.zh: 如想保持健康，合理的饮食十分重要。

example.en: People might well confuse the two products.
example.zh: 人们很容易混淆这两种产品。

example.en: How could you reframe them?
example.zh: 你将如何重新定义它们？

phrases.zh: 调查，查询；对…的调查；询问

example.en: I don’t know who sent the gift, but I’ll make some inquiries.
example.zh: 我不知道礼物是谁送的，但我会打听一下。

example.en: They went into town with the intention of visiting the library.
example.zh: 他们进了城，打算参观图书馆。

example.en: Is the engine running smoothly?
example.zh: 发动机运转平稳吗？

phrases.zh: 特别的时刻；特别的场合

example.en: I often think fondly of an occasion some years ago in New Orleans.
example.zh: 我经常深情地想起一些年前在新奥尔良所发生的一幕。

example.en: The new rocket was extensively tested and debugged by the army.
example.zh: 这种新式火箭由军方进行了广泛的测试和调试。

example.en: He writes a weekly column for ‘The Times’.
example.zh: 他每周为《泰晤士报》写一篇专栏文章。

phrases.zh: 溶解成；消散在…中；因心软而…

example.en: It was warmer now, and the snow was beginning to melt.
example.zh: 现在天气暖和了，雪开始融化。

example.en: She seems very sensible.
example.zh: 她好像很明智。

phrases.zh: 原发性高血压；特发性高血压

example.en: Window locks are fairly cheap and absolutely essential.
example.zh: 窗锁相当便宜，绝对有必要安装。

example.en: Charlie thinks money will solve all his problems.
example.zh: 查理认为钱能解决他所有的问题。

example.en: Suddenly he seized my hand.
example.zh: 他突然抓住我的手。

phrases.zh: 没有别的办法了；没有其他选择

example.en: New ways to treat arthritis may provide an alternative to painkillers.
example.zh: 治疗关节炎的新方法可能会提供一种止痛药的替代品。

example.en: a time of economic prosperity
example.zh: 经济繁荣时期

phrases.zh: 节约用水，水源保护；水利

example.en: wildlife conservation
example.zh: 野生生物保护

phrases.zh: n. 灾难性的急剧下滑

example.en: In places, the path can be wet and slippery.
example.zh: 路上有些地方可能又湿又滑。

example.en: {"COLLOINEXA":["weapons of mass destruction"]}
example.zh: 大规模杀伤性武器

example.en: We must encourage the planting of new trees and preserve our existing woodlands.
example.zh: 我们必须鼓励栽种新树木，同时也要保护现有的林地。

phrases.zh: [计]抽象类（不允许实例化的类）

example.en: By the age of seven, children are capable of thinking in abstract terms .
example.zh: 儿童到了七岁就具有抽象思维的能力。

example.en: Twenty years after the event, his death remains a mystery .
example.zh: 事情过去二十年了，他的死仍然是个谜。

example.en: Car makers are constantly refining their designs.
example.zh: 汽车制造商在不断完善他们的设计。

example.en: The following quotation is taken from a nineteenth century travel diary.
example.zh: 下文引自19世纪的一篇旅行日记。

phrases.zh: v. 起作用于；对…有影响

example.en: He reacted angrily to the suggestion that he had lied.
example.zh: 说他撒谎，他非常生气。

example.en: Our old car is badly in need of replacement.
example.zh: 我们的旧车急需更换。

example.en: Most computer users have never received any formal keyboard training. Consequently, their keyboard skills are inefficient.
example.zh: 大多数的电脑使用者都没有经过正规的键盘操作训练，因此他们的键盘技巧不够熟练。

example.en: Her temperature soared.
example.zh: 她的体温骤然升高。

example.en: ...the factors that incline us toward particular beliefs.
example.zh: …使我们倾向于特定信念的种种因素。

example.en: We have made some minor changes to the program.
example.zh: 我们对那个程序做了一些小改动。

phrases.zh: 哎呀！天哪！（表示诧异， 吃惊， 恐惧的感叹语）

example.en: Every change in our lives brings with it griefs.
example.zh: 我们生活当中的每一个变化都有让人伤心的一面。

example.en: The new airport will facilitate the development of tourism.
example.zh: 新机场将促进旅游业的发展。

example.en: an attempt to simplify the tax system
example.zh: 简化税制的尝试

phrases.zh: 民事诉讼；民事诉讼法；民事诉讼程序

example.en: On board, we were given the usual talk on safety procedures (= what to do if an accident happens, or to prevent an accident ) .
example.zh: 在飞机上，我们听了例行的飞行安全讲解。

example.en: He said the protesters were doing a disservice to the nation.
example.zh: 他表示，抗议者们的行为正对国家造成危害。

example.en: Homelessness is not a new phenomenon .
example.zh: 无家可归已不是什么新现象。

example.en: Smoking during pregnancy endangers your baby’s life.
example.zh: 孕期吸烟会危及胎儿生命。

example.en: There is overwhelming evidence that smoking damages your health.
example.zh: 有难以辩驳的证据表明吸烟有损健康。

example.en: So far the ceasefire has been observed by both sides.
example.zh: 到目前为止，双方都遵守着停火协定。

example.en: The town provides a wide choice of entertainment.
example.zh: 该镇提供各式各样的娱乐活动。

example.en: Andrew took a more optimistic view.
example.zh: 安德鲁抱有更为乐观的想法。

example.en: his courage in the face of adversity
example.zh: 他面对逆境的勇气

example.en: In addition, they will also misguide the innocent, which becomes a vicious circle.
example.zh: 此外，他们将误导那些思想单纯的人，这将导致一个恶心循环。

example.en: an energetic man
example.zh: 精力旺盛的男子

example.en: ...the unintended consequences of human action.
example.zh: ...人类行为无心的结果。

example.en: I’ve worked with children in various settings, mainly in secondary school.
example.zh: 我在许多地方教过孩子，主要是在中学。

example.en: a tempting job offer
example.zh: 一个诱人的工作机会

phrases.zh: 供电中断，电源中断；从电中断

example.en: For tasks that execute code in a loop, it is common to check for interruption only once per loop iteration.
example.zh: 对于执行一个循环中的代码的任务，通常只需为每一个循环迭代检查一次中断。

phrases.zh: 须医师处方才可买的药品

example.en: We are trying to cut the price of prescription drugs .
example.zh: 我们正努力降低处方药的价格。

example.en: It’s a paradox that in such a rich country there can be so much poverty.
example.zh: 在如此富有的国家却有这么多的贫穷现象，真是矛盾。

example.en: Three students were mentioned, namely John, Sarah and Sylvia.
example.zh: 有三名学生被提到，即约翰、萨拉和西尔维娅。

example.en: This is undoubtedly important.
example.zh: 这无疑是重要的。

example.en: a rock band with a distinctive sound
example.zh: 音色独特的摇滚乐队

example.en: The rebels retreated to the mountains.
example.zh: 叛乱分子撤退到山区。

translations.text: 使具有权利，使具有资格

example.en: If the warranty is limited, the terms may entitle you to a replacement or refund.
example.zh: 如果保修单有限制，这些条款可让你有权换货或退款。

translations.text: 大惊小怪的，小题大做的

example.en: A lot of small children are fussy eaters (= they dislike many types of food ) .
example.zh: 许多小孩子挑食。

example.en: I was a short-order cook and a dishwasher.
example.zh: 我曾是一名快餐厨师兼洗碗工。

example.en: Members of the council agreed that was an important forum for discussion.
example.zh: 理事会成员们一致认为那是一个用于讨论的重要论坛。

example.en: Unemployment can cause feelings of inadequacy and low self-esteem.
example.zh: 失业会使人缺乏自信，产生自卑感。

example.en: a hotel lobby
example.zh: 宾馆大堂

example.en: Our agent in Rio deals with all our Brazilian business.
example.zh: 我们在里约热内卢的业务代表处理我们在巴西的全部业务。

example.en: Her arguments didn’t convince everyone, but changes were made.
example.zh: 她的论点不能说服每个人，但还是引起了一些变化。

phrases.zh: 战略柔性，战略弹性；策略灵活性

example.en: Employees expect flexibility in the workplace.
example.zh: 员工们盼望工作安排有弹性。

example.en: a plastic spoon
example.zh: 塑料汤匙

example.en: They removed the picture from its wooden frame.
example.zh: 他们把画从木镜框中取下来。

example.en: One more thing, remind me to get some kind of groundsheet or we'll end up getting filthy.
example.zh: 还有一件事，记得提醒我带一些防潮布之类的东西，否则我们结束的时候会一片狼籍。

example.en: User community and geographic distribution of users.
example.zh: 用户社区和用户的地理分布。

example.en: Diplomatic efforts to end the fighting began on October 25.
example.zh: 停战的外交努力于10月25日开始。

example.en: He trusted in his judgement.
example.zh: 他相信他的判断。

example.en: Morris has a private jet.
example.zh: 莫里斯拥有一架私人喷气式飞机。

example.en: Come over to the fire and cozy up a bit.
example.zh: 到火炉这边来会感到舒适一点。

example.en: ...a steel mill.
example.zh: …一家钢厂。

example.en: The new test should enable doctors to detect the disease early.
example.zh: 新的检验使医生能在早期发现该种疾病。

example.en: the laborious business of drying the crops
example.zh: 把收获的庄稼晒干这一艰苦的工作

example.en: Throughout the house, the views are a constant source of surprise and delight.
example.zh: 整个房子，目之所及不停带来惊奇和欣喜。

example.en: A structural survey revealed the full scale of the damage.
example.zh: 结构检验揭示了实际受损程度。

example.en: I don’t find his jokes at all amusing .
example.zh: 我觉得他的笑话一点都不好笑。

example.en: Her face distorted in panic.
example.zh: 她的脸因恐慌而变相了。

example.en: The painful memories eventually faded from her consciousness.
example.zh: 那些痛苦的回忆最终从她的意识中淡去了。

example.en: statistics for earnings by different age groups
Guests toasted the bride and groom with champagne.
example.zh: 客人们以香槟为新娘新郎敬酒。

example.en: He has been absent from his desk for two weeks.
example.zh: 他已经两个星期没来了。

example.en: Try making a note of the things that annoy you.
example.zh: 试着把让你心烦的事记下来。

phrases.zh: 坚持，坚决要求；督促，强调

example.en: Stay for supper – I insist!
example.zh: 留下来吃晚餐——一定的！

example.en: He took the pen between his thumb and forefinger.
example.zh: 他用拇指和食指夹起笔。

example.en: She bowed and left the stage.
example.zh: 她鞠了一躬，离开了舞台。

phrases.zh: 做手势，表示；做一个手势

example.en: Luke made an obscene gesture with his finger.
example.zh: 卢克用手指做了一个下流的手势。

example.en: There was about 300 million tons of grain in the fields at the start of the harvest.
example.zh: 收割伊始田间大约有三亿吨的谷物。

phrases.zh: 偷盗习惯；小偷小摸的人

example.en: There’s some sticky stuff in your hair.
example.zh: 你的头发上有什么黏糊糊的东西。

example.en: disease resistance
example.zh: 抗病能力

example.en: Is it possible to multiply bacteria in the laboratory?
example.zh: 有可能在实验室繁殖细菌吗?

phrases.zh: 粒径；颗粒直径，粒子直径

example.en: dust particles
example.zh: 尘埃

example.en: The toothbrush gently removes plaque without damaging the gums or causing bleeding.
example.zh: 牙刷轻轻地刷去齿菌斑，没有伤及牙床或引起出血。

example.en: It’s amazing how closely Brian and Steve resemble each other.
example.zh: 布赖恩和史蒂夫真是惊人地相像。

phrases.zh: 无影无踪地；渺无踪迹地

example.en: There was no trace of anyone having entered the room since then.
example.zh: 没有任何迹象表明在那以后有人进过这房间。

example.en: laws to prevent discrimination
example.zh: 防止歧视的法律

example.en: Life just seemed pointless to me.
example.zh: 生活对我来说简直没什么意义。

example.en: Video rental is usually £3.
example.zh: 录像带的租金通常是3英镑。

example.en: People have become indifferent to the suffering of others.
example.zh: 人们已经变得对别人的痛苦漠不关心。

phrases.zh: 仔细考虑，思考；反省；回想，回顾；怀疑

example.en: The drop in consumer spending reflects concern about the economy.
example.zh: 消费支出的下降反映出人们对经济的担忧。

phrases.zh: 妇女解放运动，女权运动

example.en: They pant after liberation.
example.zh: 他们渴望解放。

phrases.zh: 出售选择权；卖出选择权；卖出期权

example.en: There are a number of options available.
example.zh: 有多种选择。

example.en: Stan initially wanted to go to medical school.
example.zh: 斯坦最初想进医学院。

example.en: Women tend to attribute their success to external causes such as luck.
example.zh: 女性往往把她们的成功归因于外因，如运气。

example.en: measures to accelerate the rate of economic growth
example.zh: 加快经济增长速度的措施

example.en: Because the earth spins, it is not a perfect sphere.
example.zh: 因为地球旋转，所以它不是个完完全全的球体。

example.en: the widespread use of chemicals in agriculture
example.zh: 化学品在农业中的广泛使用

example.en: Increased population has transformed the landscape.
example.zh: 人口的增加使景观发生了变化。

example.en: The refugee problem has now reached immeasurable proportions.
example.zh: 难民问题现在已经到了无法估量的程度。

example.en: Drinking water supplies are believed to have been contaminated.
example.zh: 据信饮用水已受到污染。

phrases.zh: 北领地，北部领地；北部地方

example.en: Hong Kong is a Chinese territory.
example.zh: 香港是中国的领土。

example.en: The website allows you to take a virtual tour of the art gallery.
example.zh: 这个网站可让你对美术馆作一番虚拟参观。

example.en: It invariably rains when I go there.
example.zh: 我每次去那儿都下雨。

phrases.zh: adj. 长期的（持久的）；长时间；好久好久

example.en: How long will it take to get there?
example.zh: 到那里去要多长时间？

phrases.zh: 社会福利；社会福利工作（等于social work）
公共福利，公用福利设施；社会福利

example.en: Our only concern is the children’s welfare.
example.zh: 我们唯一关心的是孩子们的幸福。

example.en: Gradually her anxiety lessened.
example.zh: 她的焦虑慢慢减轻了。

example.en: There is growing unrest throughout the country.
example.zh: 全国各地日益动荡不安。

example.en: the most authoritative work on English surnames
example.zh: 有关英语姓氏的最权威著作

example.en: I always tried to remain neutral when they started arguing.
example.zh: 他们争论起来的时候我总是努力保持中立。

example.en: Mr. Obama is the first president since Richard M. Nixon to be elected while living in a city neighborhood, in his case, Chicago’s racially and economically diverse Hyde Park.
example.zh: 奥巴马是自理查德.尼克松总统以来第一位住在城市社区中当选的总统，奥巴马住在芝加哥种族和经济多元化的海德公园。

example.en: disappointing profit figures
example.zh: 令人失望的盈利数字

example.en: a huge chemical plant
example.zh: 一座大型化工厂

phrases.zh: 警察分局局；派出所所长

example.en: ticket inspectors
example.zh: 查票员

example.en: His books have sold more than 20 million copies worldwide.
example.zh: 他的书在全世界卖出了两千多万本。

example.en: the council for civil liberties
example.zh: 公民自由委员会

example.en: Police have found a vital clue .
example.zh: 警方发现了至关重要的线索。

example.en: He had cheated in the test by using a calculator.
example.zh: 他在考试时作弊，用了计算器。

phrases.zh: 雪上加霜；伤害之外又加侮辱

example.en: Nobody insults my family and gets away with it!
example.zh: 谁也别想侮辱了我的家人之后就这么算了！

phrases.zh: 财务困境，财务危机；金融困顿

example.en: The dream had distressed her greatly.
example.zh: 这场梦使她深感不安。

example.en: It may be difficult to do at first. Don't let this discourage you.
example.zh: 开始时做起来也许比较困难。不要让这个泄你的气。

example.en: You have the right to retain possession of the goods.
example.zh: 你有权保留这些物品。

example.en: Stone decided to hold a contest to see who could write the best song.
example.zh: 斯通决定举行一场比赛，看谁能够写出最佳歌曲。

example.en: The president is to put forward new proposals for resolving the country's constitutional crisis.
example.zh: 总统将提出解决国家宪法危机的新议案。

example.en: a combination nightclub and café
example.zh: 夜总会兼咖啡馆

phrases.zh: 促销活动；推广活动；行销活动；营销推广活动计划建议

example.en: "Jeans," according to one company's promotional material, "are designed and made to be worn hard."
example.zh: 根据一家公司促销材料上所说的，“牛仔裤为耐穿而设计和制作。”

phrases.zh: 光滑表面；光滑面；平滑面
正常运转；平稳运转，稳定运转

example.en: Her skin felt smooth and cool.
example.zh: 她的皮肤摸上去又滑又凉。

example.en: Young people today are under intense pressure to succeed.
example.zh: 如今的年轻人面临要出人头地的巨大压力。

example.en: a jagged, irregular coastline
example.zh: 锯齿状不规则的海岸线

example.en: The incidence of breast cancer increases with age.
example.zh: 乳腺癌的发病率随着年龄的增长而上升。

example.en: a plant that needs a lot of shade
example.zh: 喜阴植物

phrases.zh: 公积金计划；退休金办法；养老计划

example.en: At what age can you start drawing your pension ?
example.zh: 从多少岁可以开始领取养老金？

example.en: The recession continues to deepen.
example.zh: 经济衰退继续加剧。

example.en: John and Bob complemented each other well.
example.zh: 约翰和鲍勃互相配合得很好。

example.en: She smiled as he squeezed her hand.
example.zh: 他捏了捏她的手，她笑了。

example.en: modern American civilization
example.zh: 现代美国文明

phrases.zh: 特别会员大会；非常股东大会

example.en: a woman of extraordinary beauty
example.zh: 容貌出众的女子

example.en: Some mushrooms are extremely poisonous.
example.zh: 一些蘑菇有剧毒。

example.en: We take all our bottles to be recycled.
example.zh: 我们把我们所有的瓶子都回收利用。

example.en: ‘Why are you doing that?’ the boy inquired.
example.zh: “你为什么这么做？”男孩问道。

example.en: Men often mask their true feelings with humour.
example.zh: 男人常常用幽默来掩饰他们真实的情感。

example.en: One of the most common symptoms of schizophrenia is hearing imaginary voices.
example.zh: 精神分裂症最常见的症状之一是幻听。

phrases.zh: 牛肺疫，牛传染性胸膜肺炎

example.en: Financial problems continued to plague the company.
example.zh: 资金问题持续困扰着该公司。

example.en: Her hands began to twist the handles of the bag she carried.
example.zh: 她的双手开始拧她拎着的那个包的拎柄。

example.en: the airport’s passenger terminal
example.zh: 机场航站楼

example.en: People who had heard the evidence at the trial were surprised at the outcome.
example.zh: 在审判过程中听过证词的人都对此结果感到吃惊。

example.en: Her signature is totally illegible (= cannot be read ) .
example.zh: 她的签字完全无法辨认。

example.en: Sara had the task of preparing the agenda for meetings.
example.zh: 萨拉的任务是准备会议议程。

example.en: convincing evidence of his guilt
example.zh: 证明他有罪的有力证据

example.en: The airline has downsized its workforce by 30%.
example.zh: 这家航空公司裁员30%。

example.en: The situation is likely to continue for the foreseeable future.
example.zh: 这种局面在可预见的将来可能还会持续下去。

example.en: These documents have no legal status in Britain.
example.zh: 这些文件在英国并无法律效力。

example.en: Heterosexuals should not be treated preferentially when the state carries out that role.
example.zh: 当国家执行这个作用的时候不应该优先对待异性恋者。

example.en: They get their money from various sources.
example.zh: 他们从各种途径弄到钱。

example.en: urban riots
example.zh: 城市骚乱

example.en: big sacks of grain
example.zh: 大袋大袋的粮食

example.en: Furniture and carpet retailers are among those reporting the sharpest annual decline in sales.
example.zh: 家具和地毯零售商们是在那些报告最大年销售下滑的商家之中。

example.en: Dave amazed his friends by suddenly getting married.
example.zh: 戴夫突然结婚，令朋友们非常吃惊。

example.en: The tradition has its origins in the Middle Ages.
example.zh: 这一传统源于中世纪。

example.en: President Bush gave the commencement address today at the University of Notre Dame.
example.zh: 布什总统今天在巴黎圣母院大学发表了毕业典礼演说。

example.en: the need for large businesses to innovate
example.zh: 大公司革新的需要

phrases.zh: 使受到沉重的打击，使…遭受严重的挫折

example.en: First a house took a direct hit and then the rocket exploded.
example.zh: 首先一幢房子被直接击中，接着火箭弹爆炸了。

example.en: The conservation of tropical forests is of crucial importance .
example.zh: 保护热带雨林至关重要。

example.en: The company looks poised to make a significant breakthrough in China.
example.zh: 该公司看上去稳将在中国实现一次重大突破。

example.en: political exiles
example.zh: 政治流亡者

example.en: Business and management elements are built into the course.
example.zh: 本课程加入了商务和管理方面的内容。

example.en: One possible interpretation is that they want you to resign.
example.zh: 一种可能的解释是，他们想要你辞职。

example.en: She tried to accustom herself to the tight bandages.
example.zh: 她尝试着使自己习惯那些紧绷的绷带。

example.en: They only have the most superficial understanding of prison life.
example.zh: 他们对监狱生活只有最粗浅的了解。

example.en: The cups and saucers cost £5 and £3 respectively.
example.zh: 茶杯和茶碟的价钱分别为5英镑和3英镑。

example.en: The conclusions of the report are fundamentally wrong .
example.zh: 这份报告的结论从根本上来说就是错误的。

example.en: The children had suffered cruelty and neglect.
example.zh: 这些孩子遭受虐待，无人照管。

example.en: the leaders who govern the country
example.zh: 治理这个国家的领导人

example.en: His career has been hindered by injury.
example.zh: 由于受伤，他的事业受到了阻碍。

example.en: Society undervalues staying at home and looking after children.
example.zh: 社会低估了待在家里照看孩子的意义。

example.en: We need to carry out a proper evaluation of the new system.
example.zh: 我们要对新系统进行合理的评估。

example.en: the ability to define clients’ needs
example.zh: 确定客户需求的能力

example.en: But if you backslide, Hiram says, “Start over.
example.zh: 但假如你倒退了，海勒姆说，“那就重新开始。

phrases.zh: 犯罪行为，犯罪；刑事犯罪

example.en: These efforts have led to a growing confidence among the public that corruption is a serious punishable offense in Albania.
example.zh: 这些努力增强了公众的信心，即人们相信，腐败在阿尔巴尼亚是严重犯罪，能够受到惩罚。

example.en: a convicted murderer
example.zh: 已定罪的谋杀犯

example.en: Female employees complained of being marginalized by management.
example.zh: 女性雇员抱怨被管理层边缘化。

phrases.zh: 戈壁沙漠（蒙古和中国西北部）

example.en: Helen was deserted by her husband.
example.zh: 海伦被丈夫遗弃了。

example.en: She received an eight-year prison sentence.
example.zh: 她被判八年徒刑。

example.en: Do you have to reserve tickets in advance?
example.zh: 你必须预先订票吗？

example.en: No littering. Penalty $500.
example.zh: 禁止乱扔垃圾。 违者罚款500美元。

translations.text: 合乎情理地，符合逻辑地

example.en: an abundant supply of fresh water
example.zh: 充足的淡水供应

example.en: To say that all motorists speed in residential areas is overstating the case.
example.zh: 说所有驾驶员都在住宅区内超速行驶是言过其实了。

example.en: I grabbed a quick snack.
example.zh: 我赶紧吃了点零食。

example.en: We flew to Athens via Paris.
example.zh: 我们经由巴黎飞往雅典。

example.en: Hopes of a peace settlement are beginning to fade.
example.zh: 达成和平协议的希望日渐渺茫。

example.en: Some people are very resistant to the idea of exercise.
example.zh: 一些人对锻炼的主意非常抵制。

example.en: Freudian theory has had a great influence on psychology.
example.zh: 弗洛伊德理论对心理学产生过巨大影响。

phrases.zh: 心甘情愿地；不反对地；[经]在“不保留异议”的情况下

example.en: ‘I don’t see why I should take the blame for this!’ she protested.
example.zh: “我不明白为什么我要对此承担责任！”她抗议道。

example.en: Sarah rejected her brother’s offer of help.
example.zh: 萨拉拒绝了她弟弟的帮助。

example.en: A design flaw (= a mistake or weakness in the way something was made ) caused the engine to explode.
example.zh: 一个设计缺陷导致了引擎爆炸。

example.en: seemingly unrelated bits of information
example.zh: 似乎互不相关的零星信息

example.en: Her objection was that he was too young.
example.zh: 她反对的理由是他太小。

phrases.zh: n. 化装舞会所穿着的服装

example.en: Harry took me to a fancy restaurant for our anniversary.
example.zh: 哈里带我去了一家豪华餐厅，庆祝我们的结婚纪念日。

example.en: the commercial hub of the region
example.zh: 该地区的商业中心

example.en: an incomparable view of San Marco
example.zh: 圣马科美妙绝伦的景色

example.en: As an added incentive, there’s a bottle of champagne for the best team.
example.zh: 给最优秀的队发一瓶香槟作为额外的鼓励。

phrases.zh: 启动代码；启始程序代码

example.en: You should see something like  Figure 3 after startup.
example.zh: 启动后，您应该看到类似于  图 3 的画面。

example.en: Klimt’s artwork is reproduced in this exquisite book.
example.zh: 这本精美的书里翻印了克里木特的艺术作品。

example.en: two entirely distinct languages
example.zh: 两种完全不同的语言

phrases.zh: 危如累卵；处于危险中；在紧要关头
为某人取得某物而提供金钱(或援助)，资助某人取得某物

example.en: They have to win the contract – thousands of jobs are at stake.
example.zh: 他们必须拿下这份合同，这关系到数千个工作岗位。

phrases.zh: 道德危机；由于投保人可能不可靠所冒的风险

example.en: It is easy to have an opinion on a moral issue like the death penalty for murder.
example.zh: 对于判谋杀犯死刑这种涉及伦理道德的问题，有个观点并非难事。

example.en: Graf’s opponent in today’s final will be Sukova.
example.zh: 格拉芙今天的决赛对手将是苏科娃。

example.en: You have to grant us control explicitly.
example.zh: 你们必须允许我们明确地控制。

example.en: This gives the company a competitive advantage over its rivals.
example.zh: 这使该公司与其对手相比具有一项竞争优势。

example.en: She had stayed in her room to avoid another confrontation.
example.zh: 她待在自己的房间里，以避免再次发生冲突。

example.en: French bread goes stale (= becomes stale ) very quickly.
example.zh: 法式面包极易变味。

example.en: The film reinforces the idea that women should be pretty and dumb.
example.zh: 这部影片强化了这个观点——女人要漂亮，而且要笨一些。

phrases.zh: 包围；用考勤钟打下个人上班的时间；与…通电话

example.en: We have an average attendance of 4,000 fans per game.
example.zh: 每场比赛平均有4,000名球迷来观战。

example.en: a new road system to improve traffic flow through the city centre
example.zh: 疏导市中心车流的新道路系统

example.en: You’re in a good mood this morning!
example.zh: 你今天早晨心情不错啊！

example.en: Note that different users of the system have different goals, and that these goals are often mutually exclusive.
example.zh: 请注意系统的不同用户有不同的目标，而且这些目标经常是相互排斥的。

phrases.zh: 文献回顾；文献综述；文献评论

example.en: a journalist who will review the events of the past six months
example.zh: 将对过去六个月里所发生的事件进行回顾的记者

example.en: a tall, elegant young woman
example.zh: 身材高挑、举止优雅的年轻女子

example.en: The local people were very kind and hospitable.
example.zh: 当地人非常友好热情。

example.en: We must redefine what constitutes a family.
example.zh: 我们必须对家庭的构成重新定义。

phrases.zh: n. 计算机程序设计员

example.en: The computer programmer botched (up) the job and had to start over.
example.zh: 计算机程序设计员把文件弄坏了，只好重做。

example.en: sophisticated software
example.zh: 很先进的软件

example.en: an ignorant and uneducated man
example.zh: 不学无术的人

example.en: She was a splendid mimic and loved to imitate Winston Churchill.
example.zh: 她是个出色的模仿者，喜欢模仿温斯顿·丘吉尔。

example.en: The assassination triggered off a wave of rioting.
example.zh: 这次暗杀事件引发了一阵骚乱。

example.en: The spy sent his message in code.
example.zh: 这个间谍用密码发送情报。

example.en: The state police are investigating the incident.
example.zh: 州警察正调查此事。

phrases.zh: 外埠邮件；发文，外发函件

example.en: We’re looking for someone with an outgoing personality.
example.zh: 我们在找一个性格外向的人。

example.en: the theory of evolution
example.zh: 进化论

example.en: a woman who is energetic and resourceful
example.zh: 精力充沛且足智多谋的女人

example.en: a book of Greek myths
example.zh: 一本关于希腊神话的图书

example.en: Local legend has it that (= says that ) the island was the original Garden of Eden.
example.zh: 当地传说这个岛就是伊甸园的原型。

example.en: Plato, Aristotle, and other Greek philosophers
example.zh: 柏拉图、亚里士多德和其他希腊哲学家

phrases.zh: 混凝土结构；具体结构；混凝土建造物

example.en: What does that mean in concrete terms ?
example.zh: 具体来说那到底是什么意思？

example.en: The flowers emerge in the spring.
example.zh: 花儿在春天开放。

example.en: Stir the paint to make sure it is smooth.
example.zh: 将油漆搅拌至均匀。

example.en: Seniors can get a 10% discount.
example.zh: 老年人可以享受10%的折扣。

example.en: Wholemeal bread is more nutritious than white bread.
example.zh: 全麦面包比白面包更有营养。

example.en: He cast his expert eye on the gardener’s work.
example.zh: 他用内行的眼光看了看园丁干的活。

example.en: He is a carpenter by profession.
example.zh: 他以木工为业。

example.en: The light rain dampened the crowd’s enthusiasm.
example.zh: 小雨使观众的热情减退了。

phrases.zh: 政府批地书，政府补助金
政府赠地；政府拨给大学或铁路之土地

example.en: France has agreed to grant him political asylum.
example.zh: 法国已经同意给予他政治庇护。

example.en: The trial was held under tight security .
example.zh: 这场审讯是在戒备森严的情况下进行的。

example.en: The road became rocky and steep.
example.zh: 路变得崎岖陡峭起来。

example.en: They do, however, greatly affect the implementation of those patterns.
example.zh: 然而，它们的确对那些模式的 实现影响很大。

example.en: Over the last two years the president’s position has weakened.
example.zh: 过去两年来，总统的地位被削弱了。

phrases.zh: n. 七巧板；智力拼图玩具

example.en: My sister puzzles me and causes me anxiety.
example.zh: 我的妹妹常会让我不解，使我焦虑。

example.en: He studied his map, trying to memorize the way to Rose's street.
example.zh: 他研究了地图，努力记住去罗丝家那条街的路。

phrases.zh: 迎合；供应伙食；为…提供所需

example.en: We cater to an exclusive clientele.
example.zh: 我们满足一个特殊客户群的需求。

example.en: We have a problem.
example.zh: 我们遇到了一个麻烦。

example.en: How could she abandon her own child?
example.zh: 她怎么能抛弃自己的孩子？

example.en: The test measures your mathematical ability.
example.zh: 这种测试考查的是数学能力。

phrases.zh: 经受得住某事(指困难、痛苦的事)

example.en: one of my more able students
example.zh: 我班上能力比较强的学生之一

example.en: abnormal behaviour
example.zh: 反常行为

example.en: The plane crashed, killing all 200 people aboard.
example.zh: 飞机失事，机上200人全部遇难。

example.en: a book about politics
example.zh: 一本有关政治的书

phrases.zh: 自高自大；趾高气扬；兴高采烈

example.en: He lived in a flat above the shop.
example.zh: 他住在那商店上面的一套房间里。

example.en: I’ve never lived abroad before.
example.zh: 我以前从未在国外生活过。

phrases.zh: 缺乏，不存在；无…时，缺少…时

example.en: In the absence of any evidence, the police had to let Myers go.
example.zh: 警察没有证据，只好把迈尔斯放了。

example.en: Some of the stuff on TV is absolute rubbish.
example.zh: 电视上播放的有些东西简直就是垃圾。

example.en: He made his reasons for resigning absolutely clear.
example.zh: 他把辞职的理由讲得一清二楚。

example.en: a military academy
example.zh: 军事学院

phrases.zh: 峰值加速度；最大加速度值

example.en: The latest model has excellent acceleration.
example.zh: 这款最新型号加速性能优异。

example.en: He had a strong Irish accent
example.zh: 他有浓重的爱尔兰口音。

example.en: Rick accepted her offer of coffee.
example.zh: 她请里克喝咖啡，他接受了。

phrases.zh: 合格质量，可接受的质量
可接受的性能；合格性能

example.en: Students who achieve an acceptable standard will progress to degree studies.
example.zh: 达到一定程度的学生可以进一步攻读学位。

phrases.zh: 验收；最终验收；最后验收

example.en: He wrote a letter of acceptance (=  a letter in which you agree to accept a job, university place etc  ) to the university.
example.zh: 他给那所大学写了一封接受函。

example.en: Over 70,000 people are seriously injured every year in road accidents.
example.zh: 每年在道路事故中受重伤的有七万多人。

example.en: an accidental discharge of toxic waste
example.zh: 有毒废料的意外排放

example.en: You will not be accorded any special treatment.
example.zh: 你不会得到任何特殊待遇。

example.en: Some of the laws were contradictory. Accordingly, measures were taken to clarify them.
example.zh: 有些法律相互矛盾，因此，采取了措施将其阐明。

phrases.zh: 在某人帐上重视，	记帐
对…负有责任；对…做出解释；说明……的原因

example.en: The accounts for last year showed a profit of $2 million.
example.zh: 去年的账目显示利润为200万美元。

example.en: He passes the ball with unerring accuracy.
example.zh: 他传球准确无误。

example.en: The professor stands accused of (=  has been accused of  ) stealing his student’s ideas and publishing them.
example.zh: 那位教授被指控剽窃学生的观点拿去发表。

phrases.zh: 习惯于；对…变得习以为常

example.en: The pans were in their accustomed places.
example.zh: 那些锅在老地方。

phrases.zh: 痛苦；不适；各种各样的病痛

example.en: His feet were aching from standing so long.
example.zh: 他站了那么久，双脚隐隐作痛。

example.en: His great achievement is to make all the players into a united team.
example.zh: 他的伟大成就在于把所有选手组织成一支团结的队伍。

example.en: sulphuric acid
example.zh: 硫酸

phrases.zh: 相识不深的人；不完整或肤浅的知识

example.en: She was a casual acquaintance of my family in Vienna.
example.zh: 她是我们家在维也纳的一个交情不深的朋友。

example.en: They own 200 acres of farmland.
example.zh: 他们拥有200英亩农田。

phrases.zh: 全面地；包括一切地；以三等分的钱数赌同一匹马赢得前三名

example.en: The company acted correctly in sacking him.
example.zh: 公司解雇他做得对。

example.en: The government must take action (=  do something  ) now to stop the rise in violent crime.
example.zh: 政府现在必须采取行动遏止暴力犯罪的上升。

phrases.zh: 积极的作用；能动部分，主动部分

example.en: games for active youngsters
example.zh: 活跃好动的年轻人玩的游戏

phrases.zh: 身体活动，体育活动；体力活动

example.en: Everyone is free to engage in peaceful political activity.
example.zh: 每个人都可以自由参加和平的政治活动。

phrases.zh: 最佳男主角；最佳男演员

example.en: His father was an actor in the Cantonese Opera Company.
example.zh: 他父亲曾是粤剧团的一名演员。

example.en: She's not only a great dramatic actress but she's also very funny.
example.zh: 她不仅是一位伟大的女戏剧演员，而且也很幽默。

example.en: I’m not joking. Those were his actual words.
example.zh: 我没开玩笑，那都是他的原话。

example.en: I’ve known Barbara for years. Since we were babies, actually.
example.zh: 我认识芭芭拉很多年了，实际上我们从小就认识。

phrases.zh: (局末平分后)发球占先(先得一分)

example.en: She replied to a lonely hearts ad she spotted in the New York Times.
example.zh: 她回复了在《纽约时报》上看到的一则求友广告。

phrases.zh: 增加价值；附加价值；添加值

example.en: If the mixture seems dry, add water.
example.zh: 如果混合物看上去干，加点水。

example.en: This is a fine book; a worthy addition to the series.
example.zh: 这是一本好书——是对这套丛书有价值的增补。

example.en: In “the black cat” the adjective “black”modifies the noun “cat”.
example.zh: 在“那只黑猫”中，形容词“黑的”修饰名词“猫”。

example.en: Check and adjust the brakes regularly.
example.zh: 经常检查并调节刹车装置。

example.en: Sally was adopted when she was four.
example.zh: 莎莉四岁时被人收养。

example.en: Some children find it difficult to talk to adults.
example.zh: 一些孩子觉得与大人很难谈得来。

example.en: Younger workers tend to be at an advantage (=  have an advantage  ) when applying for jobs.
example.zh: 年轻点的工人申请工作时往往处于优势地位。

example.en: Come on – where’s your sense of adventure?
example.zh: 来吧——你的冒险精神哪里去了？

example.en: Will you please compare the adverb “well”?
example.zh: 请你说出副词“well”的原级、比较级和最高级好吗?

example.en: They put an advertisement in ‘The Morning News’, offering a high salary for the right person.
example.zh: 他们在《晨报》上刊登了一则启事，出高薪寻找合适的人选。

example.en: I deem it advisable to buy property now.
example.zh: 我认为现在购置房地产是明智的。

example.en: She needed someone to advise her.
example.zh: 她需要有个人给她出主意。

example.en: The aeroplane landed us at the airport in Barcelona.
example.zh: 飞机把我们降落在巴塞罗那机场。

example.en: Are you interested in world affairs?
example.zh: 你对世界大事感兴趣吗？

example.en: the areas affected by the hurricane
example.zh: 受飓风影响的地区

example.en: She looked back on those days with affection .
example.zh: 她深情地回顾那些日子。

example.en: There’s no need to be afraid.
example.zh: 没有必要害怕。

example.en: The giraffe ranges in Africa.
example.zh: 长颈鹿生长在非洲。

phrases.zh: 南非；南非的；南非人；南非人的
非裔美国人（指美国黑人）；非裔美籍（等于African American）

example.en: ...the African continent.
example.zh: …非洲大陆。

example.en: After the war many soldiers stayed in France.
example.zh: 战后，许多士兵留在法国。

example.en: There’s a meeting on Thursday afternoon .
example.zh: 星期四下午有个会议。

example.en: Shortly afterward, police arrested four suspects.
example.zh: 之后不久，警方逮捕了４名嫌疑犯。

example.en: Can you say that again? I didn’t hear.
example.zh: 你能再说一遍吗？ 我没听见。

phrases.zh: 在…对面；正对着；与…相反；与…形成对照

example.en: There was a ladder propped up against the wall.
example.zh: 有一把梯子靠在墙边。

example.en: Francis is the same age as me.
example.zh: 弗朗西斯和我同年岁。

example.en: They moved to a new house some time ago (=  a fairly long time ago  ) .
example.zh: 他们搬进新居已有些日子了。

phrases.zh: (感情上的)突然而强烈的爆发，任何精神上的激动
（英）问答专栏阿姨；心理咨询阿姨

example.en: the agony of arthritis
example.zh: 关节炎的剧烈疼痛

phrases.zh: 在…方面意见一致；在…相同

example.en: Teenagers and their parents rarely agree.
example.zh: 十几岁的孩子跟父母意见很少一致。

example.en: It is easier for two parties to reach agreement than for three.
example.zh: 两方达成一致比三方达成一致容易。

example.en: More than 75% of the land is used for agriculture.
example.zh: 75%以上的土地用于农耕。

example.en: He kept his gaze fixed on the car ahead.
example.zh: 他的目光一直盯着前面的那辆汽车。

example.en: Foreign aid from many countries poured into the famine area.
example.zh: 来自许多国家的救援物资纷纷送到饥荒地区。

phrases.zh: v. 针对；瞄准；目的在于

example.en: Denver aimed his gun but did not shoot.
example.zh: 丹佛举枪瞄准，但是没有射击。

phrases.zh: 在空中；悬而未决；在流传中；不设防

example.en: Let’s go outside and get some fresh air.
example.zh: 我们出去呼吸些新鲜空气吧。

phrases.zh: n. 航空母舰；全能篮球中锋

example.en: The return flight of the aircraft was delayed.
example.zh: 飞机的返回航程被推迟了。

example.en: an airline pilot
example.zh: 航空公司飞行员

example.en: The airplane cracked up in landing.
example.zh: 这架飞机在着陆时坠毁。

example.en: The plane landed at Heathrow Airport.
example.zh: 飞机降落在希思罗机场。

example.en: I forgot to set the burglar alarm.
example.zh: 我忘记打开防盗警报器了。

example.en: My mother and I are alike in many ways.
example.zh: 我和母亲在许多方面很相似。

phrases.zh: 活跃起来；看上去像真的

example.en: It was a bad accident – they’re lucky to be alive.
example.zh: 这是一宗严重事故——他们能活着实属幸运。

example.en: We don’t allow diving in the pool.
example.zh: 泳池内禁止跳水。

example.en: Brass is an alloy of copper and zinc.
example.zh: 黄铜是铜和锌的合金。

example.en: Have you almost finished?
example.zh: 你差不多完成了吗？

example.en: She lives alone .
example.zh: 她一个人生活。

phrases.zh: 沿（顺）着；连同…一起；与…一道；随同…一起
（勉强）生活；进展；（使）前进；与…和睦相处

example.en: We were driving along Follyfoot Road.
example.zh: 我们沿着福莱福特路行驶。

example.en: When we were children, our father read aloud to us.
example.zh: 当我们是孩子时，我们的父亲大声地朗读给我们听。

phrases.zh: 国际音标；国际语音字母

example.en: The modern Russian alphabet has 31 letters.
example.zh: 现代俄语字母表有31个字母。

example.en: The design of the new house is similar to those that have already been built.
example.zh: 新房的设计与那些已建好的房子相似。

phrases.zh: 不仅……而且…… 并且；表强调

example.en: Information is also available on women’s health care.
example.zh: 还可以获得有关女性保健方面的资料。

example.en: Although in poor health, she continued to carry out her duties.
example.zh: 尽管身体不好，她仍继续执行任务。

example.en: an old custom that has vanished altogether
example.zh: 一个彻底消亡的古老习俗

phrases.zh: 铝箔（作包装材料）；锡箔纸

example.en: recycled aluminium cans
example.zh: 再生铝罐

example.en: Always lock your bicycle to something secure.
example.zh: 每次都要把自行车锁在牢固的物体上。

example.en: He was young and full of ambition.
example.zh: 他年轻，而且雄心勃勃。

example.en: the ambulance service
example.zh: 救护车服务

example.en: I may go to America or I may not,it all depends.
example.zh: 我也许去美国，也许不去，要视情况而定。

example.en: Her mother is American.
example.zh: 她妈妈是美国人。

phrases.zh: 其中；尤其；除了别的之外

example.en: The girl quickly disappeared among the crowd.
example.zh: 女孩转眼消失在人群中。

example.en: Here in Trinity it is right that I should give you an account of how he lived amongst you during these years of his greatest achievement.
example.zh: 正是在三一学院这儿，我将对你们阐述他如何在你们中间生活，如何在这些年中取得他的最伟大的成就。

example.en: Please pay the full amount (=  of money  ) by the end of the month.
example.zh: 请在月底前全额付清。

example.en: And I prefer to an ampere meter being made of aluminum even though it has analog to another one.
example.zh: 我还想要一个铝制的安培表，虽然它与另一个类似。

example.en: an amplified guitar
example.zh: 带有扩音设备的电吉他

example.en: Doing jigsaws would amuse Amy for hours on end.
example.zh: 拼图能让埃米连续玩上几个小时。

example.en: She still needs to analyse the data.
example.zh: 她仍需要分析这些数据。

phrases.zh: 解析法；离子微探针质谱仪分析法

example.en: She’s been in analysis for three years.
example.zh: 她接受精神分析治疗已经三年了。

phrases.zh: 祖先崇拜；祭祖；敬奉祖先

example.en: My ancestors were French.
example.zh: 我的祖先是法国人。

phrases.zh: 锚栓，地脚螺栓；锚定螺栓，基础螺栓

example.en: We dropped anchor a few yards offshore.
example.zh: 我们在离岸几码远的地方抛锚停航。

example.en: He’s gone to get some fish and chips.
example.zh: 他去买炸鱼薯条了。

example.en: the angel Gabriel
example.zh: 天使加百列

example.en: There is growing anger among the people against the government.
example.zh: 民众对政府越来越不满。

example.en: You didn’t measure the angle accurately.
example.zh: 你没有量准角度。

example.en: I was angry because he hadn’t told me his plans.
example.zh: 我很生气，因为他没有告诉我他的计划。

example.en: furry little animals
example.zh: 毛茸茸的小动物

example.en: slender ankles
example.zh: 纤细的脚踝

example.en: The radio announcer said it was nine o'clock.
example.zh: 电台播音员报了9点。

phrases.zh: adv. 接连地；一个接一个地

example.en: Can you cite another case like this one?
example.zh: 你能举出另一个像这样的例子吗?

example.en: She thought for a moment before answering.
example.zh: 她想了一会儿才回答。

example.en: Ants swarmed up out of the ground and covered her shoes and legs.
example.zh: 蚂蚁从地里成群地爬出来，爬满了她的鞋和腿。

phrases.zh: 焦虑症；焦虑性障碍；焦虑症候群

example.en: his feelings of anxiety
example.zh: 他焦虑的心情

example.en: She gave me an anxious look.
example.zh: 她焦急地看了我一眼。

example.en: We could not reason out which way the robbers escaped, because we were unable to find any trace of them.
example.zh: 我们推断不出这些强盗是从哪个方向逃走的，因为我们找不到他们的任何踪迹。

example.en: You should have a try, don't swallow anybody.
example.zh: 不要轻信任何人，你得亲自去试一试。

example.en: You know nothing about her really, or about yourself in relation to her, and anyhow it's only one of those things and therefore it's of no importance.
example.zh: 你对她一点儿都不了解，也不了解自己和她的关系，无论如何它只是那些事情之一,因此没有任何重要性。

example.en: Anyone could win tonight.
example.zh: 今晚任何人都可能赢。

phrases.zh: 或者其他别的事，或其他什么的
无论如何（用于否定句中）

example.en: You can buy anything you want.
example.zh: 你想要什么都可以买。

phrases.zh: 或是什么别的地方，或其他某地

example.en: I haven't got anywhere to live.
example.zh: 我没有任何地方住。

phrases.zh: 远离，除…之外；且不说；缺少

example.en: They have offices in countries as far apart as India and Peru.
example.zh: 他们的办事处远至印度、秘鲁等国。

example.en: I’m so sorry, I do apologize.
example.zh: 非常对不起，我真心道歉。

phrases.zh: 不像样的代替品，勉强充作某物的东西，滥竽充数的样品[用于贬义]

example.en: Edward can’t be here today, but he sends his apologies .
example.zh: 爱德华今天来不了，他向大家表示歉意。

example.en: Astronauts have special breathing apparatus.
example.zh: 航天员有专门的呼吸装装备。

example.en: The difference in quality was immediately apparent .
example.zh: 质量的差异显而易见。

example.en: Police have found what appear to be human remains.
example.zh: 警方发现了疑似人体遗骸的东西。

example.en: apple pie
example.zh: 苹果馅饼

phrases.zh: 电器；电气器具，电气设备；电气用品

example.en: The device most often used to do this is a load balancer, which is an appliance that accepts requests from the outside world and hands them off to the next available application server.
example.zh: 进行这一操作最常用的设备是一个负载均衡器，这是一个从外部接收请求并将它们移交给下一个可用应用程序服务器的装置。

example.en: What is a reasonable standard for one family is not applicable for another.
example.zh: 对一个家庭合理的标准对于另一个家庭并不适用。

phrases.zh: 酌情；[拉丁语]视情况而定

example.zh: 氯化钠通常都称为盐。

example.zh: 婴儿用哭来表达需要。

example.zh: 为期一周的提高沟通技巧的课程

example.zh: …共产主义在全世界的最终胜利。

example.zh: 如果没有法国的共产主义者，二战中的抵抗运动可能不会成功。

example.zh: 这座新的艺术中心将为整个社区服务。

example.zh: 十年来他一直陪伴她左右。

example.zh: 他穷了一辈子，最后几年还算过得比较舒适。

example.zh: 她的画作让人想起早期的印象派作品。

example.zh: 参加商品交易会是估量竞争规模的理想机会。

example.zh: 如果所有这些问题的答案都为否，那么使用框架只会把事情变复杂。

example.zh: 轻质丝绸最适合制作降落伞，因为这种面料便于压缩，而且展开迅速。

example.en: The house comprises two bedrooms, a kitchen, and a living room.
example.zh: 这座房子有两间卧室、一间厨房和一间起居室。

example.en: Compromise is an inevitable part of marriage.
example.zh: 妥协是婚姻生活中必不可少的。

phrases.zh: 不可计量，无法计算；难以估计

example.en: Final results had not yet been computed.
example.zh: 最终的结果还未计算出来。

example.en: a huge global computer network
example.zh: 巨大的全球计算机网络

example.en: Comrades, please support this motion.
example.zh: 同志们，请支持这项动议。

example.en: The shadows concealed her as she crept up to the house.
example.zh: 她借着阴影蹑手蹑脚地走向房子。

phrases.zh: 集中精力于；全神贯注于

example.en: Now please concentrate.
example.zh: 现在请集中注意力。

phrases.zh: ◎从事,忙于(常与with, about, in, over连用)
对…表示担心/忧虑；使（自己）关心…

example.en: calls from young children concerning lost pets
example.zh: 小孩子打来的有关宠物走失的电话

phrases.zh: 和…相呼应；与…合作；和…一致

example.en: a rock concert
example.zh: 摇滚音乐会

example.en: When the investigation is concluded, the results will be sent to the US Attorney’s office.
example.zh: 等到调查结束后，结果会被送到联邦检察官办公室。

example.en: Politicians were quick to condemn the bombing.
example.zh: 政治家们立即对爆炸事件进行了谴责。

example.en: the mist which condensed on every cold surface
example.zh: 每个冰冷的表面上凝结的水汽

example.en: Profits increased by £1.5m, despite the difficult economic conditions.
example.zh: 尽管经济形势不佳，利润还是增长了150万英镑。

example.en: The Senator’s conduct is being investigated by the Ethics Committee.
example.zh: 该参议员的行为正受到道德委员会的调查。

example.en: Graphite is a highly efficient conductor of electricity.
example.zh: 石墨是一种高效的电导体。

phrases.zh: 记者招待会，新闻发布会

example.en: Representatives from over 100 countries attended the International Peace Conference in Geneva.
example.zh: 来自一百多个国家的代表出席了在日内瓦举行的国际和平大会。

example.en: Occasionally people confess to crimes they haven’t committed just to get attention.
example.zh: 偶尔人们会承认自己并未犯过的罪行，那只是为了引人注意。

example.en: Despite her disability, Philippa is very confident.
example.zh: 菲莉帕虽然有残疾，却很自信。

example.en: Vaughan is confined to a wheelchair .
example.zh: 沃恩离不开轮椅。

phrases.zh: 乱七八糟；处于混乱状态
打乱；使陷入混乱；使…惊慌失措

example.en: To avoid confusion, the teams wore different colours.
example.zh: 为了避免混淆，各队穿着不同颜色的服装。

example.en: He never even stopped to congratulate me.
example.zh: 他甚至没有过来向我祝贺。

example.en: letters of congratulation
example.zh: 祝贺信

example.en: a congress of the ruling Labor Party
example.zh: 执政党工党的代表大会

example.en: The worksheets are designed to be used in conjunction with the new course books.
example.zh: 这些活页练习题专门用来与新课本配套使用。

example.en: We’d like two rooms with connecting doors (= doors that join the rooms ) .
example.zh: 我们想要两个有门相通的房间。

example.en: Police have so far failed to establish a connection between the two murders.
example.zh: 到目前为止警方尚未确定两宗凶杀案之间有关联。

example.en: The Normans conquered England in 1066.
example.zh: 诺曼人于 1066 年征服英格兰。

phrases.zh: [史]诺曼底人对英格兰的军事征服

example.en: the Norman Conquest (= the conquest of England by the Normans )
example.zh: 诺曼征服

example.en: The driver was still conscious when the ambulance arrived.
example.zh: 救护车赶到时，司机仍然神志清醒。

example.en: We will have to consider your offer carefully .
example.zh: 我们得仔细考虑你的提议。

phrases.zh: 考虑到，鉴于；作为对…的酬报

example.en: proposals put forward for consideration
example.zh: 提请考虑的建议

example.en: The right to speak freely is written into the Constitution of the United States.
example.zh: 言论自由的权利被写入美国宪法。

example.en: There are plans to construct a new road bridge across the river.
example.zh: 有计划要建造一条新的跨河公路桥。

example.en: The thieves stole a purse containing bank-notes.
example.zh: 小偷们偷到了一个里面有钞票的钱包。

example.en: ice cream in plastic containers
example.zh: 塑料容器里的冰激凌

phrases.zh: 蔑视法庭；对法院的藐视罪
不顾；不把…放在眼里；藐视

example.en: The public is treated with contempt by broadcasters.
example.zh: 公众受到了节目主持人的轻蔑对待。

example.en: the continents of Asia and Africa
example.zh: 亚洲及非洲大陆

example.en: five weeks of continual rain
example.zh: 持续了五个星期的降雨

example.en: He will be continuing his education in the US.
example.zh: 他将在美国继续求学。

example.en: continuous economic growth
example.zh: 持续的经济增长

example.en: apparent contradictions in the defendant’s testimony
example.zh: 被告证词中的明显矛盾

example.en: Two contrary views emerged.
example.zh: 出现了两种相反的观点。

example.en: Police had to be called in to control the crowds.
example.zh: 只好调来警察控制人群。

example.en: Ready meals sell well because of their convenience.
example.zh: 即食餐因为方便销路好。

phrases.zh: 国际惯例；国际公约；国际协定
n. 会议中心；会展中心
全国代表大会（美国政党为总统候选人提名而召开）；国民公会（指1792－1795年间的法国议会）

example.en: Playing together teaches children social conventions such as sharing.
example.zh: 一起玩耍可教会儿童与人分享等社会常规。

example.en: a telephone conversation
example.zh: 电话交谈

example.en: American consumers prefer white eggs; conversely, British buyers like brown eggs.
example.zh: 美国的消费者喜欢白色的鸡蛋，而英国的消费者却相反，他们喜欢棕色的鸡蛋。

example.en: ...the conversion of disused rail lines into cycle routes.
example.zh: …把废弃的铁路改变成自行车道。

example.en: a 19th-century converted barn
example.zh: 由19世纪谷仓改建的房子

example.en: Where did you learn to cook?
example.zh: 你在哪里学烹调的？

example.en: She swam out into the cool water.
example.zh: 她往外游向清凉的水里。

example.en: They agreed to co-operate with Brazil on a programme to protect the rain forests.
example.zh: 他们同意和巴西合作进行一个保护热带雨林的项目。

example.en: The agencies are working together to co-ordinate policy on food safety.
example.zh: 这些机构在共同合作为食品安全政策做协调工作。

example.en: Sometimes I find it hard to cope.
example.zh: 有时候我觉得很难应付。

example.en: He offered to do the job for a few coppers.
example.zh: 他说他来做这份工作，给他几个铜板就行。

example.en: back-up copies of your files
example.zh: 你的文档的备份

example.en: The robe was held at the waist by a cord.
example.zh: 在袍子腰处束了根细绳。

example.en: The talks were conducted in a cordial atmosphere.
example.zh: 会谈在友好的气氛中进行。

example.en: Remove the cores, and bake the apples for 40 minutes.
example.zh: 去除果心，然后把苹果烤40分钟。

example.en: fields of corn
example.zh: 一片片麦田

phrases.zh: 在角落；在角落里；在拐角内
adv. 在拐角处；即将来临

example.en: He pulled a dirty handkerchief out by its corner and waved it at me.
example.zh: 他拽出一块脏手帕，捏着一角向我挥动。

example.en: He works for a large American corporation.
example.zh: 他在一家美国大公司工作。

example.en: If my calculations are correct, we’re about ten miles from Exeter.
example.zh: 如果我计算得没错的话，我们离埃克塞特大约十英里。

example.en: I just need to make a few corrections , and then we can send it to the printer.
example.zh: 我只要修改几个地方，然后就可以把它发送到打印机。

example.en: The two halves of the document did not correspond.
example.zh: 这份文件的前后两部分不相符。

phrases.zh: 往来行；代理银行；通汇银行
报社派驻国外的通讯记者

example.en: Our correspondent in South Africa sent this report.
example.zh: 我们的驻南非记者发来这份报道。

example.en: The war and the corresponding fall in trade have had a devastating effect on the country.
example.zh: 战争以及由此所导致的贸易量下降对这个国家产生了致命的影响。

phrases.zh: 长廊（颐和园旅游景点之一）

example.en: Go down here and the bathroom’s at the end of the corridor.
example.zh: 沿着这儿走，浴室就在走廊的尽头。

example.en: I offered to pay the cost of the taxi.
example.zh: 我提出支付出租车费。

example.en: Such a database would be extremely costly to set up.
example.zh: 建立这样一个数据库要花很多钱。

phrases.zh: （由脱脂凝乳制成的）白软干酪，松软干酪

example.en: a country cottage
example.zh: 乡间小屋

example.en: a white cotton shirt
example.zh: 白色棉布衬衫

phrases.zh: 咳出；勉强说出；[俚]被迫付出

example.en: Matthew coughed and cleared his throat.
example.zh: 马修咳了一声清清喉咙。

example.en: I was amazed at the number of plants - I counted 147.
example.zh: 我对植物的数量之多感到惊讶，我数了有147棵。

phrases.zh: 粒子计数器；粒子计数管；颗粒测量计数器

example.en: He wondered if the girl behind the counter recognised him.
example.zh: 他在想柜台后面的那个女孩是否认出了他。

example.en: the Scandinavian countries
example.zh: 斯堪的纳维亚国家

example.en: The house had lovely views over open countryside .
example.zh: 这房子望出去是开阔的乡村美景。

example.en: Fairfax County, Virginia
example.zh: 弗吉尼亚州费尔法克斯县

example.en: Sue showed great courage throughout her illness.
example.zh: 休在生病期间表现出了极大的勇气。

phrases.zh: 学科；学习的进程；研究课程
人民法院；人民法庭（美国一种电视节目）

example.en: It could not be proved in a court of law.
example.zh: 这无法在法庭上证实。

example.en: My cousin Mark helped me to bring in the bags.
example.zh: 我表弟马克帮我把包提了进来。

example.en: Cover the pot and bake for an hour.
example.zh: 把锅盖上，烘烤一小时。

example.en: a herd of cows
example.zh: 一群牛

example.en: Try it. Don’t be such a coward.
example.zh: 试一下，别那么胆小。

example.en: She opened the door a crack and peeped into the room.
example.zh: 她把门打开一条缝，往房间里偷看。

example.en: traditional rural crafts
example.zh: 传统的乡村手工艺

example.en: The little prefabricated hut was lifted away by a huge crane.
example.zh: 那间小小的预制棚屋被一台巨大的起重机吊走了。

phrases.zh: 慢行通过的空间；供电线或水管等通过的槽隙

example.en: We crawled into bed at 2 am.
example.zh: 我们凌晨两点爬上了床。

example.en: The neighbours must think we’re crazy.
example.zh: 邻居一定会认为我们疯了。

example.en: fresh cream
example.zh: 鲜奶油

example.en: Some people believe the universe was created by a big explosion.
example.zh: 有些人认为宇宙是通过一次大爆炸创造出来的。

phrases.zh: 创意设计，创新设计；美工设计

example.en: This job is so boring. I wish I could do something more creative.
example.zh: 这工作太单调了，我希望能做些更有创造性的事情。

phrases.zh: n. 物质享受（尤指食物）

example.en: all the living creatures in the sea
example.zh: 海洋中所有的生物

phrases.zh: 信用制度；信贷制度；赊购或赊销制度

example.en: The store agreed to let him have credit.
example.zh: 商店同意他赊购。

phrases.zh: 抗蠕变性；蠕变强度；抗蠕阻力；蠕变阻力

example.en: He crept back up the stairs, trying to avoid the ones that creaked.
example.zh: 他蹑手蹑脚地回楼上，尽量避开那些嘎吱作响的梯级。

example.en: The plane crashed, killing two of the crew and four passengers.
example.zh: 飞机坠毁，造成两名机组人员和四名乘客死亡。

example.en: The boy traded his knife for a cricket bat.
example.zh: 那男孩用他的刀子换了一个板球棒。

example.en: We moved here because there was very little crime.
example.zh: 我们搬到这里来是因为这里的犯罪率很低。

example.en: Police have described the man as a violent and dangerous criminal.
example.zh: 警方形容那名男子是个凶暴而危险的罪犯。

example.en: She has gone from being a healthy, fit, and sporty young woman to being a cripple.
example.zh: 她从一个健康、强壮、爱好体育运动的年轻姑娘变成了一个残疾人。

phrases.zh: 粮食产量，作物产量；谷物收获量

example.en: The main crops were oats and barley.
example.zh: 主要作物是燕麦和大麦。

phrases.zh: 在自己身上用手画十字(表示祈求上帝保佑)

example.en: He raised his arms in triumph as he crossed the line for his 100-metres win.
example.zh: 他以胜利的姿态高举双手跑过终点线，赢得了这场百米赛。

phrases.zh: 丢脸；被迫收回自己说的话

example.en: The crows roosted in Fonsa's Tower.
example.zh: 那些乌鸦栖息在风萨塔里。

example.en: A vast crowd gathered in the main square.
example.zh: 主广场上聚集了一大群人。

phrases.zh: 更妙的是；更糟糕的是；尤其是

example.en: How long does it take to have crowns fitted?
example.zh: 镶齿冠需要多长时间？

example.en: a crude estimate of the population available for work
example.zh: 对劳动力人口的粗略估计

example.en: His death was a cruel blow .
example.zh: 他的死是个无情的打击。

example.en: His leg was crushed in the accident.
example.zh: 他的腿在事故中被压断。

example.en: sandwiches with the crusts cut off
example.zh: 切去边皮的三明治

phrases.zh: 与…有很大差别；完全不同；很长的距离或时间
v. 大声呼喊；大声抱怨

example.en: Don’t cry, Laura. It’ll be OK.
example.zh: 不要哭，劳拉，没事的。

example.en: a set of six crystal glasses
example.zh: 六件套水晶玻璃杯

phrases.zh: 水立方（北京奥运会主游泳馆）

example.en: a sugar cube
example.zh: 一块方糖

phrases.zh: 三次样条；三次样条曲线（线图）；三次仿样函数

example.en: the cubic capacity of an engine
example.zh: 引擎汽缸的容积

phrases.zh: 黄瓜精华；小黄瓜萃取液

example.en: The "gurkophone" is one of their classics, made from a hollowed cucumber, a pepper and a carrot.
example.zh: 黄瓜管"是他们的经典乐器之一,那是用掏空的黄瓜、辣椒和胡萝卜做的。

example.en: We speak Danish at home so that the boys don’t lose touch with their language and culture.
example.zh: 我们在家说丹麦语，这样男孩子们就不会脱离他们的语言和文化。

example.en: a cunning opponent
example.zh: 狡猾的对手

phrases.zh: n. 命运；心爱之人或物

example.en: Mathew picked up the cup and sipped his coffee.
example.zh: 马修拿起杯子抿了口咖啡。

phrases.zh: （尤指小孩的）有所企图而假装的热情

example.en: It’s in the kitchen cupboard.
example.zh: 它在厨房的碗柜里。

example.en: She had some acupuncture treatment which seems to have cured her.
example.zh: 她接受了某种针刺疗法，好像把她的病治好了。

example.en: Use a diffuser to maximise the volume and curl of your hair.
example.zh: 使用电吹风罩把头发吹得蓬松卷曲。

example.en: He believed that someone had put a curse on the house.
example.zh: 他相信有人对这房子下了诅咒。

example.en: red velvet curtains
example.zh: 红色的丝绒窗帘

example.en: The curve illustrates costs per capita.
example.zh: 这条曲线显示人均费用。

example.en: a velvet cushion
example.zh: 天鹅绒垫子

phrases.zh: 定做的，非现成的；定制品

example.en: He awoke early, as was his custom.
example.zh: 他很早醒来，这是他的习惯。

example.en: We aim to offer good value and service to all our customers.
example.zh: 我们力求为所有的客户提供物有所值的商品和服务。

phrases.zh: 切断；中断；使死亡；剥夺继承权
v. 削减；砍倒；杀死；删节；胜过

example.en: They’re introducing CCTV cameras in an attempt to cut street crime in the area.
example.zh: 为了减少该地区的街头犯罪，他们安装了闭路电视摄像机。

example.en: a woman’s menstrual cycle
example.zh: 女性的月经周期

example.en: daily flights to Miami
example.zh: 每日飞往迈阿密的航班

phrases.zh: 乳品业，乳品加工业；乳制品行业

example.en: In my childhood, local dairies bought milk from local farmers.
example.zh: 在我小时候，本地的乳品公司向当地农场主收购牛奶。

example.en: Before the dam was built, Campbell River used to flood in the spring.
example.zh: 大坝建好之前，坎贝尔河常在春季发大水。

phrases.zh: 地层损害，油层损害；生产层损坏

example.en: insects that damage crops
example.zh: 破坏庄稼的昆虫

example.en: Wipe the leather with a damp cloth.
example.zh: 用湿布擦拭皮面。

phrases.zh: 不着边际的废话；大肆宣扬

example.en: Come on, let’s dance.
example.zh: 来吧，我们跳舞吧。

example.en: Danger! No boats beyond this point.
example.zh: 危险！船只不可越过此处。

example.en: laws about dangerous dogs
example.zh: 有关危险犬类的法律

example.en: He wanted to ask her, but he didn’t dare.
example.zh: 他想问她，但又不敢。

example.en: a daring rescue attempt
example.zh: 大胆的营救行动

phrases.zh: 在黑暗中；不知道；秘密地

example.en: The church was dark and quiet.
example.zh: 教堂里黑魆魆的，寂静无声。

example.en: Look, darling, there’s Mary.
example.zh: 看呀，亲爱的，玛丽来了。

example.en: Suddenly she dashed down to the cellar.
example.zh: 她猛地朝地窖冲过去。

phrases.zh: 数据挖掘技术（即指从资料中发掘资讯或知识）

example.en: The research involves collecting data from two random samples.
example.zh: 该项研究需要从两个随机样本里收集资料。

phrases.zh: adj. 最新的；最近的；现代的

example.en: The date on the letter was 30th August 1962.
example.zh: 信上的日期是1962年8月30日。

phrases.zh: 父与女（动画短片，曾获奥斯卡最佳动画短片奖）

example.en: She’s got two daughters and one son.
example.zh: 她有两个女儿和一个儿子。

example.en: When dawn broke (= the first light of the day appeared ) , we were still 50 miles from Calcutta.
example.zh: 破晓的时候，我们离加尔各答还有50英里。

phrases.zh: （将来）有一天；总有一天；（过去）某一天

example.en: She only leaves her house during the day.
example.zh: 她只在白天出门。

phrases.zh: 夏令时（指在夏季把标准时间拨早1小时）

example.en: The park is open to the public during daylight hours .
example.zh: 公园白天对公众开放。

phrases.zh: adj. 完全正确的；十分精确的（等于dead-on）

example.en: Her mother had been dead for ten years.
example.zh: 她母亲去世十年了。

example.en: a deadly poison
example.zh: 致命的毒药

phrases.zh: 充耳不闻；不加理睬；不愿听

example.en: communication between deaf and hearing people
example.zh: 失聪者和听力正常者之间的交流

example.en: The prime minister promised farmers a new deal (= a new and fairer system ) .
example.zh: 首相向农民保证推行一项新政策。

example.en: Dear Sir or Madam, ...
example.zh: 尊敬的先生或女士，…

example.en: 1.5 million people are in immediate danger of death from starvation.
example.zh: 150万人正因饥饿而即将面临死亡的危险。

example.en: the gun-control debate in the US
example.zh: 美国有关控制枪支的争论

example.en: ...the last decade of the nineteenth century.
example.zh: …19世纪的最后10年。

phrases.zh: 衰减率；衰变率；衰变速度

example.en: Her body was already starting to decay.
example.zh: 她的尸体已经开始腐烂。

example.en: an atmosphere of hypocrisy and deceit
example.zh: 充满虚伪和欺骗的氛围

example.en: He had been deceived by a young man claiming to be the son of a millionaire.
example.zh: 他被一个自称是百万富翁之子的年轻人骗了。

example.en: In the dark of December.
example.zh: 在十二月的黑夜里。

phrases.zh: 作对…有利的决定；赞成做某事

example.en: Has anything been decided yet?
example.zh: 已经作出什么决定了吗？

example.en: Do you ever wonder if you made the right decision?
example.zh: 你怀疑过自己所作的决定是否正确吗？

example.en: Eddie returned to the flight deck (= the part of an aircraft where the pilot sits ) .
example.zh: 埃迪回到了驾驶舱。

example.en: A state of emergency has been declared.
example.zh: 已宣布进入紧急状态。

example.en: The number of people who have the disease has decreased significantly in recent years.
example.zh: 近年来，这种病的患者人数明显下降。

example.en: Alison cleverly deduced that I was the author of the letter.
example.zh: 艾莉森聪明地推断出我是这封信的作者。

example.en: After the morning’s good deeds he deserved a rest.
example.zh: 上午做了好事之后，他理应休息一下。

phrases.zh: —深陷其中，深深卷入(尤指麻烦)
深陷(于)，专心致力(于)，埋头(于)；沉湎于…中，全神贯注的

example.en: a deep wound
example.zh: 很深的伤口

example.en: The hunter wounded the deer.
example.zh: 猎人打伤了鹿。

example.en: They hoped to defeat the enemy at sea.
example.zh: 他们希望在海上击败敌人。

example.en: All the cars are tested for defects before they leave the factory.
example.zh: 所有汽车在出厂前都经过品质检验。

example.en: The land was flat, giving no scope for defence.
example.zh: 土地非常平坦，无法做防卫之用。

example.en: a struggle to defend our homeland
example.zh: 保卫我们祖国的斗争

example.en: It’s impossible for me to give you a definite answer.
example.zh: 我不可能给你明确的答复。

example.en: ‘Do you reckon Margot will be there?’ ‘ Definitely not .’
example.zh: “你估计玛戈会在那里吗？” “肯定不会。”

example.en: A trade delegation will visit Kuwait.
example.zh: 一个贸易代表团将访问科威特。

example.en: His name was deleted from the list.
example.zh: 他的名字从名单上删掉了。

example.en: delicate hand-cut glass
example.zh: 易碎的手工刻花玻璃

example.en: ‘The meal was absolutely delicious,’ she said politely.
example.zh: “这顿饭味道好极了。” 她礼貌地说道。

phrases.zh: 传送系统；运载系统；分配系统

example.en: Most Indian restaurants offer free delivery.
example.zh: 大多数印度餐馆提供免费外送服务。

phrases.zh: n. 社会主义；社会民主主义
协商民主；审议民主；商议性民主
自由民主；自由民主主义；自由民主制（一种政府形式，由人民选出的民意代表行使决策权力）

example.en: a return to democracy after 16 years of military rule
example.zh: 16年军人统治后民主制度的恢复

example.en: a dense rurally-based population
example.zh: 居住在乡村的密集人口

phrases.zh: deny someone something 拒绝给予

example.en: The government denied the existence of poverty among 16- and 17-year-olds.
example.zh: 政府否认十六七岁的青少年当中存在贫困问题。

example.en: Flights by Air Europe depart Gatwick on Tuesdays.
example.zh: 欧洲航空公司的航班每逢周二从盖特威克机场起飞。

phrases.zh: 出发时间；撤离时刻；起飞时刻

example.en: There are several departures for New York every day.
example.zh: 每天有好几个班次去纽约。

example.en: He depended on his writing for his income.
example.zh: 他靠写作谋生。

example.en: Jan’s mother was dependent on her for physical care.
example.zh: 简的母亲要靠简来照顾。

example.en: The female deposits her eggs directly into the water.
example.zh: 雌性把卵直接产在水中。

example.en: The thought of taking the exam again depressed him.
example.zh: 想到要补考，他就心情沮丧。

example.en: Astronomers may one day travel to the depths of space.
example.zh: 天文学家也许有一天可以到太空深处去。

phrases.zh: vt. 突然到达）；袭击（突然降临

example.en: Our plane started to descend.
example.zh: 我们的飞机开始下降。

example.en: The police asked her to describe the man.
example.zh: 警察叫她描述一下那名男子。

example.en: The booklet gives a brief description of each place.
example.zh: 这本小册子对每一个地方都作了简短的介绍。

example.en: The tower was designed by Gilbert Scott.
example.zh: 这座塔楼是吉尔伯特·斯科特设计的。

example.en: The ability to speak a foreign language is highly desirable .
example.zh: 能说一门外语是非常理想的。

example.en: The noise from the neighbours used to drive him to despair .
example.zh: 过去，邻居的噪音常常吵得他心烦意乱。

example.en: I had no money left and was desperate.
example.zh: 我身无分文，已经走投无路了。

example.en: She despised her neighbours.
example.zh: 她看不起她的邻居。

phrases.zh: 旅游胜地；旅游目的地；旅游景点

example.en: Ellis Island has become one of America's most popular tourist destinations.
example.zh: 埃利斯岛已经成为美国最受欢迎的游览地之一。

example.en: companies that are polluting and destroying the environment
example.zh: 污染和破坏环境的公司

example.en: Knowledge in the field of genetics has been developing very rapidly.
example.zh: 遗传学领域的知识发展非常迅速。

example.en: child development
example.zh: 儿童发育

phrases.zh: 讨厌…的，异常的…，非常恼人(或糟糕)的；有趣的；极麻烦的

example.en: The villagers believed a devil had taken control of his body.
example.zh: 村民们认为他被邪魔附身了。

example.en: She devised a method for quicker communications between offices.
example.zh: 她想出一种加快办公室之间通信联络的方法。

example.en: The dew gathered on the leaves.
example.zh: 露水在叶片上聚集。

phrases.zh: [物理]（表示物质的各种相态平衡关系的）相图
转盘电话机；自动电话（等于dial phone）

example.en: The lighted dial of her watch said 1.20.
example.zh: 她手表上的夜光表面显示时间为1点20分。

example.en: the local dialect
example.zh: 当地方言

example.en: In this dialog, you can only open an artifact in the editor.
example.zh: 在这个对话框中，您只可以在编辑器中打开一个工件。

phrases.zh: 粒径；颗粒直径，粒子直径

example.en: ...a tube less than a fifth of the diameter of a human hair.
example.zh: …一根直径不到头发五分之一的微管。

example.en: a diamond engagement ring
example.zh: 订婚钻戒

example.en: Inge kept a diary (= wrote in a diary ) during the war years.
example.zh: 英奇在战争年代里一直写日记。

example.en: There were no secretaries available to take dictation (= write down what someone is saying ) .
example.zh: 身边没有秘书记录口授内容。

phrases.zh: 汉英词典；汉英字典；汉英辞典

example.en: a German-English dictionary
example.zh: 一本德英词典

example.en: He died in 1985 at the age of 76.
example.zh: 他1985年去世，终年76岁。

phrases.zh: 不同在；在…方面存在不同

example.en: The two systems differ in many respects.
example.zh: 这两个系统在许多方面不同。

example.en: (= there’s a very big difference ) between us.
example.zh: 我们之间有着天壤之别。

phrases.zh: 以不同方式；用不同的方法；通过不同的方式

example.en: The place looks completely different now.
example.zh: 这地方现在完全变了。

example.en: a difficult question
example.zh: 难解的问题

example.en: freshly dug carrots
example.zh: 刚挖出来的胡萝卜

example.en: Most babies can digest a wide range of food easily.
example.zh: 大多数婴儿能轻易地消化很多种食物。

example.en: digital TV
example.zh: 数字电视

example.en: in the dim light of the early dawn
example.zh: 在微弱的晨曦里

example.en: a rectangle with the dimensions 5cm × 2cm
example.zh: 长五厘米、宽两厘米的长方形

example.en: What time do you usually have dinner?
example.zh: 你通常什么时候吃饭？

example.en: Dip each apple in the syrup until thickly coated.
example.zh: 把每个苹果在糖浆里蘸一下，直到被厚厚地裹上糖浆。

phrases.zh: n. 外国直接投资，对外直接投资

example.en: Experienced users have direct access to the main data files.
example.zh: 高级用户可直接浏览主数据文档。

example.en: The new property tax law won’t directly affect us.
example.zh: 新的财产税法不会直接影响到我们。

phrases.zh: 副处长；副主任；副院长；副会长

example.en: The company is run by a board of directors (= a group of directors ) .
example.zh: 这家公司由董事会管理。

example.en: You should have seen the dirt on that car!
example.zh: 你没看见那车上沾了多少泥！

example.en: a stack of dirty dishes in the sink
example.zh: 洗涤槽里的一堆脏碟子

example.en: Carter was permanently disabled in the war.
example.zh: 卡特在那场战争中成了终生残废。

phrases.zh: 消除分歧，求同存异；同意各自保留不同意见

example.en: Barr strongly disagreed with Kronfeld’s statement.
example.zh: 巴尔强烈反对克龙费尔德的说法。

example.en: I hated to disappoint her.
example.zh: 我不愿意让她失望。

example.en: One hundred and twenty people died in China’s worst air disaster .
example.zh: 有120人在中国这起最惨烈的空难事故中丧生。

example.en: Read the manufacturer's guidelines before discarding the box.
example.zh: 先阅读制造商的说明书再把盒子丢掉。

example.en: The book gives parents advice on discipline.
example.zh: 这本书指导父母如何管教孩子。

example.en: Some companies have already voluntarily disclosed similar information .
example.zh: 一些公司已经主动透露了类似的信息。

phrases.zh: 伟大的发现；好棒的发现

example.en: I felt I'd made an incredible discovery.
example.zh: 我感到自己有了一个惊人的发现。

example.en: Littman refused to discuss the case publicly.
example.zh: 利特曼拒绝公开讨论此案。

example.en: class discussions
example.zh: 课堂讨论

example.en: His father died of heart disease.
example.zh: 他父亲死于心脏病。

phrases.zh: 伪装，假扮成；托辞；以……为借口

example.en: He made no attempt to disguise his agitation.
example.zh: 他无意掩饰他的不安。

example.en: He reached into the bin with a look of disgust on his face.
example.zh: 他把手伸进垃圾箱，脸上带着厌恶的表情。

example.en: a serving dish
example.zh: 上菜用的盘子

example.en: I dare not quit my post, though an unfaithful sentinel, whose sure reward is death and dishonour, when his dreary watch shall come to an end!
example.zh: 虽说我是个不忠于职守的哨兵，等到这种沉网的守望终了的时候，我所能得到的报酬只能是不光彩的死亡，但我仍不敢擅离岗位！

example.en: The program takes up 2.5 megabytes of disk space and can be run on a standard personal computer.
example.zh: 这个程序占用2.5 兆字节的磁盘空间，可以在标准个人电脑上运行。

example.en: Why do you dislike her so much?
example.zh: 你为什么那么讨厌她？

example.en: The government has dismissed criticisms that the country’s health policy is a mess.
example.zh: 有人认为国家医疗政策一塌糊涂，政府对这种批评持否认态度。

example.en: severe eating disorders such as bulimia and anorexia
example.zh: 像贪食症和厌食症这类严重的进食障碍

example.en: If there are aspects of your life that displease you make you feel regret, this is an opportunity to change direction.
example.zh: 如果你生活中那些使你不愉快的方面让你觉得懊悔，那么这正是你改变方向的时机。

phrases.zh: 废物处理；废物处理装置
任意使用；任你自由支配；听你差遣

example.en: bomb disposal experts
example.zh: 拆弹专家

phrases.zh: 处理；转让；解决；吃光；除掉；卖掉

example.en: Stir until the sugar dissolves.
example.zh: 一直搅拌到糖溶解掉。

phrases.zh: 以优异成绩，以杰出的表现

example.en: Eliot’s distinction as a poet
example.zh: 艾略特作为诗人的杰出才能

example.en: a distribution centre
example.zh: 经销中心

example.en: Sorry to disturb you, but I have an urgent message.
example.zh: 对不起打扰一下，我有个紧急消息。

example.en: Both vehicles ended up in a ditch.
example.zh: 两辆车都掉进了沟里。

phrases.zh: v. 投入；把手伸入；钻研
开始大吃；头朝下跳入水中

example.en: Diving off the cliffs is dangerous.
example.zh: 从悬崖上跳水是很危险的。

example.en: Why doesn’t she get a divorce ?
example.zh: 她为什么不离婚呢？

example.en: ‘Will Kay come?’ ‘She may do.’
example.zh: “凯来吗？” “或许吧。”

phrases.zh: n. 码头；灌油码头；装货码头

example.en: A crowd was waiting at the dock to greet them.
example.zh: 一群人在码头等着迎接他们。

example.en: She was treated by her local doctor.
example.zh: 她由她的本区医生治疗。

phrases.zh: [口语]莫惹是非，别惹麻烦，不自找麻烦；别多事[亦作 don't wake a sleeping dog]

example.en: I could hear a dog barking .
example.zh: 我听到了狗吠声。

example.en: It cost three dollars.
example.zh: 它要三美元。

example.en: Could you open the door for me?
example.zh: 请你帮我开门好吗？

example.en: But I had no food in my dorm, so I had to go to canteen.
example.zh: 但是我在宿舍没有东西可吃，所以我只能去餐厅了。

example.en: I quite like Jamie in small doses (= in limited amounts but not a lot or often ) .
example.zh: 如果偶尔在一起的话，我还是蛮喜欢杰米的。

example.en: a pattern of dots
example.zh: 圆点图案

example.en: a double sink
example.zh: 双水槽

example.en: There was still one little nagging doubt at the back of his mind.
example.zh: 他的心头仍有一丝挥之不去的疑虑。

example.en: ‘Everything’s going to be all right, you’ll see.’ Jenny looked doubtful .
example.zh: “一切都会顺顺当当的，你等着看好了。” 珍妮看起来不大相信的样子。

example.en: Doubtless there would be lots of rumours.
example.zh: 无疑会谣言四起。

phrases.zh: 下降；平静下来；传下去；被接受

example.en: David bent down to tie his shoelace.
example.zh: 戴维弯腰系鞋带。

example.en: Rosie ran downstairs to answer the door.
example.zh: 罗茜跑下楼去开门。

phrases.zh: 向下旋转；螺旋式下跌；减记恶性循环

example.en: a gentle downward slope
example.zh: 缓坡

example.en: a dozen eggs
example.zh: 一打鸡蛋

example.en: the rough draft of his new novel
example.zh: 他的新小说的草稿

example.en: He grabbed her arm and dragged her into the room.
example.zh: 他抓住她的手臂把她拖进房间。

phrases.zh: 地漏；地面排水管；楼面排水

example.en: He flushed the drain.
example.zh: 他用水冲排水沟。

example.en: the great traditions of ancient Greek drama
example.zh: 古希腊戏剧的伟大传统

example.en: the amateur dramatic society
example.zh: 业余剧团

example.en: Katie had drawn a cottage with a little stream running next to it.
example.zh: 凯蒂画了一间小茅舍，旁边流淌着一条小溪。

phrases.zh: 社会最上层；最上层抽屉；最高级的

example.en: She took a file from her desk drawer .
example.zh: 她从书桌的抽屉里拿出了一个文件夹。

example.en: I’ve never been very good at drawing.
example.zh: 我向来不擅长画图。

phrases.zh: 暗黑之主（游戏中任务名称）

example.en: The prospect of flying filled me with dread .
example.zh: 想到要乘飞机我充满了恐惧。

phrases.zh: 毫不费力地；轻而易举地；完美地

example.en: I had lots of dreams last night.
example.zh: 昨晚我做了很多梦。

phrases.zh: v. 打扮，装饰；穿上盛装

example.en: a gentleman in evening dress
example.zh: 穿晚礼服的绅士

phrases.zh: 零点漂移；最小容量；起点电容

example.en: Smoke drifted up from the jungle ahead of us.
example.zh: 我们前方的丛林里有烟升起。

example.en: rifle drill
example.zh: 步枪操练

phrases.zh: n. 喝的东西；一些喝的东西

example.en: You should drink plenty of water.
example.zh: 你应该大量喝水。

example.en: The tap’s dripping .
example.zh: 水龙头在滴水。

example.en: Torrential rain drove the players off the course.
example.zh: 滂沱大雨迫使选手们离开了赛场。

example.en: a taxi driver
example.zh: 出租车司机

example.en: Your button has dropped off.
example.zh: 你的纽扣掉了。

example.en: ...a country where drought and famines have killed up to two million people during the last eighteen years.
example.zh: …过去18年来干旱和饥荒致死达两百万人的一个国家。

example.en: Many people drowned when the boat overturned.
example.zh: 船翻后许多人淹死了。

example.en: a drug used in the treatment of cancer
example.zh: 用于治疗癌症的一种药物

phrases.zh: 招徕（顾客）；[口]竭力争取；纠集；鼓动

example.en: a big bass drum
example.zh: 一面低音大鼓

example.en: You’re drunk.
example.zh: 你喝醉了。

phrases.zh: 在干的地方；在不受雨淋的地方

example.en: I need to change into some dry clothes .
example.zh: 我要换上干衣服。

example.en: roast duck with orange sauce
example.zh: 烤鸭配橘子酱

example.en: Life is never dull when Elizabeth is here.
example.zh: 有伊丽莎白在这里生活绝不会无聊。

phrases.zh: n. 小型送货升降机；送菜升降机，餐用升降机

example.en: ...a young deaf and dumb man.
example.zh: …一名年轻的聋哑人。

example.en: The course is of three years’ duration.
example.zh: 该课程为期三年。

example.en: During the summer she worked as a lifeguard.
example.zh: 夏天她当过救生员。

example.en: The street lights go on at dusk.
example.zh: 街灯在黄昏时亮起来。

example.en: I promise I will do my duty .
example.zh: 我保证会尽到我的责任。

example.en: Some 3,500 new dwellings are planned for the area.
example.zh: 大约三千五百套新住宅计划在这个地区新建。

example.en: The women prepared, spun, and dyed the wool.
example.zh: 妇女们将羊毛预备、纺线并染色。

phrases.zh: 每天有人在死去；有些地方的人们正逐渐死亡；不断有人死去；有人濒临死亡

example.en: It was her dying wish to have a simple burial.
example.zh: 她的临终遗愿是办个简朴的葬礼。

phrases.zh: 动态分析；动力特性分析

example.en: dynamic and ambitious people
example.zh: 精力充沛且雄心勃勃的人

example.en: They reviewed each aspect of the plan bit by bit.
example.zh: 他们对计划的各个方面逐一地进行了审核。

phrases.zh: 做事非常卖力气的人，做事勤奋的人（特别指做事过于卖力气以讨好上司的人）

example.en: He’s a bright kid and eager to learn.
example.zh: 他是个聪明的孩子，热爱学习。

phrases.zh: （美）秃鹰（美国的国鸟）；比喻秃头的政治家

example.en: the planet Earth

example.zh: 6月28日加州南部地区发生了里氏6.1级地震。

example.zh: 她的尖叫声过后是响亮的回声。

phrases.zh: 经济体制；经济体系，经济系统；经济制度

example.zh: 经济增长缓慢。

phrases.zh: 经济效率，经济效果；经济有效

example.en: A small car is more economical to run.
example.zh: 开小型汽车比较省油。

example.en: a successful economy
example.zh: 发展成功的经济

example.en: Put the eggs in the centre of the dish, with the vegetables and herbs around the edge.
example.zh: 把鸡蛋放在盘子中间，盘边一圈放些蔬菜和香草。

phrases.zh: 文字编辑器，文本编辑器

example.zh: 现代诗歌论文集的编者

example.zh: 奥默罗德学校的教育对象为残疾儿童。

example.en: She also hopes her children will get a good education.
example.zh: 她也希望她的孩子可以受到良好的教育。

phrases.zh: 有成本效益的；划算的；成本效率

example.en: The cheaper drugs are just as effective in treating arthritis.
example.zh: 较便宜的药品对治疗关节炎同样有效。

phrases.zh: 工作效率；劳动效率；加工效率

example.en: considerable advancements in energy efficiency
example.zh: 能源效率的显著提高

example.en: a very efficient secretary
example.zh: 效率高的秘书

example.en: Lou lifted the box easily, without using much effort.
example.zh: 卢没费多大力气就把箱子搬了起来。

phrases.zh: 金蛋(便于创造就业机会的场所)

example.en: Blackbirds lay their eggs in March.
example.zh: 乌鸫在3月产蛋。

phrases.zh: 八国集团（指美、德、英、法、意、加、日、俄八国组成的国际经济同盟）
八仙（中国传统神化人物）

example.en: It’s only eight days till Christmas.
example.zh: 还有8天就到圣诞节了。

example.en: At least eighteen bullets were fired.
example.zh: 至少射出了18颗子弹。

example.en: Until then, students could leave after the eighth grade, and a lot of them did.
example.zh: 那时，学生上完八年级就可以辍学，许多学生的确这样做了。

example.en: The band was incredibly successful in the eighties.
example.zh: 这支乐队在80年代红透半边天。

example.en: pure silks embroidered with elaborate patterns
example.zh: 绣有精美图案的真丝衣服

example.en: Make a mask with long ears and attach a piece of elastic to go around the back of the head.
example.zh: 做一个带长耳朵的面具，安上一条松紧带绕过后脑。

phrases.zh: 肘部发炎；网球运动员常见的肘伤
