example.zh: 他滑倒了，严重挫伤了一只胳膊肘。

example.en: Sarah is the elder of the two.
example.zh: 两人当中萨拉年纪较长。

example.en: the country’s first democratically elected government
example.zh: 该国第一个民主选举产生的政府

example.en: The Labour Party won the 2001 election by a huge majority.
example.zh: 工党在2001年选举中以巨大优势获胜。

example.en: an electric blanket
example.zh: 电热毯

phrases.zh: 电气设备；电力设备；电器设备

example.en: The fire was caused by an electrical fault.
example.zh: 大火是电力故障引起的。

example.en: The farm was very isolated, but it had electricity.
example.zh: 那个农场非常偏远，但有电力供应。

phrases.zh: 电子显微镜学，电子显微镜

example.en: Most things are balanced - with equal numbers of electrons and protons.
example.zh: 大部分物体都是电荷平衡的——含等量的电子和质子。

example.en: electronic games
example.zh: 电子游戏

phrases.zh: 消费性电子产品；家用电子产品
电力电子学；动力电子设备

example.en: an electronics engineer
example.zh: 电子工程师

phrases.zh: n. 初等教育，基本教育（指小学）

example.en: the elementary principles of justice and democracy
example.zh: 正义和民主的基本信条

phrases.zh: 白象，灰色象（在印度、东南亚被视为神圣之物）；无价值的东西

example.en: A trunk distinguishes the elephant.
example.zh: 长鼻是象的特征。

phrases.zh: 斗式提升机；斗式运输机
液压升降机；液压卷杨机；水力提升机

example.en: We’ll have to take the elevator.
example.zh: 我们只好坐电梯了。

example.en: She was sent to jail for eleven months.
example.zh: 她被判入狱11个月。

example.en: Moving up from tenth to eleventh grade was a major one.
example.zh: 从十年级升到十一年级是个重要的阶段。

phrases.zh: 高斯消去法，高斯消元法

example.en: Breast-feeding is as natural as sex or elimination or any other bodily function.
example.zh: 母乳哺养是天生的，就像性交、排泄或者其他任何身体功能一样。

example.en: There’s something else I’d like to talk about as well.
example.zh: 我还有其他事情要谈一谈。

example.en: She is becoming famous in Australia and elsewhere.
example.zh: 她在澳大利亚和其他地方渐渐出名了。

example.en: Her voice was full of emotion.
example.zh: 她的声音充满了激情。

example.en: They  bowed before the emperor as he entered the court.
example.zh: 皇帝进入朝廷时他们都向他鞠躬致敬。

example.en: a change of emphasis in government policy
example.zh: 政府政策重心的变化

phrases.zh: 罗马帝国（指公元前27年到公元476年的罗马奴隶制国家）
n. 帝国州（美国纽约州的别称）

example.en: the Roman empire
example.zh: 罗马帝国

example.en: The factory employs over 2,000 people.
example.zh: 这家工厂雇用了2,000多名员工。

example.en: a government employee
example.zh: 政府雇员

example.en: The shoe factory is the largest employer in this area.
example.zh: 这家制鞋厂是本地区最大的雇主。

phrases.zh: 就业率；雇用率；人力资源新进率

example.en: She was offered employment in the sales office.
example.zh: 她获聘在销售部工作。

phrases.zh: 真空，真空区；架空层；空档

example.en: an empty box
example.zh: 空盒子

example.en: Please enclose a cheque with your order.
example.zh: 请随订单附上支票。

example.en: The doctor had encountered several similar cases in the past.
example.zh: 那位医生过去曾碰到过好几个类似病例。

example.en: He wore spectacles perched on the very end of his nose.
example.zh: 他的眼镜架在鼻尖上。

example.en: Verbal nouns have the ending -ing.
example.zh: 动名词以-ing结尾。

phrases.zh: 无尽的爱；永无止境的爱
无穷尽的结；循环链；无端环链

example.en: an endless stream of visitors
example.zh: 川流不息的游客

example.en: She’s a dangerous enemy to have.
example.zh: 与她为敌很危险。

example.en: The water is heated using energy from the sun.
example.zh: 水是利用太阳能加热的。

example.en: Parking restrictions will be strictly enforced.
example.zh: 停车限制将会严格执行。

phrases.zh: 总工程师；[船]轮机长；主任工程师；总技师

example.en: He trained as a civil engineer (= one who designs and builds roads, bridges etc ).
example.zh: 他接受过土木工程师培训。

example.en: Their inventions have contributed to the development of electrical engineering.
example.zh: 他们的发明有助于电气工程学的发展。

example.en: Do you speak English?
example.zh: 你会说英语吗？

example.en: He was the only Englishman present.
example.zh: 他是在场的唯一一名英国人。

example.en: Sandra enjoys her job in the city.
example.zh: 桑德拉很喜欢她在城里的这份工作。

example.en: an operation to enlarge her breasts
example.zh: 她的丰胸手术

phrases.zh: 足够地，充分的；对……足够的

example.en: Her disappearance and death would give proof enough of Charles' guilt.
example.zh: 她的失踪和死亡将提供足够的证据证明查尔斯有罪。

phrases.zh: 进入；讨论；成为…的一部分；研讨；分享；体谅
参加（竞赛，活动等）；报名参加（比赛）

example.en: He entered the election as the clear favourite.
example.zh: 他参加竞选时显然最有希望获胜。

example.en: Mark usually does the cooking when we entertain.
example.zh: 我们招待客人时通常都是马克下厨。

example.en: Gillian and Darren greeted the speakers with great enthusiasm.
example.zh: 吉利恩和达伦非常热情地接待了演讲者。

example.en: an enthusiastic supporter of reform
example.zh: 改革的热心支持者

phrases.zh: (邮票)附贴在信封(或明信片、邮件包装纸等)上的

example.en: It was the worst day in my entire life.
example.zh: 那是我一生中最糟糕的一天。

phrases.zh: 大门，正门入口；主要入口

example.en: the station entrance
example.zh: 车站的入口处

example.en: There was no sign of a forced entry.
example.zh: 没有强行闯入的迹象。

example.en: envelopes and stamps
example.zh: 信封和邮票

example.en: Some of these chemicals are very damaging to the environment.
example.zh: 这些化学品中有些对环境非常有害。

example.en: I really envy you and Ian, you seem so happy together.
example.zh: 我真是羡慕你和伊恩，你俩在一起看起来多幸福。

example.en: In the equation 2x + 1 = 7, what is x?
example.zh: 在方程式2x+1=7中，x的值为多少？

example.en: They try to equip their vehicles with gadgets to deal with every possible contingency.
example.zh: 他们尽量给他们的车辆配备各种小装置以应付任何可能的突发状况。

example.en: a shop selling camping equipment
example.zh: 出售露营装备的商店

example.en: an imposing town hall, erected in 1892
example.zh: 一座气势宏伟的市政厅，建于1892年

example.en: an error message
example.zh: 出错信息

phrases.zh: 迂回进路；脱险通道；疏散路线
太平梯，太平门；安全出口

example.en: Vents allow any steam to escape if the system overheats.
example.zh: 如果系统过热，排放口可使蒸汽逸出。

example.en: I never liked long walks, especially in winter.
example.zh: 我向来不喜欢长距离散步，尤其在冬天。

example.en: eastern Europe
example.zh: 东欧

example.en: European languages
example.zh: 欧洲的语言

example.en: Most of the water had evaporated.
example.zh: 大部分的水都蒸发了。

example.en: We’re arriving on Christmas Eve.
example.zh: 我们将在平安夜到达。

example.en: Most companies have suffered a drop in their profits, even very large companies.
example.zh: 大多数公司的利润都出现下滑，甚至连很大的公司也不例外。

example.en: I do most of my studying in the evening.
example.zh: 我学习大都在晚上。

example.en: one of the most important events in the history of mankind
example.zh: 人类历史上最重大的事件之一

example.en: He eventually escaped and made his way back to England.
example.zh: 他终于逃脱并返回英格兰。

example.en: Nothing ever seems to upset him.
example.zh: 似乎从来没有什么事情会使他烦恼。

example.en: His every utterance will be scrutinized.
example.zh: 他说的每句话都会被细查。

example.en: the problems of everyday life
example.zh: 日常生活中的问题

example.en: If everyone is ready, I’ll begin.
example.zh: 如果大家都准备好了，我就开始。

phrases.zh: 一切事物；以及其他等等
[口语]具有各种优点(或吸引力、所需之物等)

example.en: Everything was covered in a thick layer of dust.
example.zh: 所有东西上面都蒙着厚厚一层灰。

example.en: I’ve looked everywhere but I can’t find the map.
example.zh: 我到处都找过了，但就是找不到地图。

phrases.zh: [非规范用语]正是同一个，正是这个；完全相同的
精密科学（如数学、物理学、化学等）

example.en: Police are still investigating the exact cause of the accident.
example.zh: 警方还在调查这起事故的确切原因。

example.en: It’s exactly half past five.
example.zh: 一分不差，正好5点半。

example.en: At the end of each level, there’s an exam.
example.zh: 在每一级别结束时都有一次考试。

example.en: The examination results will be announced in September.
example.zh: 考试成绩将于9月公布。

example.en: A team of divers was sent down to examine the wreck.
example.zh: 一组潜水员被送到水下检查沉船。

example.en: Many countries, for example Mexico and Japan, have a lot of earthquakes.
example.zh: 许多国家，例如墨西哥和日本，经常发生地震。

example.en: Working hours must not exceed 42 hours a week.
example.zh: 工作时间每周不得超过42小时。

example.en: Thank you. You’ve been exceedingly kind.
example.zh: 谢谢，你真是太好了。

example.en: They were all there except me.
example.zh: 除了我以外他们都在那里。

example.en: His playing is technically brilliant, but it doesn’t excite me.
example.zh: 他的演奏技巧娴熟，但并不让我激动。

example.en: an exciting discovery
example.zh: 激动人心的发现

example.en: ‘No!’ she exclaimed in shock.
example.zh: “不！”她惊呼道。

example.en: These are not involved as exclusively as ministers in "soul-work," but they certainly cultivate the inner life more than the third group.
example.zh: 他们虽不像牧师那样专门做“灵魂方面的工作”，但是肯定比第三群体更注重于建造人类的生命。

example.en: a shopping excursion
example.zh: 购物游

phrases.zh: v. 为自己辩解；请求免除；请求准予离开
(对不能出席社交聚会等)表示抱歉(或遗憾)

example.en: I’ll excuse you this time, but don’t be late again.
example.zh: 这次我原谅你，但别再迟到了。

example.en: 13 people were summarily executed (= killed without any trial or legal process ) by the guerrillas.
example.zh: 有13人被游击队员就地处决。

phrases.zh: 行政长官；董事长；美国总统；（美国的）州长

example.en: a commission with executive powers
example.zh: 有执行权的委员会

phrases.zh: 常规性的锻炼；经常操练，按时训练

example.en: Try to fit some regular exercise into your daily routine.
example.zh: 尽量在日常生活中安排一些经常性的锻炼。

example.en: They exerted considerable influence within the school.
example.zh: 他们在校内施加了很大的影响力。

example.en: Her paintings have been exhibited all over the world.
example.zh: 她的绘画作品在世界各地展出。

phrases.zh: 以…形式(或形态)存在，作为…而存在，

example.en: The custom of arranged marriages still exists in many countries.
example.zh: 许多国家仍存在包办婚姻的习俗。

phrases.zh: 现有的；现存的；实际存在的；实有的

example.en: Scientists have many theories about how the universe first came into existence (= started to exist ).
example.zh: 关于宇宙的起源，科学家有多种理论。

phrases.zh: 退出策略；回收策略；退出投资策略

example.en: We made for the nearest exit.
example.zh: 我们走向最近的出口。

phrases.zh: 业务扩张，营业扩充；经济高涨
膨胀系数，膨胀率；展开系数

example.en: The industry underwent a period of rapid expansion.
example.zh: 该产业经历了一轮快速扩张。

example.en: He will be hard to beat. I fully expect (= am completely sure about ) that and I’m ready.
example.zh: 他很难击败。我确信这一点，不过我准备好了。

example.en: He borrowed £150,000 and used the money for legal expenses.
example.zh: 他借了15万英镑用于支付律师费。

example.en: the most expensive restaurant in town
example.zh: 城里最贵的餐馆

example.en: The advice in the booklet reflects the practical experience we have gained (= experience gained by actually doing something, rather than knowledge from books etc ).
example.zh: 小册子中的建议反映了我们所获得的实践经验。

example.en: The astronauts are conducting a series of experiments to learn more about how the body adapts to weightlessness.
example.zh: 那些宇航员正在进行一系列实验，以便更多地了解人体如何适应失重状态。

example.en: experimental animals
example.zh: 用于实验的动物

phrases.zh: 为自己辩解；说明自己意图

example.en: He carefully explained the procedure.
example.zh: 他仔细解释了程序。

example.en: She told the court she would give a full explanation of the prosecution's decision on Monday.
example.zh: 她告诉法庭她将在星期一就控方的决定做出详尽的解释。

example.en: The device was thrown at an army patrol but failed to explode.
example.zh: 炸弹投向了陆军巡逻队，但没有爆炸。

phrases.zh: 易爆气，爆炸气；爆炸性气体

example.en: ...one-hundred-and-fifty pounds of Semtex explosive.
example.zh: …150磅的塞姆汀塑料炸药。

phrases.zh: 进出口；导入和导出；输入和输出

example.en: Italian food has been exported all over the world.
example.zh: 意大利食品已传遍世界。

example.en: Parents have expressed their concerns about their children’s safety.
example.zh: 父母对自己孩子的安全表示忧虑。

example.en: Student leaders are demanding greater freedom of expression (= the right to say what you think without being punished ).
example.zh: 学生领袖要求得到更多的言论自由。

example.en: Management have agreed to extend the deadline.
example.zh: 管理层已同意延长最后期限。

example.en: The house stands in extensive grounds.
example.zh: 这栋房子占地面积很大。

example.en: The exterior walls need a new coat of paint.
example.zh: 外墙需要刷新漆了。

example.en: the external appearance of the building
example.zh: 大楼的外观

phrases.zh: 额外的钱；[英国俚语]超速罚款单

example.en: Could you get an extra loaf of bread?
example.zh: 你能多拿一条面包吗？

example.en: Extreme poverty still exists in many rural areas.
example.zh: 许多农村地区仍处于赤贫状态。

example.en: Earthquakes are extremely difficult to predict.
example.zh: 地震非常难以预测。

phrases.zh: adv. 从表面上看来；公然
对…很有兴趣，对…有很深的爱好；对…有敏锐的鉴赏力；能欣赏；能判断

example.en: He’s got beautiful eyes.
example.zh: 他有一双漂亮的眼睛。

example.en: He had a problem with his eyesight.
example.zh: 他的视力有问题。

example.en: the fable of the fox and the crow
example.zh: 狐狸和乌鸦的寓言故事

example.en: our new range of fabrics and wallpapers
example.zh: 我们新的织物和墙纸系列

example.en: She had a beautiful face.
example.zh: 她面容秀美。

phrases.zh: 事实和数字；准确的资料；确凿的事实

example.en: Our decision to build the museum in Hartlepool was influenced by the fact that there were no national museums in the North East.
example.zh: 我们之所以决定在哈特尔浦建造博物馆，是因为东北地区没有国家级的博物馆。

example.en: The rise in crime is mainly due to social and economic factors.
example.zh: 犯罪率上升主要由社会和经济因素造成。

example.en: a car factory
example.zh: 汽车制造厂

example.en: the Engineering Faculty
example.zh: 工程学院

example.en: 72˚ Fahrenheit (= 72 degrees on the Fahrenheit scale )
example.zh: 72华氏度

example.en: It looks likely that the peace talks will fail.
example.zh: 看来和平谈判可能会失败。

example.en: Successful people often aren’t very good at dealing with failure.
example.zh: 一帆风顺的人往往不太擅长应对失败。

phrases.zh: 由于…原因而衰弱；因…而昏厥

example.en: a faint hope that they might be alive
example.zh: 他们渺茫的生还希望

example.en: The house had a fairly large garden.
example.zh: 那幢房子有个不小的花园。

example.en: a faithful friend
example.zh: 忠诚的朋友

phrases.zh: 到期；集合；排队；倒塌；与某人在一起

example.en: The tree was about to fall.
example.zh: 那棵树快要倒下了。

phrases.zh: 假警报；引起一场空喜欢的人
火灾误报率；误警率；虚率

example.en: ...a set of false teeth.
example.zh: …一副假牙。

example.en: He claims he is not really interested in fame.
example.zh: 他称自己对出名真的没有兴趣。

example.en: Do you know the family next door?
example.zh: 你认识隔壁那家人吗？

example.en: the great potato famine in Ireland
example.zh: 爱尔兰严重的土豆荒

example.en: a famous actor
example.zh: 著名演员

example.en: Groups of football fans began heading towards the ground.
example.zh: 成群结队的球迷开始向球场走去。

example.en: We can walk to my house from here. It isn’t far.
example.zh: 我们可以从这里步行去我家，不远。

phrases.zh: 公共汽车票钱；公车票；公车费率
飞机票价；航空费用；航空票价

example.en: He could barely afford the fare.
example.zh: 他几乎付不起车费。

example.en: 40 of her colleagues gathered for her farewell presentation.
example.zh: 40位同事来参加了她的欢送会。

example.en: a 300-hectare farm
example.zh: 一座300公顷的农场

example.en: We decided not to go any farther.
example.zh: 我们决定不再往前走了。

example.en: Please leave the building in an orderly fashion.
example.zh: 请大家有秩序地离开大楼。

example.en: Strong colours are very fashionable at the moment.
example.zh: 眼下流行艳丽的色彩。

example.en: a fast car
example.zh: 速度很快的汽车

phrases.zh: v. 集中于；把...强加于；纠缠；抓住，紧紧握住

example.en: Make sure all the windows are securely fastened before you leave.
example.zh: 离开前要确保所有的窗子都已关严。

phrases.zh: 父与女（动画短片，曾获奥斯卡最佳动画短片奖）
基督教圣父（指上帝）；天主教徒对罗马教皇的尊称

example.en: Ask your father to help you.
example.zh: 叫你父亲帮你。

example.en: His worst fault is his arrogance.
example.zh: 他最大的缺点是傲慢。

example.en: Customers may ask for a refund if the goods are faulty.
example.zh: 商品有问题的话，顾客可以要求退货。

example.en: Could you do me a favour and tell Kelly I can’t make it?
example.zh: 你帮个忙告诉凯莉说我来不了好吗？

example.en: favourable film reviews
example.zh: 正面的影评

example.en: a child’s favourite toy
example.zh: 孩子最喜欢的玩具

example.en: I was sitting on the floor shivering with fear because a bullet had been fired through a window.
example.zh: 我坐在地板上吓得浑身发抖，因为有一颗子弹射穿窗户打了进来。

example.en: a shy and fearful child
example.zh: 一个羞涩、胆怯的小孩

phrases.zh: 尽情欣赏；尽情享受；大吃大喝
n. 节日；斋日；宗教节日

example.en: a wedding feast
example.zh: 婚筵

phrases.zh: 白羽毛（怯懦的象征）；胆怯，害怕

example.en: an ostrich feather
example.zh: 一根鸵鸟羽毛

example.en: He joined the Army in February 1943.
example.zh: 他1943年2月参军。

example.en: Switzerland is a federal republic.
example.zh: 瑞士是一个联邦共和国。

phrases.zh: 注册费，登记费；挂号费；更名费

example.en: You can use the gym and pool for a fee of £35 a month.
example.zh: 月付35英镑，即可使用健身房和游泳池。

example.en: His voice sounded feeble and far away.
example.zh: 他的声音听上去既无力又遥远。

example.en: Have you fed the cat?
example.zh: 你喂猫了吗？

phrases.zh: 镇定；感觉很好；觉得身体正常

example.en: I am feeling very depressed.
example.zh: 我感到很沮丧。

example.en: Knowing we’d won was a wonderful feeling.
example.zh: 得知我们赢了，感觉真好。

example.en: Paul’s an easy-going sort of fellow.
example.zh: 保罗人很随和。

example.en: As a group, females performed better on the test than males.
example.zh: 整体来说，女性在这次测试中胜过男性。

phrases.zh: 越过场端；不讲道理的 ，不公正的

example.en: Villagers say the fence would restrict public access to the hills.
example.zh: 村民们说栅栏将限制公众进入山区。

example.en: 800 acres of fertile cropland
example.zh: 800英亩的肥沃耕地

phrases.zh: 有机肥；有机肥料；有机质

example.en: ...farming without any purchased chemical, fertilizer or pesticide.
example.zh: …不使用任何购买的化学品、肥料或杀虫剂的耕作。

phrases.zh: 春节（中国农历正月初一）

example.en: Christmas is one of the main festivals in the Christian Calendar.
example.zh: 圣诞节是基督教历的重大节日之一。

example.en: Andy has a fever and won’t be coming into work today.
example.zh: 安迪发烧了，今天不来上班。

phrases.zh: 很少；只有几个；几乎没有

example.en: ...spending her few waking hours in front of the TV.
example.zh: …把她清醒的个把钟头花在电视机前。

example.en: Fruit and vegetables are high in fibre content .
example.zh: 水果和蔬菜的纤维素含量很高。

phrases.zh: 在实地；在作战；参加比赛

example.en: a view of green fields and rolling hills
example.zh: 田野青翠、丘陵起伏的景色

example.en: fierce fighting in the city
example.zh: 城里的激烈战斗

example.en: a coastal village fifteen miles south of Tourane
example.zh: 土伦以南15英里的一个滨海村落

example.en: a fifth of bourbon
example.zh: 五分之一加仑的波旁威士忌酒

example.en: Standards of living rose in the fifties.
example.zh: 50年代生活水平提高了。

phrases.zh: v. 对抗；反对；与……作斗争
与…并肩战斗；为反对…而战斗；与…打架

example.en: Neither country is capable of fighting a long war .
example.zh: 两个国家都没有能力打持久战。

example.en: We will keep your details on file (= store them for later use ) .
example.zh: 我们将把你的详细资料存档。

example.en: He poured her a drink, then filled his own glass.
example.zh: 他给她倒了一杯，然后将自己的杯子斟满。

example.en: Have you seen any good films recently?
example.zh: 你最近看过什么好的影片吗？

example.en: The water in the tank is constantly filtered.
example.zh: 鱼缸里的水在不停地被过滤。

example.en: The final episode will be shown tonight.
example.zh: 最后一集将于今晚播出。

example.en: After several delays we finally took off at six o’clock.
example.zh: 几经耽搁后，我们终于在六点起飞了。

phrases.zh: 自我感觉；发现自己处于某种状态；发现自己的能力
v. 找出，查明；发现，揭发

example.en: I can’t find the car keys.
example.zh: 我找不到汽车钥匙。

phrases.zh: 故障探测，故障寻找；诊断工具

example.en: Surveys conducted in other countries reported similar findings.
example.zh: 在其他国家进行的调查也报告说有类似的结果。

example.en: The woman had a ring on her finger, so I assumed she was married.
example.zh: 那女人手指上戴着戒指，因此我猜想她已经结婚了。

example.en: You can’t go anywhere until you’ve finished your homework.
example.zh: 没完成家庭作业前你哪儿也不能去。

phrases.zh: adv. 着火；起火；在兴头上；非常激动
消防；火力控制；射击控制

example.en: The warehouse was completely destroyed by fire.
example.zh: 仓库全给烧毁了。

example.en: Would you like to be a fireman?
example.zh: 你愿意是一名消防队员吗？

phrases.zh: 会计事务所，会计师事务所

example.en: The firm's employees were expecting large bonuses.
example.zh: 这家公司的雇员们正期待着大笔的奖金。

example.en: These results are firsts in the history of women’s athletics.
example.zh: 这些成绩在女运动员历史上是第一次。

example.en: Over 1,500 different species of fish inhabit the waters around the reef.
example.zh: 那片礁石周围的水域生活着1,500多种不同的鱼类。

example.en: The Algarve is a paradise for fishermen whether river anglers or deep-sea fishermen.
example.zh: 阿尔加维对河边的垂钓者或深海的渔民都是一个天堂。

phrases.zh: 平稳快捷地；[口]不费力地；[口]（尤指钱）大量地

example.en: She held the money tightly in her fist.
example.zh: 她把钱紧紧地攥在手中。

phrases.zh: 使胜任某事，使适应(或适合)某事
adj. 适于；适合的，恰当的

example.en: The sash, kimono, and other garments were made to fit a child.
example.zh: 这些腰带、和服和其他衣服都做得适合孩子穿。

phrases.zh: 五百分（牌戏，一种以得500分为胜局的游戏）

example.en: There is also a golf course five miles away.
example.zh: 五英里外还有个高尔夫球场。

phrases.zh: [美国英语]进退两难，处境艰难，陷于困境
修理；解决；改进；为…作好安排；商妥

example.en: He's going to fix a time when I can see him.
example.zh: 他将确定一个我可以见他的时间。

phrases.zh: n. 红旗；危险信号；[喻]惹人生气的事物

example.en: Children waving flags greeted the Russian leader.
example.zh: 孩子们挥舞着旗帜，欢迎俄罗斯领导人。

example.en: Flames poured out of the windows of the building.
example.zh: 火焰从大楼窗口冒出来。

phrases.zh: 突然发怒；突然燃烧，骤然
镜头光晕；透镜光晕；镜头光斑；眩光

example.en: One possibility is that the blast was like an ultra-powerful solar flare.
example.zh: 一种可能的原因是这种爆炸很像有超级能量的太阳耀斑。

example.en: Two flashes mean danger.
example.zh: 两次闪光表示危险。

phrases.zh: v. 竭尽全力；用全速；疲惫

example.en: houses with flat roofs
example.zh: 平顶房

phrases.zh: 鲜味增强剂；香味增强剂

example.en: Which flavour do you want - chocolate or vanilla?
example.zh: 你要哪种味道的，巧克力还是香草？

phrases.zh: 佛里特街（英国几家报馆办事处所在地）；伦敦报业；伦敦新闻界

example.en: the US seventh fleet
example.zh: 美国第七舰队

example.en: a freshwater fish with firm white flesh
example.zh: 一种肉色雪白、肉质紧实的淡水鱼

phrases.zh: n. 飞行控制；飞行指挥

example.en: He immediately booked a flight to Toulouse.
example.zh: 他当即就订了去图卢兹的航班。

example.en: I looked up at the clouds floating in the sky.
example.zh: 我仰望着天上的浮云。

example.en: They kept a small flock of sheep.
example.zh: 他们养了一小群绵羊。

example.en: The village was cut off by floods.
example.zh: 那个村子因洪水而与外界中断了联系。

example.en: a polished wooden floor
example.zh: 上过蜡的木地板

example.en: The economy is booming and small businesses are flourishing.
example.zh: 经济繁荣，小企业蒸蒸日上。

example.en: a lovely rose bush with delicate pink flowers
example.zh: 一簇开着娇嫩的粉红色花朵的美丽蔷薇

example.en: Steven’s still in bed with flu .
example.zh: 史蒂文患了流感，仍卧病在床。

example.en: He spoke in fluent Italian.
example.zh: 他用流利的意大利语讲话。

phrases.zh: 钻井液；钻孔液体；钻液；钻井泥浆

example.en: He is not allowed solid food yet, only fluids.
example.zh: 他还不能吃固体食物，只能进流食。

example.en: Susan flushed deeply and looked away.
example.zh: 苏珊脸涨得通红，目光转向别处。

example.en: There were flies buzzing all around us.
example.zh: 苍蝇嗡嗡地在我们周围飞来飞去。

example.en: His eyes were focussed straight ahead.
example.zh: 他的双眼盯着正前方。

example.en: It will be a cold night, and there may be fog patches .
example.zh: 今夜天气寒冷，部分地区可能有雾。

example.en: Fold the paper along the dotted line.
example.zh: 沿虚线将纸折起来。

example.en: I’m sure there are some folk who would rather they weren’t here.
example.zh: 我敢肯定有些人宁愿自己不在这里。

phrases.zh: 跟踪；坚持完成；继续做某事

example.en: Are those men following us?
example.zh: 那些人在跟着我们吗？

example.en: Write down the following information: name of product, type, date purchased and price.
example.zh: 写下以下信息：产品名称、型号、购买日期和价格。

example.en: I am very fond of Michael.
example.zh: 我很喜欢迈克尔。

phrases.zh: 食品加工，食品处理；进食，食品热杀菌

example.en: The restaurant serves good food at affordable prices.
example.zh: 那家餐厅物美价廉。

phrases.zh: 愚人节；愚人节中受愚弄者
闲荡；游手好闲；干无用的事

example.en: What a fool she had been to think that he would stay.
example.zh: 她竟然那么傻，以为他会留下来。

example.en: I’ve never heard anything so foolish in all my life.
example.zh: 我这辈子从没听到过这么愚蠢的话。

example.en: My foot hurts.
example.zh: 我脚痛。

example.en: Which football team do you support?
example.zh: 你支持哪个球队？

example.en: He heard someone’s footsteps in the hall.
example.zh: 他听见门厅里有脚步声。

phrases.zh: 打算；在选举中被提名；在法庭受审；被关押

example.en: I’ve got a present for you.
example.zh: 我有件礼物送给你。

example.en: Lack of space forbids listing the names of all those who contributed.
example.zh: 由于篇幅限制，无法列出所有捐款人的姓名。

phrases.zh: 强迫地；靠武力；凭藉暴力
有效的；大批地；大规模地

example.en: Due to the high cost of borrowing, many companies have been forced to close.
example.zh: 由于借贷成本高，许多公司被迫关门。

example.en: The weather forecast is good for tomorrow.
example.zh: 天气预报说明天是晴天。

example.en: ...the lines on her forehead.
example.zh: …她前额上的皱纹。

phrases.zh: 外汇；国际汇兑；外国汇票

example.en: foreign students
example.zh: 外国学生

example.en: Some of the local people are suspicious of foreigners.
example.zh: 有些当地人不信任外国人。

example.en: Economic concerns are foremost on many voters’ minds.
example.zh: 经济是许多选民关心的首要问题。

phrases.zh: 森林火灾；森林大火；山火

example.en: a tropical forest
example.zh: 热带森林

example.en: I wanted that moment to last forever .
example.zh: 我希望那一刻成为永远。

phrases.zh: 忘我，忘乎所以；失去知觉

example.en: I’m sorry, I’ve forgotten your name.
example.zh: 对不起，我忘记你的名字了。

phrases.zh: 请原谅我；请你谅解我吧

example.en: He didn’t look the sort of man to forgive and forget (= forgive someone and no longer think about it ) .
example.zh: 他看上去不是那种不记仇的人。

phrases.zh: 铲车，叉车；叉式装卸车；万能装卸车

example.en: Put the knives and forks on the table.
example.zh: 把刀叉摆放在桌子上。

example.en: We oppose racism in all its forms.
example.zh: 我们反对各种形式的种族主义。

example.en: formal recognition of the reformed church
example.zh: 改革后的教会所获得的官方承认

phrases.zh: 地层损害，油层损害；生产层损坏

example.en: We now know a lot more about the early stages of planetary formation.
example.zh: 我们现在对行星形成过程的早期阶段有了更多的了解。

example.en: the former Soviet Union
example.zh: 前苏联

phrases.zh: 婴儿配方；婴儿配方食品

example.en: the formula for calculating distance
example.zh: 计算距离的公式

phrases.zh: 陈述，提出；出发；陈列；宣布
提出；发表；启航；（植物等）长出；放出

example.en: The house was still burning, pouring forth thick black smoke.
example.zh: 房子仍在燃烧，冒出浓浓的黑烟。

example.en: a fortnight’s holiday
example.zh: 十四天的假期

example.en: By a fortunate coincidence, a passer-by heard her cries for help.
example.zh: 所幸正巧有个过路人听到了她的呼救。

example.en: I had the good fortune to work with a brilliant head of department.
example.zh: 我有幸与一位出色的部门主管共事。

example.en: The place was built as a casino in the forties.
example.zh: 这个地方建于20世纪40年代，起初是一座赌场。

phrases.zh: v. 提出；拿出；放出；推举出

example.en: He leaned forward , his elbows resting on the table.
example.zh: 他身体前倾，胳膊肘撑在桌子上。

example.en: Founded in 1935 in Ohio, Alcoholics Anonymous is now a world-wide organization.
example.zh: 嗜酒者互诫协会1935年创立于俄亥俄州，现在是一个世界性的组织。

phrases.zh: 饮水器；供应饮用水之处

example.en: He was a fountain of information on Asian affairs.
example.zh: 他是亚洲事务的信息源。

phrases.zh: 四个现代化（农，工，国防，科技）；四化

example.en: She is married with four children.
example.zh: 她已婚，有四个孩子。

example.en: He used to work fourteen hours a day.
example.zh: 他过去一天工作14个小时。

example.en: Then, we plot the different graphs so that they each take up one fourth of the screen.
example.zh: 然后，我们绘制不同的曲线图，从而它们可以每个图占据屏幕的四分之一。

example.en: He was a sly old fox.
example.zh: 他是个狡猾的老狐狸。

phrases.zh: 体积分率，体积分数；容积率
一小部分；一部分；零点几

example.en: glass fragments
example.zh: 玻璃碎片

example.en: We have to act within the existing legal framework.
example.zh: 我们必须在现行的法律框架下行事。

phrases.zh: 弗兰克·兰帕德（英国足球明星）
说实话；老实说；坦率地说
跟你老实说；坦白跟你讲

example.en: To be perfectly frank, I think it’s a bad idea.
example.zh: 老实说，我认为这个主意不好。

phrases.zh: adj. 无…的；摆脱…的；在…外面

example.en: He knew he could be free in as little as three years.
example.zh: 他知道只要再过三年他就能自由了。

example.en: People here like their freedom and privacy.
example.zh: 这里的人喜欢他们所拥有的自由与隐私权。

example.en: the country’s first freely elected president
example.zh: 该国首位自由选举产生的总统

phrases.zh: n. 冷藏箱；冰箱；冷藏库

example.en: The lake had frozen overnight.
example.zh: 湖上一夜之间就结了冰。

phrases.zh: 货运代理；货物发运；运费由提货方支付

example.en: freight services
example.zh: 货运公司

example.en: an excellent French wine
example.zh: 上等的法国葡萄酒

example.en: Side effects from prescribed drugs are being reported with increasing frequency (= more and more often ) .
example.zh: 处方药的副作用正越来越频繁地被报道出来。

example.zh: 火车频频驶过。

example.en: He was frequently drunk.
example.zh: 他经常喝醉。

example.en: I’ll just make some fresh coffee.
example.zh: 我来重新煮点咖啡。

example.en: Putting oil on both surfaces reduces friction.
example.zh: 两面都上油可减小摩擦力。

phrases.zh: 黑色星期五；耶稣受难日

example.en: Diane won’t be here Friday.
example.zh: 星期五黛安娜不来这里。

example.en: Then all three of you sign the contract and post in on the fridge.
example.zh: 然后你们三个人要都在协议上签名，并把它贴在冰箱上。

example.en: Jerry, this is my friend Sue.
example.zh: 杰里，这是我的朋友休。

phrases.zh: 保护生态环境的；对生态环境无害的

example.en: a friendly smile
example.zh: 亲切的微笑

phrases.zh: 友谊型群体；友好群体；社交小组

example.en: her close friendship with her aunt
example.zh: 她与姑母的亲密友谊

example.en: The tadpole has become a frog.
example.zh: 这个蝌蚪已长成青蛙。

example.en: Two of his front teeth had been knocked out.
example.zh: 他有两颗门牙被打落了。

example.en: the risk of frost damage to crops
example.zh: 庄稼遭受霜冻灾害的危险

example.en: Try to eat plenty of fresh fruit .
example.zh: 尽量多吃新鲜水果。

phrases.zh: 无足轻重的人；不重要的

example.en: Fry the potatoes, covered, for about 20 minutes.
example.zh: 盖上盖，将马铃薯煎20分钟左右。

example.en: Coal is one of the cheapest fuels.
example.zh: 煤是最廉价的燃料之一。

example.en: There is little doubt that the scheme fulfils a need for our community.
example.zh: 毫无疑问，这计划会满足我们社区的需求。

phrases.zh: 骄傲；臭美；自以为是；只顾自己

example.en: The train was completely full.
example.zh: 火车坐得满满的。

phrases.zh: [口语]取笑(或嘲弄、奚落)某人，拿某人开玩笑

example.en: There’s plenty of fun for all the family.
example.zh: 可以让全家人玩得很开心。

example.en: We have to tackle the fundamental cause of the problem.
example.zh: 我们必须解决问题的根本原因。

example.en: The funeral will be held at St. Martin’s Church.
example.zh: 葬礼将在圣马丁教堂举行。

example.en: the funniest man in Britain
example.zh: 英国最滑稽的男人

example.en: a fur coat
example.zh: 裘皮大衣

example.en: She was absolutely furious .
example.zh: 她怒不可遏。

example.en: Will these finds furnish more information on prehistoric man?
example.zh: 这些发现是否能提供更多有关史前人类的资料？

example.en: I helped him choose the furniture for his house.
example.zh: 我帮他挑选房子里用的家具。

phrases.zh: 进一步研究；深造；继续教育，进修

example.en: They walked a little further.
example.zh: 他们又往前走了一点。

example.en: He is old and unpopular. Furthermore, he has at best only two years of political life ahead of him.
example.zh: 他年纪已老，又不得人心，而且他最多也只有两年的政治生命了。

example.en: The islands should have the right to decide their own future.
example.zh: 这些岛屿应当有权决定自己的未来。

phrases.zh: 增长，改进；获得；在…方面有进展

example.en: After gaining independence in 1957, it was renamed ‘Ghana’.
example.zh: 1957年获得独立后，该国改名为“加纳”。

example.en: a 20 gallon fish tank
example.zh: 一个20加仑的鱼缸

phrases.zh: 玩游戏；行动光明正大；遵守比赛规则

example.en: The boys were playing a game in the backyard.
example.zh: 男孩们在后院里玩游戏。

example.en: Several gangs were operating in the area.
example.zh: 有好几个犯罪团伙在这个地区活动。

phrases.zh: 无用输入；无用数据输入

example.en: Can you take out the garbage when you go?
example.zh: 你走的时候把垃圾带出去好吗？

example.en: He’s outside in the garden.
example.zh: 他在外面花园里。

example.en: She employed a gardener.
example.zh: 她雇了一个园丁。

example.en: hydrogen gas
example.zh: 氢气

example.en: Freon exists both in liquid and gaseous states.
example.zh: 氟利昂既有液态也有气态。

example.en: A gasoline engine drives the motorboat.
example.zh: 汽油引擎推动汽船。

phrases.zh: 呼吸十分困难， 上气不接下气

example.en: ‘My leg!’ he gasped. ‘I think it’s broken!’
example.zh: “我的腿！”他倒抽一口气喊道，“我觉得腿断了！”

phrases.zh: 南盖特（美国加利福尼亚州西南部城市）

example.en: We went through the gate into the orchard.
example.zh: 我们穿过大门进了果园。

example.en: A crowd gathered to watch the fight.
example.zh: 一群人聚拢来围观打架。

example.en: The thermostat will gauge the temperature and control the heat.
example.zh: 恒温器可测量温度并控制热量。

example.en: gay colours
example.zh: 鲜艳的色彩

phrases.zh: ◎【纹章学】(鹿或类似鹿的动物)从旁看去似在盯着人看的，侧身正视的

example.en: Patrick sat gazing into space  (= looking straight in front, not at any particular person or thing ).
example.zh: 帕特里克坐着，茫然地看着前方。

example.en: There has been a general decline in standards.
example.zh: 道德水准普遍下降。

example.en: Generally speaking, the more expensive the stereo, the better it is.
example.zh: 一般说来，立体声音响越贵的越好。

phrases.zh: 信号发生器；讯号产生机
蒸汽发生器；蒸汽锅炉；蒸汽发电机

example.en: an emergency generator
example.zh: 应急发电机

phrases.zh: 一个地方的风气或特色；一个地方的守护神

example.en: The film reveals Fellini’s genius.
example.zh: 这部影片展现了费里尼的天赋。

phrases.zh: 缓坡；平缓坡度；平缓倾斜

example.en: Arthur was a very gentle, caring person.
example.zh: 阿瑟是一个非常温柔体贴的人。

phrases.zh: [美国英语](美国众议院)某某州(选出的)议员

example.en: Martin – always the perfect gentleman – got to his feet when my mother walked in.
example.zh: 马丁在我母亲进来时站了起来——他一向是十足的绅士派头。

example.en: ‘You go back to bed now,’ he said gently.
example.zh: “你回去睡觉吧。”他温柔地说道。

example.en: a geography lesson
example.zh: 地理课

phrases.zh: [数]分形几何；碎形几何；不规则碎片几何体

example.en: ...the very ordered way in which mathematics and geometry describe nature.
example.zh: …数学和几何学描述自然的条理性。

phrases.zh: [比喻]处于初级阶段，处于萌芽阶段

example.en: Put disinfectant down the toilet to kill any germs.
example.zh: 在抽水马桶里投放消毒剂杀菌。

phrases.zh: 德国牧羊犬；阿尔萨斯狼犬；德国警犬（等于German police dog）
n. 德国牧羊犬；阿尔萨斯狼犬

example.en: German history
example.zh: 德国历史

phrases.zh: 西德（原德意志联邦共和国的简称）
到达那里；取得成功，实现目标

example.en: We need to get help quickly!
example.zh: 我们需要马上得到帮助！

phrases.zh: 丝毫，微量，一点儿(常在否定句中与 chance，idea 连用，或与 smile连用)

example.en: They say the young girl’s ghost still haunts (= often appears in ) the house.
example.zh: 他们说那个少女的鬼魂依旧在那房子里出没。

example.en: ...a Nordic saga of giants.
example.zh: …一部关于巨人的北欧传奇。

example.en: Both boys and girls can apply to join the choir.
example.zh: 男孩和女孩均可申请加入合唱团。

phrases.zh: 分发，发出；公布，发表；用尽，精疲力竭

example.en: Researchers were given a £10,000 grant to continue their work.
example.zh: 研究人员得到一万英镑的经费以继续他们的研究。

example.en: We’re so glad you came.
example.zh: 你来了我们真高兴。

example.en: Wyatt glanced around the restaurant.
example.zh: 怀亚特环视了一下餐馆。

example.en: The sun glared down on us.
example.zh: 刺眼的阳光照在我们身上。

example.en: a glass bowl
example.zh: 玻璃碗

example.en: Waiters glide between tightly packed tables bearing trays of pasta.
example.zh: 侍者们托着一盘盘的意大利面食在拥挤的餐桌间自如穿行。

example.en: I glimpsed a figure at the window.
example.zh: 我瞥见窗前有个身影。

example.en: The river glittered in the sunlight.
example.zh: 阳光下河面波光粼粼。

phrases.zh: 全球；世界各地；整个世界

example.en: We export our goods all over the globe.
example.zh: 我们的商品出口到世界各地。

phrases.zh: 得意；踌躇满志；在某人的鼎盛时期

example.en: She dreamt of future glory as an Olympic champion.
example.zh: 她梦想着将来能得到奥运冠军的荣誉。

phrases.zh: 外柔内刚；表面温和的东西
手套箱；手套式操作箱（真空设备用）

example.en: a pair of gloves
example.zh: 一副手套

phrases.zh: 预热塞，电热塞；热线点火塞

example.en: The moisturizer gave my face a healthy glow that lasted all day.
example.zh: 这种润肤霜给我脸上带来了持续整天的一种健康的红光。

example.en: ...a tube of glue.
example.zh: …一管胶水。

example.en: The plate went crashing to the floor.
example.zh: 盘子哗啦一声掉在地板上。

example.en: Your goal as a parent is to help your child become an independent adult.
example.zh: 身为父母，你的目标就是要培养孩子成为独立的成年人。

phrases.zh: 老色鬼；[俚]讨厌的老家伙

example.en: The tiger sprang on the goat.
example.zh: 老虎向山羊扑去。

example.en: He believes in God.
example.zh: 他信奉上帝。

example.en: She came to the party dripping with gold (= wearing a lot of gold ) .
example.zh: 她披金戴银地来参加派对。

example.en: golden hair
example.zh: 金发

example.en: He plays golf on Sundays.
example.zh: 他星期天都去打高尔夫球。

phrases.zh: 有效的；会产生；有支付…能力的

example.en: a good hotel
example.zh: 一家不错的宾馆

example.en: He retains a faith in human goodness.
example.zh: 他依然相信人性的善。

phrases.zh: 生活消费品，日用消费品

example.en: the large market for consumer goods
example.zh: 庞大的消费品市场

example.en: ...roast goose.
example.zh: …烤鹅。

phrases.zh: 地方政府；[总称]地方政府官员（或工作人员）

example.en: The Government are planning further cuts in public spending.
example.zh: 政府正计划进一步削减公共支出。

example.en: Lena moved with the grace of a dancer.
example.zh: 莉娜走路姿势有着舞者般的优美。

example.en: Her movements were graceful and elegant.
example.zh: 她举手投足优雅而高贵。

example.en: Sibyl was the most gracious, helpful, and generous person to work with.
example.zh: 西比尔非常和蔼，乐于助人，而且为人慷慨，和她共事最愉快。

example.en: All the parks are regularly checked and graded by tourist board inspectors.
example.zh: 所有公园都由旅游协会的检查员进行定期检查和评级。

example.en: There has been a gradual change in climate.
example.zh: 气候渐渐发生了变化。

example.en: Jill gradually became aware of an awful smell.
example.zh: 吉尔渐渐地闻到了一股难闻的气味。

example.en: a Harvard graduate
example.zh: 哈佛毕业生

example.en: Check your spelling and grammar.
example.zh: 检查你的拼写和语法。

example.en: grammatical rules
example.zh: 语法规则

phrases.zh: n. 国际汽车大奖赛；头等奖，最高奖

example.en: a grand country house
example.zh: 豪华的乡间大宅

example.en: ...a drawing of my granddaughter Amelia.
example.zh: …一幅我孙女阿梅莉亚的画像。

example.en: His grandfather was a professor.
example.zh: 他爷爷曾是位教授。

example.en: My grandmothers are both widows.
example.zh: 我的祖母和外祖母都是寡妇。

example.en: My grandson's birthday was on Tuesday.
example.zh: 我孙子的生日是星期二。

example.en: a bunch of grapes
example.zh: 一串葡萄

example.en: Martin showed me a graph of their recent sales.
example.zh: 马丁给我看了他们最近销售情况的图表。

example.en: I grasped his arm firmly and led him away.
example.zh: 我紧紧抓住他的胳膊把他带走。

example.en: I walked across the grass.
example.zh: 我走在草地上。

example.en: Our grateful thanks go to all who participated.
example.zh: 我们衷心感谢所有参与者。

example.en: the force of gravity
example.zh: 重力

example.en: I like that little gray one. The kids like that one too.
example.zh: 我喜欢那只灰色的小鸭子， 孩子们也喜欢那只。

phrases.zh: 万里长城；中国长城计算机集团公司

example.en: The movie was a great success.
example.zh: 这部影片大获成功。

example.en: All offers of help will be greatly appreciated .
example.zh: 如蒙帮助，感激不尽。

example.en: a greedy and selfish society
example.zh: 一个贪婪自私的社会

phrases.zh: 古典希腊；古典希腊语（指公元前5和4世纪古典雅文学中使用的希腊语）

example.en: Greek yoghurt
example.zh: 希腊式酸奶

example.en: beautiful green eyes
example.zh: 漂亮的碧眼

phrases.zh: n. 二氧化碳、甲烷等导致温室效应的气体

example.en: Belinda greeted her warmly.
example.zh: 贝琳达热情地招呼她。

example.en: I smiled a polite greeting, but the woman hardly acknowledged me.
example.zh: 我客气地笑着打了个招呼，可是那女人没有答理我。

example.en: an old lady with grey hair
example.zh: 头发灰白的老太太

example.en: People need time to grieve after the death of a loved one.
example.zh: 人们在所爱之人去世后会有一段悲伤期。

phrases.zh: 另有所图；有不同意见；别有用心

example.en: a stone for grinding knives and scissors
example.zh: 磨刀剪的石头

phrases.zh: 控制；把握关键；管束；抓拄

example.en: I gripped the rail and tried not to look down.
example.zh: 我紧紧抓住栏杆，尽量不往下看。

example.en: The kids all groaned when I switched off the TV.
example.zh: 我关掉电视时，孩子们都发出不满的抱怨声。

example.en: The cook and the grocer haggled over the price of eggs.
example.zh: 厨师和杂货商为蛋价计较个没完。

example.en: The company was guilty of gross negligence.
example.zh: 该公司犯了重大的失职罪。

phrases.zh: 给某人在某方面打下良好基础

example.en: There are strong grounds for believing his statement.
example.zh: 有充分的理由可以相信他的话。

phrases.zh: 控制组（自变量的一种处理方法）；实验对照组

example.en: A group of us are going to London.
example.zh: 我们有一群人要去伦敦。

example.en: You’ve really grown since I last saw you.
example.zh: 你比我上次见到时长了不少啊。

phrases.zh: 增长因子；增长系数；放大因子；经济增长因素

example.en: measures to stimulate economic growth
example.zh: 刺激经济增长的措施

example.en: The Sergeant told Swift to guard the entrance.
example.zh: 中士叫斯威夫特守着入口。

phrases.zh: 猜怎么了；猜猜看；猜怎么着

example.en: I’d say he’s around 50, but I’m only guessing.
example.zh: 我想他50岁左右，不过也只是猜测。

example.en: a banquet for 250 distinguished guests
example.zh: 250位贵宾出席的宴会

example.en: a missile with a sophisticated electronic guidance system
example.zh: 有精密电子制导系统的导弹

example.en: a tour guide
example.zh: 导游

example.en: She looked self-conscious and guilty.
example.zh: 她看上去很不自然，很内疚的样子。

phrases.zh: 墨西哥湾（位于北美东南部边缘）
波斯湾（简称海湾，在伊朗和阿拉伯半岛之间）

example.en: the Gulf of Mexico
example.zh: 墨西哥湾

example.en: I’ve never fired a gun in my life.
example.zh: 我这辈子从来没开过枪。

example.en: I have found a new gymnasium.
example.zh: 我找到一个新的健身房。

example.en: Regular exercise is a good habit.
example.zh: 经常锻炼是个好习惯。

example.en: James took his habitual morning walk around the garden.
example.zh: 詹姆斯又像往常习惯的那样绕花园作晨间散步去了。

example.en: Her hair was short and dark.
example.zh: 她的头发又短又黑。

example.en: Do you like my new haircut?
example.zh: 你喜欢我的新发型吗？

phrases.zh: 了不起的；而且比这多得多

example.en: Only half the guests had arrived by seven o’clock.
example.zh: 7点钟前只来了一半客人。

example.en: a huge tiled entrance hall
example.zh: 铺着地砖的大门厅

phrases.zh: 系统中止；系统停止；系统挂起；死机

example.en: The government has failed to halt economic decline.
example.zh: 政府没能阻止经济衰退。

example.en: The whole stadium stink of the hamburger.
example.zh: 整个体育场内散发着汉堡包的香味。

example.en: I had no hammer,so I had to pound the nail in with a stone.
example.zh: 我没有锤子，所以只得用石头把钉子敲进去。

phrases.zh: adv. 在手头；在进行中；在控制中

example.en: Steve gripped the steering wheel tightly with both hands.
example.zh: 史蒂夫双手紧握方向盘。

phrases.zh: 少数的人；少量的几个人

example.en: There were only a handful of people there.
example.zh: 那里只有几个人。

example.en: He flicked at spot with handkerchief.
example.zh: 他轻轻地用手帕拂拭污点。

example.en: They won a handsome victory in the elections.
example.zh: 他们在选举中取得了重大的胜利。

example.en: I recognised her handwriting on the envelope.
example.zh: 我认出了信封上她的笔迹。

example.en: It’s quite a handy little tool.
example.zh: 这件小工具非常有用。

phrases.zh: 坚持下去；不挂断；握住不放

example.en: If he is found guilty, he will almost certainly hang.
example.zh: 如果被判有罪，他几乎肯定会被处以绞刑。

example.en: When did the accident happen?
example.zh: 事故什么时候发生的？

phrases.zh: 知足常乐；幸福在于满足

example.en: Juliet’s eyes shone with happiness.
example.zh: 朱丽叶的双眼闪耀着幸福的光芒。

example.en: It’s a lovely house and we’ve been very happy here.
example.zh: 房子很漂亮，我们住在这里非常开心。

phrases.zh: 海港城（地名，位于香港尖沙咀）
港湾工程，港口工程；海港工程

example.en: as they sailed into Portsmouth Harbour
example.zh: 当他们驶入朴次茅斯港的时候

example.en: a hard wooden chair
example.zh: 一把硬木椅

example.en: It will take about 24 hours for the glue to harden.
example.zh: 胶水干透大约需要24小时。

example.en: My parents divorced when I was six, and I hardly knew my father.
example.zh: 我六岁时父母离婚，我对父亲几乎一无所知。

example.en: an economic policy that caused great hardship for many people
example.zh: 造成许多人贫困的经济政策

phrases.zh: 计算机硬件，电脑硬件；硬件

example.en: ...a shop from which an uncle had sold hardware and timber.
example.zh: …一家叔叔曾经在那里卖五金器具和木材的店铺。

phrases.zh: 做徒劳无益之事；面面俱到，诸事未了
印度教克利须那派教徒；印度教克利须那派；礼赞印度教克利须那神的颂歌

example.en: Because it makes its home in an extreme environment, the desert hare is biologically designed to radiate excess heat through its lanky limbs and oversized ears.
example.zh: 因为生长在极端环境中，沙漠兔子形成了独特的生物学构造，通过瘦长的四肢和超大的耳朵辐射多余的热量。

phrases.zh: 一起合作；在日常工作中

example.en: We must harness the rivers which overflow annually.
example.zh: 我们必须治理那些每年泛滥的河流。

example.en: I soon regretted my haste.
example.zh: 我很快就对自己的仓促感到后悔。

example.en: Their departure was hastened by an abnormally cold winter.
example.zh: 那个冬天异常寒冷，所以他们提前走了。

example.en: He soon regretted his hasty decision.
example.zh: 他很快就对自己仓促作出的决定感到后悔了。

phrases.zh: 毕恭毕敬地；温顺地；恳求地

example.en: Maria was wearing a beautiful new hat.
example.zh: 玛丽亚戴着一顶漂亮的新帽子。

example.en: The eggs take three days to hatch.
example.zh: 这些蛋要三天时间才能孵化。

phrases.zh: 不喜欢做某事；讨厌做某事；与生俱来厌恶
n. 仇恨犯罪；憎恨犯罪

example.en: It’s the kind of movie you either love or hate.
example.zh: 这是那种你要么喜欢要么讨厌的电影。

example.en: It was all the fault of that hateful man!
example.zh: 都是那个可恶的人造的孽！

example.en: A look of pure hatred flashed across her face.
example.zh: 她脸上闪过十足的仇恨表情。

example.en: Our guests have arrived.
example.zh: 我们的客人到了。

phrases.zh: 黑鹰直升机（80年代美军主力通用直升机）
小鹰号航空母舰 （战斗群） （美）；基蒂霍克（美国北卡罗莱纳州一小村庄）

example.en: ...bales of hay.
example.zh: …一捆捆的干草。

example.en: ‘Where’s Paul?’ ‘He’s gone to the cinema.’
example.zh: “保罗在哪儿？”“他去看电影了。”

example.en: He kissed the top of her head.
example.zh: 他吻了一下她的头顶。

example.en: If you have a headache, you should take some aspirin.
example.zh: 要是头痛，你该吃点阿司匹林。

example.en: chapter headings
example.zh: 章节标题

example.en: a paper carrying the front-page headline: ‘Space Aliens meet with President’
example.zh: 头版报道题为“天外来客会见总统”的报纸

example.en: This headmaster is very modest.
example.zh: 这位校长很谦虚。

example.en: the headquarters of the United Nations
example.zh: 联合国总部

example.en: a preacher who claims that he can heal the sick
example.zh: 自称可以治病的传道士

phrases.zh: n. 公共卫生；公共卫生设施

example.en: I’m worried about my husband’s health.
example.zh: 我担心我丈夫的健康状况。

example.en: a healthy baby boy
example.zh: 健康的男婴

example.en: a rubbish heap
example.zh: 垃圾堆

example.en: Blanche heard a crash as the back door was flung open.
example.zh: 布兰奇听见后门哗啦一声被推开。

example.en: Regular exercise is good for the heart.
example.zh: 经常锻炼对心脏有好处。

example.en: Ice needs heat to melt.
example.zh: 冰需要热才能融化。

example.en: We wanted to reduce the cost of heating and air-conditioning.
example.zh: 我们想减少供暖与空调的开支。

phrases.zh: 天地，宇宙万物；天上人间

example.en: He looked up towards the heavens.
example.zh: 他仰望苍穹。

example.en: I became heavily involved in politics.
example.zh: 我深陷政治之中。

phrases.zh: 重油（将焦油蒸馏得到的比重大于水）

example.en: The wardrobe was too heavy for me to move on my own.
example.zh: 衣橱太重，我一个人移不动。

example.en: black boots with high heels
example.zh: 有高跟的黑靴子

phrases.zh: 在…顶点；在…的顶峰或鼎盛时期

example.en: Sam’s about the same height as his sister now.
example.zh: 萨姆现在身高和他姐姐差不多了。

phrases.zh: [律]法定继承人，有确定继承权的人

example.en: Jonson was his political heir as leader of the party.
example.zh: 琼森是他的政治接班人，他将担任该党派的领袖。

example.en: You can helicopter to the island.
example.zh: 你可以乘坐直升机去那个岛。

phrases.zh: （表示不在乎、无可奈何、气恼、不耐烦等）究竟，到底

example.en: War is hell.
example.zh: 战争是人间地狱。

example.en: Hello, John! How are you?
example.zh: 喂，约翰！你好吗？

example.en: The Sword split the Knight's helmet and bit him fatally.
example.zh: 剑劈开了骑士的头盔并致命地刺进他。

example.en: If there’s anything I can do to help, just give me a call.
example.zh: 如果需要我帮忙，就给我打个电话。

example.en: Thank you for your advice; it’s been very helpful.
example.zh: 谢谢你的建议，它非常有用。

example.en: He began to feel depressed and helpless.
example.zh: 他开始觉得沮丧、无助。

example.en: The chickens gathered under the hen.
example.zh: 小鸡聚集在母鸡翅膀下面。

example.en: The cost of transport is a major expense for an industry. Hence factory location is an important consideration.
example.zh: 运输成本是企业的一大支出，因此工厂选址是重要的考虑因素。

example.en: Jane? I don’t really know her.
example.zh: 简？我不太认识她。

phrases.zh: 羊群行为；羊群效应；从众行为；群体恐慌行为

example.en: Chobe is also renowned for its large herds of elephant and buffalo.
example.zh: 乔贝还以其大群的大象和水牛而闻名。

phrases.zh: 点击这里，点击此处；单击此处

example.en: What are you doing here?
example.zh: 你们在这里干什么？

example.en: He had dared to speak out against injustice, and overnight he became a national hero .
example.zh: 他敢于站出来抨击不公正的现象，一夜之间就成了国家英雄。

example.en: her heroic efforts to save her family
example.zh: 她拯救家人的英勇行为

example.en: The heroine is a senior TV executive.
example.zh: 女主人公是一位电视台高级主管。

example.en: He bent and touched his mouth to hers.
example.zh: 他俯身吻她的嘴唇。

example.en: She cut herself on some broken glass.
example.zh: 碎玻璃把她割伤了。

example.en: I hesitate.
example.zh: 我犹豫。

example.en: Hi! How are you?
example.zh: 嗨！你好吗？

example.en: She keeps a bottle of gin hidden behind a stack of books.
example.zh: 她在一堆书的后面藏了一瓶杜松子酒。

example.en: This is the highest mountain in Japan.
example.zh: 这是日本最高的山。

example.en: Tom’s mother was highly critical of the school’s approach.
example.zh: 汤姆的母亲对学校的处理方法持强烈的批评态度。

example.en: Interstate Highway 75
example.zh: 75号州际公路

example.en: Their house is on a hill overlooking the sea.
example.zh: 他们的房子建在可以俯视大海的小山上。

example.en: The airplane crashed on a hillside.
example.zh: 飞机在山坡上坠毁。

example.en: Are you in love with him?
example.zh: 你爱上他了吗？

example.en: He repossessed himself of his farm.
example.zh: 他收回自己所有的农场。

phrases.zh: 领会别人的暗示；接受暗示

example.en: There have been hints that he may take up coaching.
example.zh: 他暗示过可能会出任教练。

example.en: He stated his views to me.
example.zh: 他向我说明了他的观点。

phrases.zh: 历史发展；[心理]种族发生
历史唯物主义；历史唯物论

example.en: places of historical interest
example.zh: 历史名胜

example.en: Throughout history the achievements of women have been largely ignored.
example.zh: 从古至今，妇女的成就都被大大地忽视了。

example.en: What are your hobbies?
example.zh: 你有些什么爱好？

phrases.zh: 不挂断电话，等一下；继续
暂停；尚未办理的事情；等候接听；把持住的（指有问题的）

example.en: He holds shares in ICI.
example.zh: 他持有帝国化学工业集团的股份。

phrases.zh: 负债，亏空；遇到经济困难

example.en: I began digging a hole for the plant.
example.zh: 我开始挖洞种那棵植物。

example.en: The school holidays start tomorrow.
example.zh: 学校假期从明天开始。

example.en: a hollow tree
example.zh: 空心树

example.en: the holy city of Varanasi
example.zh: 圣城瓦拉纳西

example.en: They have a beautiful home in California.
example.zh: 他们在加州有个美丽的家。

example.en: He was a hard-working, honest man.
example.zh: 他勤奋老实。

example.en: By 1987, the honeymoon was over .
example.zh: 到1987年，蜜月期已经过去。

example.en: Over 100 players competed for the honour of representing the county in the National Finals.
example.zh: 100多位选手为争取代表郡参加全国总决赛的荣誉进行角逐。

example.en: My father didn’t think acting was an honorable profession.
example.zh: 我父亲认为当演员不是受人尊敬的职业。

example.en: Tom hung his coat on the hook behind the door.
example.zh: 汤姆把外套挂在门后的衣钩上。

example.en: I do hope everything goes well.
example.zh: 我真心希望一切顺利。

example.en: The vote is a hopeful sign that attitudes in the church are changing.
example.zh: 投票结果是个好兆头，表明教会的态度正在转变。

example.en: We tried to stop the flames from spreading, but we knew it was hopeless.
example.zh: 我们试图阻止火势蔓延，但我们知道这是不可能的。

phrases.zh: 在地平线上；即将来临的
即将来临，已露端倪；地平以上

example.en: In the distance, the dot of a boat appeared on the horizon.
example.zh: 远处小黑点般的一条小船出现在地平线上。

example.en: a horizontal surface
example.zh: 水平面

example.en: A mature cow has horns.
example.zh: 成年母牛头上长有角。

phrases.zh: 恐怖片，惊恐片；恐怖电影

example.en: Dense smoke surrounded them, adding to the horror of the situation.
example.zh: 浓烟包围了他们，情形变得更加恐怖。

phrases.zh: 黑马（出人意外获胜的赛马或参赛人）；（美）[政]“黑马”候选人（常因各方妥协而意外获得提名或当选）
n. 白马；怀特霍斯（加拿大育空地区首府）；白马像（新石器时代、青铜时代或铁器时代雕刻在英国伯克郡等白垩山冈上）

example.en: a horse and cart
example.zh: 一辆马车

example.en: a two-hundred horsepower engine
example.zh: 两百马力的发动机

example.en: They are building a new hospital.
example.zh: 他们正在建一家新医院。

phrases.zh: n. 主办城市；举办城市

example.en: Our host greeted us at the door.
example.zh: 主人在门口迎接我们。

example.en: The hostess introduced them.
example.zh: 女主人介绍了他们。

example.en: Southampton fans gave their former coach a hostile reception .
example.zh: 南安普敦队的球迷对球队的前任教练很不友善。

phrases.zh: [生化]热点；过热点；潜在的危险地区

example.en: a hot curry
example.zh: 一种辛辣的咖喱

example.en: I’ve booked the flights and the hotel.
example.zh: 我已订好机票和酒店。

example.en: The interview will last about two hours.
example.zh: 面试大概要持续两小时。

phrases.zh: n. 白宫（美国政府的行政机关，美国总统官邸）

example.en: America’s oldest publishing house
example.zh: 美国历史最悠久的出版社

example.en: Married at nineteen, she was a traditional housewife and mother of four children.
example.zh: 她19岁就结婚了，是个传统的家庭主妇和4个孩子的母亲。

example.en: How do you spell your name?
example.zh: 你的名字怎么拼写？

example.en: This is a cheap and simple process. However, there are dangers.
example.zh: 这是个花钱少而又简单的方法，不过有危险。

example.en: a huge dog
example.zh: 一条大狗

example.en: There are many different cell types in the human body .
example.zh: 人体中有许多种不同的细胞类型。

example.en: a modest and humble man
example.zh: 一个谦卑的男人

example.en: Tokyo is extremely humid in mid-summer.
example.zh: 仲夏的东京十分潮湿。

example.en: humorous stories
example.zh: 诙谐的故事

example.en: his humour and charm
example.zh: 他的幽默感和魅力

phrases.zh: 五百分（牌戏，一种以得500分为胜局的游戏）

example.en: I’m not a hundred percent sure where she lives.
example.zh: 我不能完全确定她住在哪里。

example.en: Try to satisfy your hunger by eating some fruit.
example.zh: 吃些水果充充饥吧。

example.en: I was cold, tired, and hungry.
example.zh: 我又冷，又累，又饿。

example.en: The couple had helped in the hunt for the toddlers.
example.zh: 这对夫妇曾帮着寻找那些蹒跚学步的孩子。

example.en: If we hurry, we’ll get there in time.
example.zh: 要是赶紧的话，我们能及时到那里。

example.en: Was anyone hurt in the accident?
example.zh: 事故中有人受伤吗？

example.en: Have you met my husband Roy?
example.zh: 你见过我的丈夫罗伊吗？

example.en: a wooden hut
example.zh: 小木屋

example.en: Water contains hydrogen and oxygen.
example.zh: 水含有氢和氧。

example.en: I moved to this city six years ago.
example.zh: 六年前我搬到了这个城市。

phrases.zh: 在狱中；有成功或胜利把握；搁置起来的；暂缓

example.en: Would you like some ice in your drink?
example.zh: 你饮料中要放点冰块吗？

example.en: You should talk to Ken – he's always full of good ideas.
example.zh: 你应该和肯谈谈，他总是满脑子好主意。

example.en: advice on how to reach your ideal weight
example.zh: 如何达到理想体重的建议

example.en: the new musical idiom
example.zh: 新的音乐风格

phrases.zh: 空闲时间，闲置时间；停工时间，停歇时间

example.en: I cannot afford to leave the land lying idle.
example.zh: 我不能让土地闲置。

phrases.zh: 如果是这样的话；要是这样

example.en: We’ll stay at home if it rains.
example.zh: 如果下雨，我们就待在家里。

example.en: Bridget can’t come – she’s ill.
example.zh: 布里奇特不能来了，她生病了。

example.en: She had all the normal childhood illnesses.
example.zh: 儿童的常见病她小时候都得过。

example.en: The book contains 62 pages of illustrations.
example.zh: 这本书有62页插图。

phrases.zh: 只是幻觉；只是我的幻想

example.en: a storyteller with an incredible imagination
example.zh: 想象力极丰富的讲故事者

example.en: Perhaps she’d never really been there at all – perhaps she’d just imagined it.
example.zh: 可能她从未到过那儿——也许这都是她的幻想。

phrases.zh: 即刻效果；[生物化学]即时效应

example.en: Our immediate response to the attack was sheer horror.
example.zh: 我们对攻击的第一反应就是非常惊恐。

example.en: Those most immediately involved in the disaster will be given support.
example.zh: 灾害最直接受害者将获得援助。

example.en: People who travel by rail still read an immense amount.
example.zh: 人们坐火车旅行时仍然会读很多书。

example.en: an illegal immigrant
example.zh: 非法移民

example.en: The impatient drivers were beeping their horns.
example.zh: 不耐烦的司机们在按喇叭发嘟嘟声。

phrases.zh: 有着重要意义，十分重要
重要的；具有重要意义的
重视；着重于…；对…给予重视

example.en: He was full of his own importance (= he behaved in an annoying way which showed that he thought he was very important ).
example.zh: 他自以为很了不起。

phrases.zh: 最重要的；首要的；最关键的

example.en: a very important meeting
example.zh: 很重要的会议

phrases.zh: 不可能的任务，棘手的任务
不可能实现的梦；不可能的梦想

example.en: ‘I want to speak to Mr Franks.’ ‘I’m afraid that’s impossible.’
example.zh: “我想和弗兰克斯先生谈谈。”“恐怕不行。”

phrases.zh: 使牢记；给…留下印象；留下印记

example.en: Steve borrowed his dad’s sports car to impress his girlfriend.
example.zh: 史蒂夫借来他爸爸的跑车向女友炫耀。

example.en: When we looked around the school we got a very good impression.
example.zh: 我们参观了学校，对它的印象很好。

example.en: The figures certainly look impressive.
example.zh: 这些数字看上去确实很可观。

example.en: The government imprisoned all opposition leaders.
example.zh: 政府把反对派领导人全部监禁起来。

example.en: a course for students wishing to improve their English
example.zh: 为想提高英语水平的学生开设的一门课

example.en: Our results have shown some improvement this month.
example.zh: 我们的成绩这个月有所提高。

example.en: There’s some sugar in the cupboard.
example.zh: 碗橱里有一些糖。

example.en: The curtains were an inch too short.
example.zh: 窗帘短了一英寸。

example.en: Am I at risk because of some incident in my sexual past?
example.zh: 我过去性生活中的某件事会使我处于危险境地吗？

example.en: low-income families
example.zh: 低收入家庭

phrases.zh: 政治上不正确的；不合时宜的

example.en: The information you gave us was incorrect.
example.zh: 你给我们的信息不准确。

example.en: The population increased dramatically in the first half of the century.
example.zh: 该世纪上半叶，人口大幅度增加。

example.en: Marketing techniques are becoming increasingly sophisticated.
example.zh: 市场营销技巧越来越巧妙。

example.en: The blood tests prove that Vince is indeed the father.
example.zh: 验血证明文斯确实是父亲。

example.en: Teachers find the report’s terminology so indefinite that it is confusing.
example.zh: 老师们发现报告的专门用语含义不明确，令人费解。

example.en: The country has made great advances since independence.
example.zh: 该国自独立以来发展迅速。

example.en: There are plans to split the corporation into a number of smaller independent companies.
example.zh: 有计划要把这家大企业分割成一些独立的小公司。

example.en: ...the consumer price index.
example.zh: …消费价格指数。

phrases.zh: 东印度（指印度，印度支那半岛，马来半岛和马来群岛等）

example.en: Burma borders on India.
example.zh: 缅甸与印度毗邻。

example.en: ...the Indian government.
example.zh: ...印度政府。

example.en: Could you give me some indication as to when I am likely to receive a reply?
example.zh: 你能给我透露一下什么时候我能收到回复吗？

example.en: an indignant reply
example.zh: 愤慨的回复

example.en: Losing weight is an indirect result of smoking cigarettes.
example.zh: 吸烟间接导致体重减轻。

example.en: Let’s go indoors and have something to eat.
example.zh: 我们进屋吃点东西吧。

example.en: By 1900, Britain was a mainly industrial society.
example.zh: 到1900年英国已基本进入工业社会。

example.en: Energy consumption rises as countries industrialize.
example.zh: 能源消耗随着各国工业化而增加。

example.en: I work in the oil industry.
example.zh: 我在石油行业工作。

example.en: an inefficient use of resources
example.zh: 资源的浪费

example.en: a good selection of inexpensive wines
example.zh: 可供选择的各种价格公道的葡萄酒

phrases.zh: 婴儿配方；婴儿配方食品
婴儿死亡率，早期失效；早期故障期

example.en: An infant’s skin is very sensitive.
example.zh: 幼儿的皮肤非常敏感。

example.en: People with the virus may feel perfectly well, but they can still infect others.
example.zh: 带有这种病毒的人可能毫无症状，却仍可能传染他人。

example.en: I inferred from what she said that you have not been well.
example.zh: 我从她的话里推断出你身体一直不大好。

example.en: I felt very inferior among all those academics.
example.zh: 与那些大学教师在一起，我自惭形秽。

example.zh: 他们决定通知警察。

example.zh: 有600万居民的城市

example.zh: 5,000英镑的初始投资

example.zh: 护士给我打了破伤风预防针。

example.zh: 她头部受重伤被送到医院。

example.zh: 请用黑色墨水书写。

phrases.zh: n. 假日酒店；假日旅馆

example.en: We’re staying at the Holiday Inn.
example.zh: 我们住在假日酒店。

example.en: an inner room
example.zh: 内室

example.en: If the input data specified it, the file will close and the process terminates.
example.zh: 如果输入数据指定，该文件就会关闭，数据处理终止。

phrases.zh: 昆虫抗药性；防蛀性；耐虫性
昆虫咬伤；被虫咬伤；蚊虫叮咬

example.en: an insect bite
example.zh: 昆虫的叮咬

example.en: He took a small key from his pocket and slowly inserted it into the lock.
example.zh: 他从衣袋里掏出一把小钥匙，然后缓缓地将其插入锁孔里。

phrases.zh: adv. 在里面；在内心；知道内情

example.en: He concealed the key inside his tie.
example.zh: 他把钥匙藏在领带里面。

example.en: I got out of the car to inspect the damage.
example.zh: 我下车查看损坏情况。

example.en: An inspection was carried out at the school.
example.zh: 有人来学校视察了一遍。

example.en: All four victims died instantly.
example.zh: 四名受害人全部当即死亡。

example.en: You probably picked up my keys instead of yours.
example.zh: 你可能没拿你的钥匙而错拿了我的。

example.en: Her instinct told her that something was wrong.
example.zh: 直觉告诉她有些不对劲。

example.en: Insufficient resources have been devoted to the health service.
example.zh: 用于医疗保健服务的资源不足。

example.en: Your father took out insurance to cover the mortgage.
example.zh: 你父亲购买了抵押借款保险。

example.en: Have you insured the contents of your home?
example.zh: 你给家庭财产投保了吗？

example.zh: 一位顶尖的英国知识分子

phrases.zh: 劳动强度，劳力投入密集度

example.en: The intensity of the hurricane was frightening.
example.zh: 飓风的猛烈程度令人恐惧。

example.en: a one-week intensive course in English
example.zh: 为期一周的英语强化课程

example.en: I did trip him, but it wasn’t intentional.
example.zh: 我的确把他绊倒了，但不是故意的。

phrases.zh: 社会互动；社会干预；社会的相互作用

example.en: But you only get the maximum benefit if you implement all of them, because their power comes from their interaction.
example.zh: 但您只有在实现所有方法的情况下才能获得最多的收益，因为它们的力量来自于它们之间的相互作用。

example.en: I watched the first few episodes, but soon lost interest.
example.zh: 我看了前几集，但很快就失去了兴趣。

example.en: That’s an interesting question.
example.zh: 那是一个有趣的问题。

phrases.zh: 干扰，干涉；妨碍；触动或弄坏；乱动；与……抵触

example.en: My daughter-in-law said that I was interfering, but I was only trying to help.
example.zh: 我的儿媳说我多管闲事，但我只是想帮忙。

example.en: Industrial relations should be free from state interference.
example.zh: 劳资关系应不受政府干预。

phrases.zh: 室内设计；室内装饰；内部装饰业

example.en: The interior walls are all painted white.
example.zh: 室内墙壁都粉刷成了白色。

phrases.zh: 中间产品；半成品；中间乘积

example.en: an intermediate stage during which the disease is dormant
example.zh: 疾病处于潜伏状态的中期

example.en: We have no interest in interfering in the internal affairs of other countries.
example.zh: 我们对干涉其他国家内政不感兴趣。

example.en: the response of the international community
example.zh: 国际社会的反响

example.en: Speaking through an interpreter (= using an interpreter ), Ahmed said, ‘I’m very worried about my wife and children.’
example.zh: 艾哈迈德通过口译者说:“我很担心我的妻子和孩子们。”

example.en: Will you stop interrupting me!
example.zh: 别打断我的话！

phrases.zh: 时时，不时；相隔一定距离（或时间）

example.en: He left the room, returning after a short interval with a message.
example.zh: 他离开房间，过了一会儿就带回来一条消息。

example.en: an intimate friend of Picasso’s
example.zh: 毕加索的一个密友

example.en: Come into the office.
example.zh: 到办公室里来。

example.en: Have you two been introduced? Tom, this is Greg.
example.zh: 有人给你们俩互相介绍了吗？汤姆，这位是格雷格。

example.en: Pete, are you going to make the introductions?
example.zh: 皮特，你来作一下介绍吧。

phrases.zh: 侵犯个人隐私；侵犯隐私权

example.en: the annual invasion of teenagers for the Glastonbury Festival
example.zh: 每年前来参加格拉斯顿伯里音乐节的青少年的涌入

example.en: Alexander Graham Bell invented the telephone in 1876.
example.zh: 亚历山大 · 格雷厄姆 · 贝尔于1876年发明了电话。

example.en: The dishwasher is a wonderful invention.
example.zh: 洗碗机是一项奇妙的发明。

example.en: ...Alexander Graham Bell, the inventor of the telephone.
example.zh: …亚历山大·格雷厄姆·贝尔，电话的发明者。

example.en: The investigation continued for nearly three years.
example.zh: 调查持续了近三年。

example.en: We plan to buy some property as an investment.
example.zh: 我们打算买些房地产作为投资。

example.en: The house was surrounded by trees, and invisible from the road.
example.zh: 这所房子树木环绕，从路上是看不见的。

example.en: They were always dropping by, usually without invitation.
example.zh: 他们常常来串门，通常不请自来。

example.en: I’m afraid I wasn’t invited.
example.zh: 恐怕我没有受到邀请。

example.en: He pushed open the front door, which swung inward with a groan.
example.zh: 他推开前门，门呀的一声向里开了。

example.en: the iron and steel industry
example.zh: 钢铁工业

example.en: The Cayman Islands

example.en: The town was isolated by the floods.
example.zh: 洪水使该镇与外界隔绝。

phrases.zh: 可以说是，似乎就是；好像

example.en: ‘Where’s your office?’ ‘It’s on the third floor.’
example.zh: “你的办公室在哪儿？”“在三楼。”

phrases.zh: 可以说是，似乎就是；好像

example.en: He emphasized its importance to me.
example.zh: 他向我强调它的重要性。

example.en: The cat lay on the sofa, washing itself.
example.zh: 猫躺在沙发上把自己舔干。

phrases.zh: 羽绒服；鸭绒衣；羽绒夹克

example.zh: 吉恩上班得穿西装打领带。

phrases.zh: 在监狱；在狱中服刑；被封锁了

example.en: He’s been in jail for three months already.
example.zh: 他已经入狱三个月。

phrases.zh: 事情搞得一团糟，陷入困境

example.en: strawberry jam
example.zh: 草莓酱

example.en: We always have snow in January.
example.zh: 我们这里1月份总会下雪。

example.en: a Japanese car
example.zh: 日本(汽)车

phrases.zh: 玻璃缸，玻璃罐；玻璃瓶装

example.en: a jam jar
example.zh: 果酱罐

phrases.zh: 迫近的危险，险境；鬼门关

example.en: a broken jaw
example.zh: 碎裂的颌骨

phrases.zh: 犹他爵士队（美国篮球队）

example.en: a jazz band
example.zh: 爵士乐队

example.en: She got insanely jealous and there was a terrible fight.
example.zh: 她变得过分地猜忌，接着是一场激烈的打斗。

example.en: He owns a private jet.
example.zh: 他拥有一架私人喷气式飞机。

phrases.zh: 皇冠上的宝石；（镶在王冠、权杖等上面以显示王权的）御宝

example.zh: 她喜欢穿上盛装，戴上极为昂贵的珠宝首饰。

example.en: ...the Jewish festival of Passover.
example.zh: …犹太逾越节。

phrases.zh: 好运；幸运的事情；干的不错

example.zh: 你喜欢自己的工作吗？

example.zh: 许多人牺牲周末时间，加入了寻找失踪女孩的行动。

example.en: I couldn’t go out with someone for a joke, could you?
example.zh: 我可不能拿谈恋爱当儿戏，对不对？

phrases.zh: 海盗旗（饰有白色骷髅的黑旗）

example.zh: 大家的心情都非常轻松愉快。

example.en: the British Medical Journal
example.zh: 《英国医学杂志》

example.en: a well-known journalist and broadcaster
example.zh: 一位著名的新闻记者兼播音员

example.en: the friends they made on the journey
example.zh: 他们在旅途中交下的朋友

example.en: the look of joy on her face
example.zh: 她脸上的喜悦表情

example.zh: 婚礼是令人喜悦的爱情庆典。

example.zh: 由主审法官确定刑期。

example.en: a carton of orange juice
example.zh: 一纸盒橙汁

example.en: But from February through July, Joy sat around with nothing to do.
example.zh: 但是从二月到七月，乔伊又无事可做了。

example.en: He spent two and a half weeks with us in June 1986.
example.zh: 1986年6月，他和我们呆了两个半星期。

example.en: the Amazon jungle

example.en: the junior football club
example.zh: 青少年足球俱乐部

example.en: the members of the jury
example.zh: 陪审团成员

example.en: A good strong cup of coffee is just what I need right now.
example.zh: 我现在正需要喝一杯浓浓的咖啡。

phrases.zh: 隐瞒，隐藏；抑制；继续燃烧
保持；继续；不低落；不落后

example.zh: 噪音使他一直醒着。

phrases.zh: 客房服务员；内务处理程序

example.en: a beekeeper

example.zh: 她把水壶灌满，打开了开关。

example.en: A bunch of keys hung from his belt.
example.zh: 他的皮带上挂着一串钥匙。

example.en: a computer keyboard
example.zh: 计算机键盘

example.en: He kicked the door hard.
example.zh: 他用力踢门。

example.zh: 她从小就喜爱动物。

phrases.zh: 自杀；竭尽全力；尽最大努力
◎(医药)要么断送生命，要么挽救生命

example.en: Why did she kill her husband?
example.zh: 她为什么杀死丈夫？

example.zh: 相比之下，生产一公斤的番茄需要160升水。

example.zh: 暴风雨袭来时他离家有一公里远。

example.en: Get me a sandwich – any kind will do.
example.zh: 给我一份三明治，随便哪种都可以。

example.en: I can’t thank you enough for your kindness.
example.zh: 你的好意我感激不尽。

亚瑟王（电影名，是英格兰传说中的国王）

example.en: On 2 December Henry VI was crowned king (= made the king at an official ceremony ).
example.zh: 12月2日，亨利六世加冕为王。

example.en: the United Kingdom
example.zh: 联合王国

phrases.zh: 吻掉（用吻来消除忧愁、眼泪等）
n. 死亡之吻（表面看上去有益但实际上具有毁灭性的行为或事务）
专揭名人私生活的书；根据第一手资料写成的绯闻或丑闻故事

example.en: Maggie leaned forward and kissed her cheek.
example.zh: 玛吉俯身吻了她的脸颊。

phrases.zh: n. 政府首脑的参谋团；厨房的餐具柜

example.en: Sam went into the kitchen to make a pot of tea.
example.zh: 萨姆走进厨房去沏一壶茶。

phrases.zh: v. 放风筝；开空头支票；试探舆论
放风筝；开空头支票；签发通融票据以资弥补

example.en: She has a blue and green kite.
example.zh: 她有一只蓝色和绿色的风筝。

example.en: Lucy had a bandage round her knee.
example.zh: 露西的膝盖上缠着绷带。

example.en: Tom knelt down and patted the dog.
example.zh: 汤姆跪下来轻轻拍了拍那只狗。

example.en: a knife and fork
example.zh: 一副刀叉

example.zh: 我有无数的时间来缝缝织织。

example.en: He thought the door was locked, but he turned the knob and the door opened.
example.zh: 他本以为门是锁住的，但是转了一下把手门就开了。

example.en: I knocked and knocked but nobody answered.
example.zh: 我把门敲了又敲，但无人回应。

phrases.zh: 难题；戈尔迪之结（希腊神话中的一个难题）

example.en: One lace had broken and been tied in a knot.
example.zh: 一根带子已经断了，被打成一个结。

phrases.zh: 了解，知道……的情况；知道关于

example.en: Who knows the answer?
example.zh: 谁知道答案？

example.en: He did not have much knowledge of American history.
example.zh: 他对美国历史所知不多。

phrases.zh: 媒体实验室；（美国麻省理工学院）媒体实验室

example.en: the school science lab
example.zh: 学校的科学实验室

phrases.zh: 自有品牌；私有品牌；商店自用品牌

example.en: a luggage label
example.zh: 行李标签

phrases.zh: 实验室设备；实验室仪器

example.en: a research laboratory
example.zh: 研究实验室

example.zh: 汽车修理厂收取每小时30英镑的人工费。

example.zh: 饰有蕾丝花边的手绢

example.en: Too many teachers are treated with a lack of respect.
example.zh: 有太多老师得不到尊重。

example.en: She climbed up the ladder.
example.zh: 她爬上梯子。

phrases.zh: n. 小姐；女士；未婚妻；女朋友

example.en: Ladies and gentlemen, may I have your attention please?
example.zh: 女士们、先生们，请大家注意！

example.en: In this scenario, due to the lag time required to assimilate new resources, the relationship between required resources and estimated delivery timeframe may even turn negative.
example.zh: 在这种情况下，由于时间已经落后，需要吸收新的人力资源，需要的资源和预计的交付时间的关系甚至更加复杂。

example.en: Lake Michigan
example.zh: 密歇根湖

example.en: roast lamb
example.zh: 烤羊肉

example.en: a lame dog
example.zh: 一条瘸腿的狗

phrases.zh: 荧光灯；日光灯；荧光灯管

example.en: She switched on the bedside lamp.
example.zh: 她打开了床头灯。

phrases.zh: 土地利用，土地用途；土地使用，土壤使用

example.en: They own a lot of land.
example.zh: 他们拥有许多土地。

phrases.zh: 起落架；起落装置，着陆装置

example.en: take-off and landing procedures
example.zh: 起降程序

example.en: There was a note under the door from my landlady.
example.zh: 门下有我女房东的一张便条。

example.en: His landlord doubled the rent.
example.zh: 他的房东把房租提高了一倍。

phrases.zh: （街道上的）公共汽车专用车道

example.en: a quiet country lane
example.zh: 一条宁静的乡间小路

example.en: How many languages do you speak?
example.zh: 你能说几种语言？

example.en: In the course of time, this kind of lantern has become an exclusive of the Shens.
example.zh: 后来， 这种灯笼成了沈家的绝活。

example.en: Los Angeles is the second largest city in the US.
example.zh: 洛杉矶是美国的第二大城市。

example.en: The state of Nevada is largely desert.
example.zh: 内华达州大部分是沙漠。

example.en: laser surgery
example.zh: 激光(外科)手术

example.en: Much has changed since my last visit.
example.zh: 自我上次来访后，变化很大。

example.en: Sorry I’m late – I overslept.
example.zh: 对不起，来晚了——我睡过头了。

example.zh: 你最近在干什么？

example.en: I’m going out for a bit – I’ll see you later.
example.zh: 我出去一会儿——回头见。

example.zh: 拉丁语碑文

example.en: In the latter case, buyers pay a 15% commission.
example.zh: 在后一种情况下，买家付15%的佣金。

example.en: Maria looked at him and laughed.
example.zh: 玛丽亚看着他大笑起来。

phrases.zh: 又哭又笑;欢乐与悲伤[亦作 tears and laughter]

example.en: Foster joined in the laughter.
example.zh: 福斯特也跟着笑了起来。

example.en: ...the ladies' lavatory.
example.zh: …女厕所。

phrases.zh: n. 根据法律，在法律上；附则

example.zh: 民选官员理应遵守法律。

example.en: I spent all morning mowing the lawn (= cutting the grass ).
example.zh: 我整个上午都在修剪草坪。

example.en: Prosecution and defence lawyers are expected to deliver closing arguments next week.
example.zh: 原告律师和被告律师下周将要作终结辩论。

phrases.zh: 奠定基础；奠基；打下基础

example.en: He laid his hand on my shoulder.
example.zh: 他把一只手搭在我的肩上。

example.en: He pulled off layer upon layer of clothing (= many layers of clothing ).
example.zh: 他把衣服一件件地脱掉。

example.en: All the flats in the building had the same layout.
example.zh: 大楼里所有的公寓布局都是一样的。

example.en: the laziest boy in the class
example.zh: 班上最懒的男孩

phrases.zh: 领先；主要的；占主导地位的
组长；车间班长；团体领袖

example.en: the largest ever gathering of world leaders
example.zh: 全世界领导人史无前例的大聚会

phrases.zh: 领导技巧；领导技能；领导艺术

example.zh: 美国现在必须扮演一个强有力的领导人角色。

example.en: The army played a leading role in organizing the attempted coup.
example.zh: 军队在策划这场未遂政变的过程中起了最主要的作用。

phrases.zh: 有叶子的；叶茂的；长满叶子的
